consequently.ex: He forgot his keys; consequently, he was locked out.
consequently.exCn: 他忘了带钥匙，结果被锁在门外了。

conservation.root: con-（共同）+ serv（保持）+ -ation（名词后缀）→ 共同保持下来 → 保护
conservation.ex: Wildlife conservation is important for the planet.
conservation.exCn: 野生动物保护对地球很重要。

conservative.root: con-（共同）+ serv（保持）+ -ative（形容词后缀）→ 倾向于保持现状的 → 保守的
conservative.ex: He has conservative views on education.

consider.root: con-（一起）+ sider（星星）→ 观察星象 → 仔细思考

considerable.root: consider（考虑）+ -able（能…的）→ 能让人考虑很多 → 相当大的
considerable.ex: She saved a considerable amount of money.
considerable.exCn: 她存了相当大的一笔钱。

considerate.root: consider（考虑）+ -ate（形容词后缀）→ 为他人考虑的 → 体贴的
considerate.ex: It was considerate of you to help.

consideration.root: consider（考虑）+ -ation（名词后缀）→ 考虑的行为
consideration.ex: Take safety into consideration before starting.

consist.root: con-（一起）+ sist（站立）→ 站在一起 → 由…组成
consist.ex: The team consists of five members.
consist.exCn: 这个团队由五名成员组成。

consistent.root: consist（组成）+ -ent（形容词后缀）→ 各部分协调一致的 → 一致的
consistent.ex: His work is always consistent and reliable.
consistent.exCn: 他的工作总是一致且可靠。

console.root: con-（一起）+ sole（独自）→ 与孤独的人在一起 → 安慰
console.ex: She tried to console her crying friend.
console.exCn: 她试图安慰哭泣的朋友。

consolidate.root: con-（一起）+ solid（坚固）+ -ate（动词后缀）→ 使坚固在一起 → 巩固
consolidate.ex: We need to consolidate our profits this year.
consolidate.exCn: 我们需要巩固今年的利润。

conspicuous.root: con-（加强）+ spic（看）+ -uous（…的）→ 一眼就能看到的 → 显眼的
conspicuous.ex: Her red hat was very conspicuous in the crowd.
conspicuous.exCn: 她的红帽子在人群中很显眼。

conspiracy.root: con-（一起）+ spir（呼吸）+ -acy（名词后缀）→ 同呼吸 → 共谋
conspiracy.ex: They were accused of conspiracy against the government.
conspiracy.exCn: 他们被指控密谋反对政府。

constant.root: con-（加强）+ st（站立）+ -ant（…的）→ 一直站着的 → 持续的
constant.exCn: 这台机器需要持续关注。

constituent.root: con-（一起）+ stitut（建立）+ -ent（…的人/物）→ 一起建立整体的人/物 → 成分；选民
constituent.ex: Sugar is a main constituent of candy.

constitute.root: con-（一起）+ stitut（建立）+ -e（动词后缀）→ 建立在一起 → 构成

constitution.root: con-（共同）+stitut（建立）+ion（名词）→共同建立的规则→宪法；体质
constitution.ex: The country's constitution guarantees freedom of speech.
constitution.exCn: 该国宪法保障言论自由。

constrain.root: con-（一起）+strain（拉紧）→拉到一起→约束
constrain.ex: Lack of money constrained the project.
constrain.exCn: 资金短缺限制了该项目。

construct.root: con-（共同）+struct（建造）→一起建造→建设
construct.ex: They plan to construct a new bridge.
construct.exCn: 他们计划建造一座新桥。

construction.root: construct（建造）+ion（名词）→建造的过程或结果
construction.ex: The construction of the building took two years.
construction.exCn: 那座建筑的建设花了两年。

consult.root: con-（一起）+sult（坐）→坐在一起商量→咨询
consult.ex: You should consult a doctor if you feel sick.
consult.exCn: 如果你感觉不舒服，应该咨询医生。

consultant.root: consult（咨询）+ant（人）→提供咨询的人→顾问
consultant.ex: She works as a management consultant.

consume.root: con-（完全）+sum（拿取）+e→完全拿走→消耗
consume.ex: Cars consume a lot of fuel.

consumption.root: consum（e）（消耗）+ption（名词）→消耗的行为或量

contact.root: con-（共同）+tact（接触）→互相接触→联系

contain.root: con-（共同）+tain（保持）→一起保持住→包含
contain.exCn: 这个盒子里装着旧照片。

container.root: contain（包含）+er（物）→用来装东西的物体→容器
container.ex: Put the food in a plastic container.
container.exCn: 把食物放进塑料容器里。

contaminate.root: con-（共同）+tamin（接触）+ate（动词）→接触污染→污染
contaminate.ex: The river was contaminated by waste.

contemplate.root: con-（加强）+templ（观察）+ate（动词）→仔细观察→沉思
contemplate.ex: He sat there contemplating his future.
contemplate.exCn: 他坐在那里沉思自己的未来。

contemporary.root: con-（共同）+tempor（时间）+ary（形容词）→同一时间的→当代的
contemporary.ex: Contemporary art can be hard to understand.
contemporary.exCn: 当代艺术可能很难理解。

contempt.root: con-（加强）+tempt（蔑视）→强烈蔑视→轻蔑
contempt.ex: She looked at him with contempt.

contend.root: con-（一起）+ tend（伸展）→ 一起伸展争夺
contend.ex: The two teams will contend for the championship.

content.root: con-（全部）+ tent（持有）→ 内心全部持有→满足；也可联想为“目录内容”
content.ex: She felt content with her exam results.
content.exCn: 她对考试结果感到满足。

contest.root: con-（一起）+ test（测试）→ 一起测试→竞赛
contest.ex: He won the first prize in the speech contest.
contest.exCn: 他在演讲比赛中赢得了一等奖。

context.root: con-（一起）+ text（编织）→ 编织在一起→上下文
context.ex: You need to understand the context of the sentence.
context.exCn: 你需要理解这句话的上下文。

continent.root: con-（一起）+ tin（保持）+ ent（名词后缀）→ 连在一起的大陆
continent.ex: Africa is a large continent with many cultures.
continent.exCn: 非洲是一个拥有多种文化的大陆。

continual.root: con-（一起）+ tin（保持）+ ual（形容词后缀）→ 一直保持→连续的（强调频繁重复）
continual.ex: There was continual rain throughout the week.
continual.exCn: 整个星期都在断断续续地下雨。

continue.root: con-（一起）+ tin（保持）+ ue（动词后缀）→ 保持一起→继续
continue.ex: Please continue reading the next paragraph.

continuous.root: con-（一起）+ tin（保持）+ uous（形容词后缀）→ 一直保持→持续的（强调不间断）
continuous.ex: The machine runs in continuous operation.

contract.root: con-（一起）+ tract（拉）→ 拉到一起→合同/收缩
contract.ex: Sign the contract before starting the work.

contradict.root: contra-（相反）+ dict（说）→ 说相反的话→反驳
contradict.ex: Don't contradict your teacher in class.
contradict.exCn: 不要在课堂上反驳老师。

contradiction.root: contra-（相反）+ dict（说）+ ion（名词后缀）→ 矛盾的话
contradiction.ex: His actions are a contradiction of his words.
contradiction.exCn: 他的行为与他的话矛盾。

contrary.root: contra-（相反）+ ry（形容词后缀）→ 相反的
contrary.ex: Contrary to popular belief, he is very shy.
contrary.exCn: 与普遍看法相反，他其实很害羞。

contrast.root: contra-（相反）+ st（站立）→ 站在对立面→对比
contrast.ex: The contrast between light and dark is clear.
contrast.exCn: 明暗之间的对比很明显。

contribute.root: con-（一起）+ tribute（给予）→ 一起给予→贡献
contribute.ex: Everyone should contribute to the team effort.
contribute.exCn: 每个人都应为团队努力做出贡献。

contribution.root: con-（一起）+ tribute（给予）+ ion（名词后缀）→ 贡献
contribution.ex: Her contribution to the project was valuable.
contribution.exCn: 她对项目的贡献很有价值。

contrive.root: con-（共同）+ trive（来自法语，意为“转动、设计”）→ 一起设计 → 策划
contrive.ex: She contrived a plan to escape.
contrive.exCn: 她策划了一个逃跑计划。

control.root: contra-（相反）+ roll（滚动）→ 反向滚动 → 控制
control.ex: He lost control of the car.
control.exCn: 他失去了对汽车的控制。

controversial.root: contro-（相反）+ vers（转）+ ial（形容词后缀）→ 转向相反方向的 → 有争议的

controversy.root: contro-（相反）+ vers（转）+ y（名词后缀）→ 转向相反方向 → 争论

convenience.root: con-（一起）+ ven（来）+ ience（名词后缀）→ 所有东西一起来 → 便利
convenience.ex: The store is open for convenience.
convenience.exCn: 这家商店为方便顾客而营业。

convenient.root: con-（一起）+ ven（来）+ ient（形容词后缀）→ 一起来很方便的 → 方便的

convention.root: con-（一起）+ vent（来）+ ion（名词后缀）→ 大家一起来 → 会议、惯例

conventional.root: con-（一起）+ vent（来）+ ion（名词）+ al（形容词后缀）→ 惯例的 → 传统的

conversation.root: con-（一起）+ vers（转）+ ation（名词后缀）→ 一起转来转去地说话 → 对话
conversation.exCn: 我们进行了一次愉快的对话。

conversely.root: con-（一起）+ vers（转）+ ely（副词后缀）→ 转过来 → 相反地

conversion.root: con-（完全）+ vers（转）+ ion（名词后缀）→ 完全转变 → 转换

convert.root: con-（完全）+ vert（转）→ 完全转过来 → 转换
convert.ex: He wants to convert his money.

convey.root: con-（一起）+ vey（路）→ 一起上路 → 运送、传达
convey.ex: Please convey my thanks to her.

convict.root: con-（完全）+ vict（征服）→ 完全征服 → 定罪

conviction.root: con-（完全）+ vict（征服）+ ion（名词后缀）→ 完全征服 → 定罪、信念

convince.root: con-（共同）+vince（征服）→ 一起征服想法 → 说服
convince.ex: I finally convinced him to join the team.
convince.exCn: 我终于说服他加入了团队。

cook.ex: She loves to cook Italian food on weekends.
cook.exCn: 她喜欢在周末做意大利菜。

cool.ex: The water is cool enough to drink now.
cool.exCn: 这水现在凉得可以喝了。

cooperate.root: co-（共同）+operate（操作）→ 一起操作 → 合作
cooperate.ex: We need to cooperate to finish the project.
cooperate.exCn: 我们需要合作完成这个项目。

cooperative.root: co-（共同）+operate（操作）+ive（形容词后缀）→ 合作的
cooperative.ex: She is a very cooperative team member.
cooperative.exCn: 她是一个非常合作的团队成员。

coordinate.root: co-（共同）+ordin（顺序）+ate（动词后缀）→ 使顺序一致 → 协调
coordinate.ex: He helped coordinate the event schedule.
coordinate.exCn: 他帮助协调了活动日程。

cop.ex: The cop stopped the car for speeding.

cope.ex: She learned to cope with stress at work.
cope.exCn: 她学会了应对工作压力。

copper.ex: The pipes are made of copper.

copy.ex: Please make a copy of this document.

copyright.root: copy（复制）+right（权利）→ 复制权 → 版权
copyright.ex: The book is protected by copyright law.

cord.ex: He tied the box with a strong cord.
cord.exCn: 他用一根结实的绳子捆住了盒子。

cordial.root: cord（心）+ial（形容词后缀）→ 发自内心的 → 热诚的
cordial.ex: They gave us a cordial welcome.
cordial.exCn: 他们给了我们热诚的欢迎。

core.ex: The core of the problem is lack of trust.
core.exCn: 问题的核心是缺乏信任。

corn.ex: The field is full of ripe corn.
corn.exCn: 田里长满了成熟的玉米。

corner.ex: The cat is hiding in the corner.

corporation.root: corpor（身体/团体）+ation（名词）→法人团体→公司
corporation.ex: She works for a large corporation.

correspond.root: cor（共同）+respond（回应）→互相回应→对应
correspond.ex: His actions don't correspond with his words.

correspondence.root: correspond（对应）+ence（名词）→通信/对应关系
correspondence.ex: We kept up our correspondence for years.

correspondent.ex: The correspondent reported from the scene.

corresponding.ex: Sales rose, with a corresponding increase in profit.
corresponding.exCn: 销售额上升，利润也相应增长。

corridor.ex: The classroom is at the end of the corridor.

corrode.ex: The metal will corrode over time.

corrupt.root: cor（彻底）+rupt（断裂）→彻底断裂→腐败
corrupt.exCn: 一个腐败官员收受贿赂。

cosmic.ex: The cosmic scale is hard to imagine.

cost.ex: The cost of living keeps rising.

costume.root: cost（与custom同源→习惯）+ume→习惯穿的→服装
costume.exCn: 她穿了一件万圣节服装。

cosy.ex: The room was warm and cosy.

cottage.ex: They rented a small cottage by the lake.
cottage.exCn: 他们在湖边租了一间小别墅。

cotton.ex: This shirt is made of cotton.

couch.ex: He sat on the couch watching TV.

cough.ex: She had a bad cough all night.

could.ex: I could swim when I was five.

council.ex: The city council meets every Monday.

counsel.ex: She sought counsel from a lawyer.

counter.ex: He placed the book on the counter.

counterpart.ex: My counterpart in the Beijing office handles sales.
counterpart.exCn: 我在北京办公室的对应同事负责销售。

country.exCn: 法国是一个美丽的国家。

countryside.ex: We drove through the countryside on Sunday.
countryside.exCn: 我们周日开车穿过了乡村。

county.ex: He lives in a small county in Texas.
county.exCn: 他住在德克萨斯州的一个小县里。

couple.ex: A couple of students arrived late.

coupon.root: 来自法语 couper（切），原指从票券上“切下”一部分
coupon.ex: Use this coupon to get 20% off your meal.
coupon.exCn: 用这张优惠券，你的餐费可以打八折。

courage.root: cour（心）+ age（状态）→ 内心的力量
courage.ex: She showed great courage in the face of danger.
courage.exCn: 面对危险，她表现出了巨大的勇气。

course.root: cour（跑）+ se → 奔跑的路径
course.ex: I signed up for a business English course.
course.exCn: 我报名了一门商务英语课程。

court.root: cour（跑）+ t → 人们“跑来”聚集的地方
court.ex: The case will be heard in court next Monday.
court.exCn: 该案件将于下周一在法庭审理。

courtesy.root: cour（心）+ tesy → 出自内心的礼貌
courtesy.ex: He held the door open out of courtesy.

courtyard.root: court（院子）+ yard（场地）→ 院子里的空地
courtyard.ex: We had coffee in the hotel courtyard.
courtyard.exCn: 我们在酒店的院子里喝了咖啡。

cousin.root: co（一起）+ us（我们）+ in → 和我们一起长大的亲戚
cousin.ex: My cousin is coming to visit this weekend.
cousin.exCn: 我的表弟这周末要来看我。

cover.root: co（完全）+ ver（盖）→ 完全盖住

cow.ex: The cow is eating grass in the field.

coward.root: cow（牛）+ ard（贬义后缀）→ 像牛一样胆小的人
coward.ex: Don't be a coward; just ask her out.

crab.ex: We caught a crab on the beach.
crab.exCn: 我们在海滩上抓到了一只螃蟹。

crack.root: 拟声词，模仿物体裂开的声音
crack.ex: There's a crack in the window.

cradle.root: crad（婴儿床）+ le（小）→ 小摇篮
cradle.ex: She rocked the baby in the cradle.

craft.root: 源自 kraft（力量），指用手工“力量”制作
craft.ex: He learned the craft of woodworking.

crane.ex: A crane was used to lift the heavy boxes.
crane.exCn: 用了一台起重机来吊起那些沉重的箱子。

crash.ex: The car crashed into a tree.

crawl.root: 与“爬行”相关，c-像弯腰，rawl像拖拽
crawl.ex: The baby crawled across the floor.
crawl.exCn: 婴儿在地板上爬了过去。

crazy.root: craz-（裂缝/破碎）+y，脑子裂了→疯狂
crazy.ex: You're crazy to drive in this storm.
crazy.exCn: 你在这种暴风雨里开车真是疯了。

cream.root: 拟音词根，像搅打奶油的声音
cream.ex: Add a spoonful of cream to the coffee.

create.root: cre-（生长/制造）+ate（动词后缀）→创造
create.ex: She wants to create her own business.

creative.root: create（创造）+ive（形容词后缀）→有创造力的
creative.ex: He has a very creative mind.
creative.exCn: 他有一个非常有创造力的头脑。

creature.root: create（创造）+ure（名词后缀）→被创造出来的生物
creature.ex: The creature came out of the forest.
creature.exCn: 那个生物从森林里走了出来。

credential.root: cred-（相信）+ential→让人相信的东西→凭证
credential.ex: Show your credentials at the gate.

credit.root: cred-（相信）+it→相信你将来会还钱→信用

creep.root: 拟声词根，像偷偷移动的轻擦声
creep.ex: Don't creep up on me like that.

crew.root: crew-（增长）→一群人一起增长→全体船员/团队
crew.ex: The crew is ready for takeoff.

cricket.root: 拟声词根，模仿蟋蟀叫声
cricket.ex: The children played cricket in the park.
cricket.exCn: 孩子们在公园里打板球。

crime.root: crim-（区分/裁决）→需要裁决的行为→罪行

criminal.root: crime（罪行）+inal（形容词/名词后缀）→犯罪的/罪犯

cripple.root: crip-（弯曲/扭曲）+ple→身体扭曲→使残疾
cripple.ex: The accident crippled his left leg.

crisis.root: 来自希腊语 krisis（决定、判断），与“批评”同源
crisis.ex: The country is facing an economic crisis.
crisis.exCn: 这个国家正面临一场经济危机。

crisp.root: 来自拉丁语 crispus（卷曲的），引申为“脆的、清新的”
crisp.ex: I love the crisp autumn air.
crisp.exCn: 我喜欢秋天清新的空气。

criterion.root: 来自希腊语 kriterion（判断标准），与“批评”同源
criterion.ex: What is the main criterion for success?
criterion.exCn: 成功的主要标准是什么？

critic.root: 来自希腊语 kritikos（善于判断的），与“批评”同源
critic.ex: The critic gave the film a bad review.
critic.exCn: 那位评论家给这部电影打了差评。

critical.root: critic（评论家）+ al（形容词后缀），意为“批评的、关键的”
critical.ex: This is a critical moment for the project.
critical.exCn: 这对项目来说是一个关键时刻。

criticism.root: critic（评论家）+ ism（名词后缀），意为“批评、评论”

criticize.root: critic（评论家）+ ize（动词后缀），意为“批评”
criticize.ex: Don't criticize others without knowing the facts.
criticize.exCn: 不了解事实就不要批评别人。

crop.root: 来自古英语 cropp（鸟的嗉囊），引申为“作物、收割”
crop.ex: Farmers are harvesting the wheat crop.
crop.exCn: 农民们正在收割小麦作物。

cross.root: 来自拉丁语 crux（十字架），引申为“穿过、交叉”
cross.ex: Be careful when you cross the street.

crow.root: 拟声词，模仿乌鸦的叫声
crow.ex: The crow sat on the fence and cawed.
crow.exCn: 那只乌鸦坐在篱笆上呱呱叫。

crowd.root: 来自古英语 crudan（推、挤），引申为“人群”
crowd.ex: A large crowd gathered in the square.
crowd.exCn: 一大群人聚集在广场上。

crown.root: 来自拉丁语 corona（花冠、王冠）
crown.ex: The king placed the crown on his head.

crucial.root: 来自拉丁语 crux（十字架），引申为“关键的”
crucial.ex: This step is crucial for the experiment.
crucial.exCn: 这一步对实验至关重要。

crude.root: 来自拉丁语 crudus（生的、粗糙的）
crude.ex: The report contained only crude estimates.
crude.exCn: 这份报告只包含粗略的估算。

cruel.root: 来自拉丁语 crudelis（残忍的），与 crude（粗糙的）同源
cruel.ex: It's cruel to keep animals in tiny cages.
cruel.exCn: 把动物关在小笼子里是很残忍的。

cruise.root: cruis- 来自拉丁语 crux,十字，原指在海上交叉航行

crush.ex: The car was crushed by the truck.

crust.root: crus- 来自拉丁语 crusta,硬壳
crust.ex: The bread has a hard crust.

crystal.root: crystall- 来自希腊语 krystallos,冰,水晶
crystal.ex: The crystal glass sparkled in the sun.
crystal.exCn: 水晶玻璃在阳光下闪闪发光。

cube.ex: Cut the cheese into small cubes.

cucumber.ex: She added cucumber to the salad.

cue.ex: His nod was my cue to start.
cue.exCn: 他的点头是我开始的信号。

cultivate.root: cultiv- 来自拉丁语 colere,耕种
cultivate.ex: They cultivate rice in the fields.

culture.root: cult- 来自拉丁语 colere,耕种,引申为培养
culture.ex: She studied Chinese culture for years.

cunning.root: cun- 来自古英语 cunnan,知道,引申为狡猾
cunning.ex: The fox is known for its cunning.

cup.ex: He drank tea from a small cup.

cupboard.ex: The plates are in the cupboard.

curb.ex: We need to curb our spending.

cure.ex: This medicine will cure your cough.
cure.exCn: 这种药会治好你的咳嗽。

curiosity.root: cur=关心，-iosity名词后缀→关心的事→好奇心
curiosity.ex: Her curiosity about the world never ends.
curiosity.exCn: 她对世界的好奇心从未停止。

curious.root: cur=关心，-ious形容词后缀→关心的→好奇的
curious.ex: I'm curious how this machine works.
curious.exCn: 我很好奇这台机器是怎么工作的。

curl.ex: She curled her hair with a curling iron.
curl.exCn: 她用卷发棒把头发卷曲了。

currency.root: cur=跑，-rency名词后缀→流通的东西→货币
currency.ex: The Euro is the currency used in many European countries.
currency.exCn: 欧元是许多欧洲国家使用的货币。

current.root: cur=跑，-ent形容词/名词后缀→正在跑的→当前的
current.ex: The current situation requires quick action.
current.exCn: 当前形势需要迅速采取行动。

curriculum.root: cur=跑，-iculum小词后缀→课程像一条跑的路→课程表
curriculum.ex: The school curriculum includes math and science.
curriculum.exCn: 学校课程包括数学和科学。

curse.ex: He cursed under his breath after the mistake.
curse.exCn: 犯错误后他低声咒骂了一句。

curtain.root: cur=覆盖，-tain名词后缀→覆盖物→窗帘
curtain.ex: She pulled the curtain open to let in light.
curtain.exCn: 她拉开窗帘让光线进来。

cushion.ex: She sat on a soft cushion on the floor.
cushion.exCn: 她坐在地板上的软垫子上。

custom.root: 无直接词根，联想：习惯做法
custom.ex: It's a local custom to shake hands.

customary.root: custom+ary形容词后缀→习俗的→惯常的
customary.ex: It is customary to tip in restaurants.

customer.root: custom+er名词后缀→按习惯来的人→顾客
customer.ex: The customer asked for a refund.

cut.ex: She cut the paper into small pieces.

cyberspace.ex: Many people work and socialize in cyberspace.
cyberspace.exCn: 许多人在网络空间中工作和社交。

cycle.ex: I cycle to work every day.

cylinder.ex: The gas is stored in a metal cylinder.
cylinder.exCn: 气体储存在一个金属圆筒里。

daily.ex: She reads the daily news online.

dairy.ex: I bought milk from the dairy farm.

dam.ex: The dam controls the river's flow.

damage.exCn: 暴风雨造成了严重损坏。

danger.ex: There is danger on the road.

dangerous.ex: This road is dangerous at night.

dare.ex: I dare you to try it.

dash.ex: He made a dash for the door.

data.root: 源自拉丁语 dare（给）的过去分词，意为“被给出的东西”
data.ex: We need more data to confirm the result.
data.exCn: 我们需要更多数据来确认结果。

database.root: data（数据）+ base（基础），即“数据的基础集合”
database.exCn: 这个数据库存储客户信息。

daughter.ex: Her daughter is learning to read.

daylight.ex: The room has plenty of daylight.

daytime.root: day（白天）+ time（时间），即“白天时段”
daytime.ex: I prefer to study in the daytime.

deadline.root: dead（死的）+ line（线），原指监狱周围不可越过的死亡线，现指截止日期

deadly.root: dead（死）+ ly（形容词后缀），意为“致命的”

deaf.ex: He is deaf in one ear.

dealer.root: deal（交易）+ er（表人），即“交易者”
dealer.ex: He works as a car dealer.

dean.root: 源自拉丁语 decanus，意为“十人之首”，原指管十名僧侣的负责人
dean.ex: The dean of the school announced a new policy.
dean.exCn: 学院院长宣布了一项新政策。

dear.root: 源自古英语 dēore，意为“珍贵的，亲爱的”
dear.ex: My dear friend, thank you for your help.
dear.exCn: 我亲爱的朋友，谢谢你的帮助。

death.root: 与 dead（死的）同源，-th 为名词后缀
death.ex: The death of the old king shocked everyone.
death.exCn: 老国王的去世震惊了所有人。

debate.root: de-（向下）+ bate（打）= 激烈地“打”嘴仗
debate.ex: They had a heated debate about the new law.
debate.exCn: 他们就新法律进行了一场激烈的辩论。

debt.root: 源自拉丁语 debitum，意为“欠下的东西”
debt.ex: He finally paid off his student debt.
debt.exCn: 他终于还清了学生贷款。

decade.root: dec-（十）+ ade（名词后缀）= 十年
decade.ex: The company has grown a lot in the last decade.
decade.exCn: 这家公司在过去十年里发展了很多。

decay.root: de-（向下）+ cay（落下）= 逐渐衰落
decay.ex: The old wooden house began to decay.
decay.exCn: 那栋老木屋开始腐烂了。

deceit.root: de-（偏离）+ ceit（拿）= 偷偷拿走，即欺骗
deceit.ex: His deceit was finally discovered by his friends.
deceit.exCn: 他的欺骗最终被朋友们发现了。

deceive.root: de-（偏离）+ ceive（拿）= 用假话“拿”走信任
deceive.ex: Don't let his smile deceive you; he's not honest.
deceive.exCn: 别让他的微笑欺骗你，他并不诚实。

december.root: 原指罗马历法的第十个月（dec-十），后改为十二月
december.ex: December is the coldest month in Beijing.
december.exCn: 十二月是北京最冷的月份。

decent.root: 源自拉丁语 decens，意为“合适的，体面的”
decent.ex: Everyone deserves a decent place to live.
decent.exCn: 每个人都应该有一个体面的住处。

decide.root: de-（离开）+ cide（切）= 切掉犹豫，做出决定
decide.ex: I need to decide which job to take.
decide.exCn: 我需要决定接受哪份工作。

decimal.root: decim-（十分之一）+ al（形容词后缀）= 十进制的
decimal.ex: We use the decimal system in everyday math.
decimal.exCn: 我们在日常数学中使用十进制系统。

decision.root: decide 的名词形式，-sion 表行为结果
decision.ex: She made a quick decision to accept the offer.
decision.exCn: 她迅速做出了接受邀请的决定。

decisive.root: decision 的形容词形式，-ive 表“有…性质的”
decisive.ex: A decisive leader acts quickly and clearly.
decisive.exCn: 一个果断的领导者行动迅速而明确。

deck.ex: He stood on the deck of the ship.

declaration.root: de（加强）+ clar（清楚）+ ation（名词）→ 说清楚的话
declaration.ex: She made a public declaration of support.
declaration.exCn: 她公开发表了支持声明。

declare.root: de（加强）+ clar（清楚）→ 说清楚

decline.root: de（向下）+ clin（倾斜）→ 向下倾斜
decline.ex: The company's profits began to decline.

decorate.root: decor（装饰）+ ate（动词）→ 装饰
decorate.ex: They decorate the room for the party.
decorate.exCn: 他们装饰房间为派对做准备。

decrease.root: de（向下）+ creas（增长）→ 减少增长
decrease.ex: The population is expected to decrease.

dedicate.root: de（加强）+ dic（说）+ ate（动词）→ 郑重说出
dedicate.ex: He dedicated the book to his mother.
dedicate.exCn: 他把这本书献给了他的母亲。

deduce.root: de（向下）+ duc（引导）→ 向下引导出结论
deduce.ex: We can deduce the answer from the data.
deduce.exCn: 我们可以从数据中推断出答案。

deduct.root: de（向下）+ duct（引导）→ 引导减去
deduct.ex: The boss will deduct tax from your pay.
deduct.exCn: 老板会从你的工资中扣除税款。

deed.ex: A good deed is never forgotten.
deed.exCn: 一件好事永远不会被忘记。

deem.root: deem = 认为（与doom同源，原指“判断”）
deem.ex: I deem it necessary to leave now.
deem.exCn: 我认为现在离开是必要的。

deep.ex: The river is very deep here.

deer.root: deer = 鹿（无词根，直接记忆）
deer.ex: A deer ran across the road.

defeat.root: de（向下）+ feat（做）→ 把对手做下去
defeat.ex: Our team defeated the rival easily.
defeat.exCn: 我们队轻松击败了对手。

defence.root: de（离开）+ fenc（击打）→ 挡开攻击
defence.ex: The army fought in defence of the city.

defect.root: de-(向下)+fect(做)→做得不够好→缺陷
defect.ex: The product has a serious defect.
defect.exCn: 这个产品有一个严重缺陷。

defend.root: de-(离开)+fend(打击)→击退攻击→保卫
defend.exCn: 我们必须捍卫我们的权利。

deficiency.root: de-(向下)+fic(做)+iency(名词)→做得不够→不足
deficiency.ex: A vitamin deficiency can cause illness.
deficiency.exCn: 维生素缺乏会导致疾病。

deficit.root: de-(向下)+fic(做)+it(名词)→做得不够→赤字

define.root: de-(加强)+fin(界限)+e→划定界限→定义

definite.root: define(定义)+ite(形容词)→有明确界限的→明确的
definite.exCn: 我们需要一个明确的答案。

definition.ex: Look up the definition in a dictionary.

defy.root: de-(离开)+fy(信任)→不再信任→公然反抗
defy.ex: He decided to defy the rules.

degenerate.root: de-(向下)+gener(产生)+ate(动词)→产生得更差→退化

degree.ex: She earned a degree in economics.

delay.root: de-(加强)+lay(放置)→放在一边→延迟
delay.ex: The flight was delayed by fog.

delegate.root: de-(离开)+leg(派遣)+ate(人)→被派出去的人→代表
delegate.ex: She was chosen as a delegate.

delete.root: de-(离开)+let(让)+e→让某物离开→删除

deliberate.root: de-(加强)+liber(称重)+ate→反复称量→深思熟虑的
deliberate.exCn: 这是一个深思熟虑的决定。

delicate.root: de-(加强)+lic(诱人)+ate(形容词)→精致诱人的→精致的
delicate.exCn: 小心拿这个精致的玻璃杯。

delicious.root: de-（加强）+ lic（诱惑）→ 非常诱惑人 → 美味的

delight.root: de-（加强）+ light（光亮）→ 使心情亮起来 → 高兴

deliver.root: de-（离开）+ liver（自由）→ 使自由 → 递送/交付

delivery.root: deliver（递送）+ y（名词后缀）→ 递送行为

demand.root: de-（加强）+ mand（命令）→ 强烈要求 → 需求
demand.ex: There is high demand for this product.

democracy.root: demo（人民）+ cracy（统治）→ 人民统治 → 民主

democratic.root: democracy（民主）+ tic（形容词后缀）→ 民主的
democratic.ex: The election was fair and democratic.

demonstrate.root: de-（完全）+ monstr（展示）+ ate（动词后缀）→ 充分展示 → 证明/示范
demonstrate.ex: He demonstrated how to solve the problem.
demonstrate.exCn: 他演示了如何解决这个问题。

denial.root: deny（否认）的变形 + al（名词后缀）→ 否认行为
denial.ex: His denial of the accusation was weak.
denial.exCn: 他对指控的否认很无力。

denote.root: de-（向下）+ not（标记）→ 向下标记 → 表示

denounce.root: de-（向下）+ nounce（报告）→ 向下报告 → 谴责
denounce.exCn: 他们谴责了不公平的政策。

density.root: dense（浓密）+ ity（名词后缀）→ 密度
density.ex: The population density is high here.

dental.root: dent（牙齿）+ al（形容词后缀）→ 牙齿的
dental.ex: She has a dental appointment today.
dental.exCn: 她今天有一个牙科预约。

dentist.exCn: 我的牙医修好了我的牙。

deny.root: de-(向下/加强) + ny(否定) → 坚决否定

depart.root: de-(离开) + part(部分/分开) → 分开离开

department.root: de-(向下) + part(部分) + ment(名词) → 分出的部门
department.ex: She works in the sales department.

departure.exCn: 他的离开让所有人惊讶。

depend.root: de-(向下) + pend(悬挂) → 挂在…上 → 依赖

dependent.root: depend + ent(形容词后缀) → 依赖的
dependent.ex: He is dependent on his parents.

depict.root: de-(加强) + pict(画/描绘) → 描绘
depict.ex: The painting depicts a peaceful village.
depict.exCn: 这幅画描绘了一个宁静的村庄。

deposit.root: de-(向下) + pos(放) + it → 放下 → 存放
deposit.ex: Please deposit money in the bank.

depress.root: de-(向下) + press(压) → 向下压 → 使沮丧

deprive.root: de-(去掉) + priv(个人/私有) + e → 剥夺
deprive.ex: They deprived him of his freedom.

depth.ex: What is the depth of the lake?

deputy.root: de-(向下/加强) + put(放/计算) + y → 被放在下面的人 → 副手

derive.root: de-(从) + riv(河流) + e → 从河流引出 → 源于

descend.root: de-(向下) + scend(爬) → 向下爬 → 下降

descendant.root: descend + ant(名词/形容词后缀) → 后代
descendant.ex: He is a descendant of the king.

descent.root: de-向下 + scend爬 → 向下爬，即下降
descent.ex: The plane began its descent to the airport.

describe.root: de-向下 + scribe写 → 写下来 → 描述
describe.ex: Can you describe the man you saw?
describe.exCn: 你能描述一下你看到的那个人吗？

description.root: de-向下 + script写 + -ion名词后缀 → 描述（名词）
description.ex: She gave a detailed description of the suspect.
description.exCn: 她详细描述了嫌疑人的特征。

desert.root: de-分离 + sert加入 → 脱离加入 → 抛弃
desert.ex: He decided to desert the army.

deserve.root: de-加强 + serve服务 → 值得被服务 → 应得
deserve.ex: You deserve a break after all that work.
deserve.exCn: 做完所有这些工作后，你值得休息一下。

design.root: de-加强 + sign标记 → 标记出方案 → 设计
design.ex: She will design a new logo for the company.
design.exCn: 她将为公司设计一个新标志。

designate.root: de-加强 + sign标记 + -ate动词后缀 → 明确标记 → 指定
designate.ex: The manager will designate a new team leader.
designate.exCn: 经理将指定一位新的团队负责人。

desirable.root: desire渴望 + -able能...的 → 值得渴望的
desirable.ex: This location is highly desirable for living.
desirable.exCn: 这个位置非常适合居住。

desire.root: de-加强 + sire星星(古义) → 向星星祈求 → 渴望
desire.ex: He has a strong desire to succeed.

desk.ex: Please leave the report on my desk.
desk.exCn: 请把报告放在我的桌子上。

desolate.root: de-加强 + sol孤独 + -ate形容词后缀 → 极其孤独 → 荒凉的
desolate.ex: The old house stood in a desolate area.
desolate.exCn: 那座老房子位于一片荒凉的区域。

despair.root: de-失去 + sper希望 → 失去希望 → 绝望
despair.ex: She was filled with despair after failing the exam.
despair.exCn: 考试失败后，她充满了绝望。

despatch.root: de-分离 + spatch(同dispatch)发送 → 发送出去
despatch.ex: The goods were despatched yesterday afternoon.
despatch.exCn: 货物昨天下午被发送了。

desperate.root: de-失去 + sper希望 + -ate形容词后缀 → 失去希望的 → 绝望的
desperate.ex: He made a desperate attempt to escape.
desperate.exCn: 他做了一次绝望的逃跑尝试。

despise.root: de-向下 + spise看 → 向下看 → 鄙视
despise.ex: I despise people who lie to me.
despise.exCn: 我鄙视那些对我撒谎的人。

despite.root: de-（向下）+ spic（看）→ 目光向下看，即“尽管、不顾”
despite.ex: Despite the rain, she went out.
despite.exCn: 尽管下雨，她还是出门了。

dessert.root: des-（去掉）+ sert（放）→ 吃完主菜后撤掉盘子上来的东西 → 甜点
dessert.ex: I want ice cream for dessert.

destination.root: de-（加强）+ stin（站/立）+ -ation（名词）→ 最终站立的地方 → 目的地
destination.ex: We arrived at our destination safely.
destination.exCn: 我们安全到达了目的地。

destiny.root: de-（加强）+ stin（站/立）+ -y（名词）→ 早已被定好的状态 → 命运
destiny.ex: She believed it was her destiny.

destroy.root: de-（去掉）+ stroy（建筑）→ 把建筑拆掉 → 摧毁
destroy.ex: The fire destroyed the whole house.

destruction.root: de-（去掉）+ struct（建造）+ -ion（名词）→ 把建造的东西去掉 → 破坏

destructive.root: de-（去掉）+ struct（建造）+ -ive（形容词）→ 具有破坏性的
destructive.exCn: 这场暴风雨破坏性很强。

detach.root: de-（分离）+ tach（钉/系）→ 把钉住的解开 → 分离
detach.ex: Please detach the form from the page.
detach.exCn: 请把表格从这一页上撕下来。

detail.root: de-（分开）+ tail（切割）→ 切分成小块 → 细节
detail.ex: He explained every detail of the plan.
detail.exCn: 他解释了计划的每一个细节。

detain.root: de-（加强）+ tain（拿/握）→ 牢牢握住 → 扣留
detain.ex: The police detained him for questioning.

detect.root: de-（去掉）+ tect（盖）→ 揭开盖子 → 察觉
detect.ex: Doctors can detect the disease early.
detect.exCn: 医生可以早期发现这种疾病。

detective.root: detect（察觉）+ -ive（人/物）→ 专门察觉线索的人 → 侦探
detective.ex: The detective solved the case quickly.

detector.root: detect（察觉）+ -or（器具）→ 察觉东西的器具 → 探测器
detector.ex: A smoke detector saved their lives.
detector.exCn: 一个烟雾探测器救了他们的命。

deteriorate.root: deterior（更差）+ -ate（动词）→ 变得更差 → 恶化

determine.root: de-（加强）+ termine（边界/终点）→ 划定终点 → 决定
determine.ex: We must determine the best method.
determine.exCn: 我们必须确定最好的方法。

develop.root: de-（向下）+ velop（包，卷）→ 把包裹打开 → 发展
develop.ex: The company plans to develop new software.
develop.exCn: 这家公司计划开发新软件。

deviate.root: de-（离开）+ vi（路）+ -ate（动词后缀）→ 离开正路 → 偏离
deviate.ex: Try not to deviate from the main topic.

device.root: de- + vice（代替）→ 代替人做事的工具 → 装置，设备
device.ex: This device can charge your phone quickly.
device.exCn: 这个设备能快速给手机充电。

devil.root: 源自希腊语 diabolos（诽谤者），de- + vil（说坏话）→ 魔鬼
devil.ex: He is a devil when he is angry.

devise.root: de- + vise（看）→ 仔细看后想出 → 设计，发明
devise.ex: We need to devise a better plan.
devise.exCn: 我们需要设计一个更好的计划。

devote.root: de- + vote（发誓）→ 发誓献出 → 致力于
devote.ex: She devotes all her time to study.
devote.exCn: 她把所有时间都用于学习。

dew.ex: The grass was wet with morning dew.

diagnose.root: dia-（穿过）+ gnos（知道）→ 彻底了解 → 诊断
diagnose.ex: The doctor will diagnose the illness today.
diagnose.exCn: 医生今天会诊断这个病。

diagram.root: dia-（穿过）+ gram（写，画）→ 画出来让人看透 → 图表
diagram.ex: Look at this diagram of the heart.

dial.root: 源自拉丁语 dies（日子）→ 日晷上的刻度盘 → 刻度盘，拨号

dialect.root: dia-（在…之间）+ lect（说）→ 在人群之间说的话 → 方言
dialect.ex: This dialect is hard to understand.

dialog.root: dia-（在…之间）+ log（说）→ 两人之间说的话 → 对话
dialog.ex: They had a long dialog about the plan.
dialog.exCn: 他们就这个计划进行了长时间的对话。

diameter.root: dia-（穿过）+ meter（测量）→ 穿过圆心的测量 → 直径
diameter.ex: The pipe has a diameter of ten inches.
diameter.exCn: 这根管子的直径是10英寸。

diamond.root: 源自希腊语 adamas（不可征服的）→ 最硬的宝石 → 钻石
diamond.ex: She wore a diamond ring on her finger.
diamond.exCn: 她手指上戴着一枚钻戒。

diary.root: di-（日）+ -ary（地方）→ 记录每天的地方 → 日记
diary.ex: I write in my diary every night.

dictate.root: dict- 说 + -ate 动词后缀 → 口述、命令
dictate.ex: The boss dictated a letter to his secretary.
dictate.exCn: 老板向秘书口述了一封信。

dictation.root: dict- 说 + -ation 名词后缀 → 口述、听写
dictation.ex: We had a dictation in English class today.
dictation.exCn: 今天英语课上我们做了一次听写。

dictionary.root: dict- 说 + -ionary 名词后缀 → 收录词语的书
dictionary.ex: Look up the word in the dictionary.
dictionary.exCn: 在词典里查一下这个词。

die.ex: The flowers will die without water.

diet.ex: She is on a diet to lose weight.

differ.root: dif- 分开 + fer- 带来 → 带来不同

difference.root: differ + -ence 名词后缀 → 不同之处
difference.ex: Can you tell the difference between them?
difference.exCn: 你能分辨出它们的区别吗？

different.root: differ + -ent 形容词后缀 → 不同的

differentiate.root: different + -iate 动词后缀 → 区分
differentiate.ex: It is hard to differentiate the two twins.

difficult.root: dis- 不 + fac- 做 + -ult 形容词后缀 → 不容易做的

difficulty.root: difficult + -y 名词后缀 → 困难
difficulty.ex: He had difficulty finishing the work.
difficulty.exCn: 他完成这项工作有困难。

diffuse.root: dif- 分开 + fuse- 流 → 散开、扩散
diffuse.ex: The light diffused through the fog.

dig.ex: The dog is digging a hole in the yard.
dig.exCn: 那只狗正在院子里挖洞。

digest.root: di- 分开 + gest- 携带 → 分解吸收（食物或信息）
digest.ex: It takes time to digest this book.

digital.root: digit- 手指、数字 + -al 形容词后缀 → 数字的

dignity.root: dign=值得，-ity名词后缀，表示“值得尊敬的状态”
dignity.ex: She faced the failure with dignity.

dilemma.root: di=两个，lemma=假设，字面“两个假设之间”，进退两难
dilemma.ex: He is in a dilemma about which job to take.
dilemma.exCn: 他对于接受哪份工作感到进退两难。

diligent.root: dilig=选择，-ent形容词后缀，字面“认真选择的”→勤奋的
diligent.ex: She is a diligent student who studies every night.
diligent.exCn: 她是个勤奋的学生，每晚都学习。

dilute.root: di=分开，lute=冲洗，字面“冲洗分开”→稀释
dilute.ex: You should dilute the juice with water.

dim.root: 联想：昏暗的光线让视线“低”（dim）
dim.ex: The room was too dim to read.

dimension.root: di=通过，mens=测量，-ion名词后缀，字面“测量出的范围”→维度
dimension.ex: We need to consider the time dimension.
dimension.exCn: 我们需要考虑时间维度。

diminish.root: di=向下，min=小，-ish动词后缀，字面“使变小”→减少
diminish.ex: The pain will diminish over time.

dine.root: 联想：dinner的动词形式，指正式用餐
dine.ex: We dine at a nice restaurant tonight.
dine.exCn: 我们今晚在一家不错的餐厅用餐。

dinner.root: dine的名词形式，指正餐或晚餐
dinner.ex: She cooked a big dinner for her family.
dinner.exCn: 她为家人做了一顿丰盛的晚餐。

dip.root: 联想：把东西“滴”一下浸入液体
dip.ex: He dipped his bread into the soup.

diploma.root: diplo=折叠，-ma名词后缀，原指折叠的文件→文凭
diploma.ex: She received her diploma after four years.

diplomatic.root: diploma的形容词形式，原指“文凭相关的”→引申为外交的
diplomatic.ex: He gave a diplomatic answer to avoid conflict.
diplomatic.exCn: 他给出了一个外交式的回答以避免冲突。

direct.root: di=通过，rect=引导，字面“引导通过”→直接/指导
direct.ex: Can you direct me to the station?
direct.exCn: 你能指给我去车站的路吗？

direction.root: direct的名词形式，表示方向或指导
direction.ex: She walked in the opposite direction.

directly.root: direct的副词形式，表示直接地

director.ex: The director gave clear instructions to the team.
director.exCn: 导演给了团队清晰的指示。

directory.root: direct（指导）+ory（场所/物）→ 指引方向的东西
directory.ex: I found his number in the phone directory.
directory.exCn: 我在电话簿里找到了他的号码。

dirt.ex: His shoes were covered in dirt.

dirty.root: dirt（泥土）+y（形容词后缀）→ 脏的
dirty.ex: The kitchen floor was really dirty.

disable.ex: The accident disabled him for life.
disable.exCn: 那次事故使他终身残疾。

disappear.root: dis（否定/离开）+appear（出现）→ 消失
disappear.ex: The cat disappeared into the bushes.

disappoint.root: dis（否定）+appoint（任命/使满意）→ 使失望
disappoint.ex: I hate to disappoint you, but it’s true.
disappoint.exCn: 我不想让你失望，但这是真的。

disaster.root: dis（坏）+aster（星星）→ 星位不好→灾难
disaster.ex: The earthquake was a terrible disaster.
disaster.exCn: 这场地震是一场可怕的灾难。

disastrous.root: disaster（灾难）+ous（形容词后缀）→ 灾难性的
disastrous.exCn: 这个决定带来了灾难性的后果。

disc.ex: He slipped a disc in his back.

discard.root: dis（去掉）+card（卡片）→ 扔掉卡片→丢弃
discard.exCn: 请丢弃任何损坏的物品。

discharge.root: dis（去掉）+charge（电荷/职责）→ 放电/解雇
discharge.ex: The hospital will discharge him tomorrow.

discipline.root: 联想：disciple（门徒）+ine→ 门徒的规矩→纪律

disclose.ex: He refused to disclose the source.

discount.root: dis-（否定/分离）+ count（计算）→ 不算进去 → 打折/不重视
discount.ex: The store offered a 20% discount on all items.
discount.exCn: 这家商店对所有商品打八折。

discourage.root: dis-（否定）+ courage（勇气）→ 让勇气消失 → 使气馁
discourage.ex: Don't let one failure discourage you.
discourage.exCn: 别让一次失败就让你气馁。

discourse.root: dis-（分开）+ course（跑/流）→ 思想流动 → 论述/演讲
discourse.ex: The professor gave a long discourse on history.
discourse.exCn: 教授做了一场关于历史的长篇论述。

discover.root: dis-（否定）+ cover（覆盖）→ 去掉覆盖 → 发现
discover.ex: Scientists hope to discover a new planet.
discover.exCn: 科学家希望能发现一颗新行星。

discovery.root: discover（发现）+ y（名词后缀）→ 发现的事物
discovery.ex: The discovery changed the way we think.
discovery.exCn: 这个发现改变了我们的思维方式。

discreet.root: dis-（分开）+ creet（分辨）→ 能分辨场合 → 谨慎的
discreet.ex: He was discreet about the secret plan.
discreet.exCn: 他对这个秘密计划很谨慎。

discrepancy.root: dis-（分开）+ crep（嘎吱声/差异）+ ancy（名词后缀）→ 不一致
discrepancy.ex: There is a discrepancy in the two reports.
discrepancy.exCn: 这两份报告之间存在差异。

discriminate.root: dis-（分开）+ crimin（区分）+ ate（动词后缀）→ 区分对待
discriminate.ex: It is wrong to discriminate against anyone.
discriminate.exCn: 歧视任何人都是不对的。

discuss.root: dis-（分开）+ cuss（敲打）→ 把想法敲开 → 讨论
discuss.ex: Let's discuss the plan after lunch.
discuss.exCn: 我们午饭后讨论这个计划。

disease.root: dis-（否定）+ ease（舒适）→ 不舒适 → 疾病
disease.ex: The disease spread quickly in the city.
disease.exCn: 这种疾病在城里迅速传播。

disgrace.root: dis-（否定）+ grace（优雅/恩典）→ 失去体面 → 耻辱
disgrace.ex: His actions brought disgrace to the team.
disgrace.exCn: 他的行为给团队带来了耻辱。

disguise.root: dis-（否定）+ guise（外表/样子）→ 改变外表 → 伪装
disguise.ex: She wore a hat to disguise herself.
disguise.exCn: 她戴了顶帽子来伪装自己。

disgust.root: dis-（否定）+ gust（味道/喜好）→ 味道不好 → 厌恶
disgust.ex: The smell filled him with disgust.

dish.root: （无常见词根联想，直接记忆：盘子/菜肴）
dish.ex: She washed every dish after dinner.
dish.exCn: 晚饭后她洗了每一个盘子。

dislike.root: dis-（否定）+ like（喜欢）→ 不喜欢
dislike.ex: I dislike getting up early on weekends.

dismay.root: dis-(否定)+may(可能)→不可能的事让人沮丧
dismay.ex: The news filled him with dismay.

dismiss.ex: She dismissed the idea as silly.
dismiss.exCn: 她认为这个想法很傻，不予考虑。

disorder.root: dis-(否定)+order(秩序)→没有秩序，混乱
disorder.ex: The room was in complete disorder.

displace.exCn: 大坝迫使许多家庭搬迁。

display.exCn: 他骄傲地展示他的奖章。

disposal.ex: Waste disposal is a big problem.

disposition.root: dis-(分开)+posit(放置)+ion(名词)→性格倾向

dispute.root: dis-(分开)+pute(思考)→想法不同，争论

disrupt.root: dis-(分开)+rupt(打破)→打破正常状态

distance.root: di-(分开)+st(站立)+ance(名词)→站开一段距离

distant.root: dis-（分开）+ st（站立）→ 分开站着 → 遥远的
distant.ex: She could hear the distant sound of waves.
distant.exCn: 她能听见远处海浪的声音。

distill.root: dis-（向下）+ still（滴）→ 向下滴 → 蒸馏
distill.ex: The process distills seawater into fresh water.
distill.exCn: 这个过程将海水蒸馏成淡水。

distinct.root: dis-（分开）+ stinct（刺）→ 分开刺出 → 明显的
distinct.ex: There is a distinct difference between the two.
distinct.exCn: 两者之间有明显的区别。

distinction.root: 源自 distinct，-ion 表名词 → 区分、差别
distinction.ex: He earned the distinction of top student.
distinction.exCn: 他获得了优等生的殊荣。

distinguish.root: dis-（分开）+ sting（刺）+ -uish → 分开刺出 → 区分
distinguish.ex: Can you distinguish the two colors?
distinguish.exCn: 你能区分这两种颜色吗？

distort.root: dis-（离开）+ tort（扭曲）→ 扭曲离开原状 → 歪曲
distort.exCn: 这面镜子扭曲了你的倒影。

distract.root: dis-（离开）+ tract（拉）→ 把注意力拉走 → 分心
distract.ex: Don't let your phone distract you.
distract.exCn: 别让手机分散你的注意力。

distress.root: dis-（加强）+ stress（压力）→ 压力很大 → 痛苦
distress.ex: The news caused her great distress.
distress.exCn: 那则消息让她非常痛苦。

distribute.root: dis-（分开）+ tribute（给予）→ 分给 → 分配
distribute.ex: They distribute food to the poor.

district.root: dis-（分开）+ strict（拉紧）→ 被分开拉紧的区域 → 地区
district.ex: She lives in a quiet district.
district.exCn: 她住在一个安静的街区。

disturb.root: dis-（加强）+ turb（搅动）→ 搅乱 → 打扰
disturb.ex: Please don't disturb me while I work.

disturbance.root: 源自 disturb，-ance 表名词 → 干扰、骚乱
disturbance.ex: The loud noise caused a disturbance.
disturbance.exCn: 巨大的噪音引起了一阵骚乱。

ditch.ex: The car slid into a ditch.

dive.ex: He decided to dive into the pool.

diverse.root: di-（分开）+ verse（转）→ 转向不同的方向 → 多样的
diverse.ex: The city has a diverse population.
diverse.exCn: 这座城市有多样化的人口。

diversion.root: di-（分开）+ vers（转）→ 转开 → 转向、消遣
diversion.ex: Reading is a good diversion from work.
diversion.exCn: 阅读是工作中很好的消遣。

divert.root: di-（分开）+ vert（转）→ 使转向
divert.ex: The police diverted traffic to avoid an accident.
divert.exCn: 警察疏导交通以避免事故。

divide.root: di-（分开）+ vid（分开）→ 分割
divide.ex: The river divides the city into two parts.
divide.exCn: 这条河把城市分成两部分。

dividend.root: divid（分）+ end（名词后缀）→ 分得的东西 → 红利
dividend.ex: The company paid a high dividend to its shareholders.
dividend.exCn: 这家公司向股东支付了高额股息。

divine.root: div（神）+ ine（形容词后缀）→ 神的 → 神圣的
divine.exCn: 她有一副天籁般的嗓音。

division.root: divis（分开）+ ion（名词后缀）→ 分开的行为 → 部门
division.ex: He works in the sales division.

divorce.root: di-（分开）+ vorce（转）→ 分开 → 离婚
divorce.ex: They decided to get a divorce.

dizzy.ex: The spinning ride made me feel dizzy.
dizzy.exCn: 旋转的游乐设施让我感到头晕。

do.ex: What do you want to do today?

dock.ex: The ship will dock at the port tomorrow.
dock.exCn: 这艘船将于明天停靠港口。

doctor.root: doc（教）→ 有学问的人 → 医生/博士
doctor.ex: You should see a doctor about that cough.
doctor.exCn: 你应该去看看医生，治一下咳嗽。

doctorate.root: doctor（博士）+ ate（名词后缀）→ 博士学位
doctorate.ex: She earned her doctorate in economics.
doctorate.exCn: 她获得了经济学博士学位。

document.root: doc（教/记录）+ ment（名词后缀）→ 记录下来的东西 → 文件

documentary.root: document（文件/记录）+ ary（形容词/名词后缀）→ 记录性的 → 纪录片
documentary.ex: We watched a documentary about polar bears.
documentary.exCn: 我们看了一部关于北极熊的纪录片。

dog.ex: My dog loves to play in the park.
dog.exCn: 我的狗喜欢在公园里玩耍。

doll.ex: The girl played with her favorite doll.
doll.exCn: 女孩玩着她最喜欢的娃娃。

dollar.root: 空字符串（doll+ar，但无常见词根）
dollar.ex: She paid ten dollars for the book.
dollar.exCn: 她花了十美元买这本书。

domain.root: dom（统治）+ain（名词后缀）→统治的区域
domain.ex: This topic is outside my domain of knowledge.
domain.exCn: 这个话题超出了我的知识领域。

dome.ex: The building has a large glass dome.
dome.exCn: 这座建筑有一个巨大的玻璃圆顶。

domestic.ex: The domestic cat slept on the sofa.

dominant.root: domin（统治）+ant（形容词后缀）→统治的
dominant.ex: He played a dominant role in the team.
dominant.exCn: 他在团队中扮演了主导角色。

dominate.ex: The big company dominates the market.
dominate.exCn: 这家大公司主导了市场。

donate.ex: He decided to donate money to the school.

donkey.ex: The donkey carried heavy bags up the hill.

doom.root: 空字符串（古英语词源，无常见词根）
doom.ex: The team felt a sense of doom before the game.
doom.exCn: 比赛前球队感到一种厄运感。

door.root: 空字符串（基础名词，无词根）
door.ex: Please close the door when you leave.

doorway.ex: She stood in the doorway waiting for him.

dorm.ex: She lives in a dorm near the campus.
dorm.exCn: 她住在校园附近的宿舍里。

dose.root: 空字符串（来自希腊语，无常见词根）
dose.ex: Take one dose of medicine after dinner.

dot.root: 空字符串（基础名词，无词根）
dot.ex: Put a dot at the end of the sentence.

doubt.root: dou(b)=double双倍，怀疑就是心里有两个声音
doubt.ex: I doubt he will come on time.

dove.ex: A white dove flew across the sky.

down.ex: She sat down on the chair.

downstairs.ex: He ran downstairs to answer the door.

downtown.root: down(下)+town(城镇)=市中心(往下走就到闹市区)
downtown.ex: Let's go downtown for dinner tonight.
downtown.exCn: 今晚我们去市中心吃晚饭吧。

downward.ex: The plane began its downward descent.

doze.ex: I dozed off during the movie.

dozen.root: doze(打盹)+n? 其实来自古法语douzaine(十二个)，硬记吧

draft.root: draft=草稿，像画图时先画个框架
draft.ex: He wrote the first draft of his essay.

drag.ex: She had to drag the heavy suitcase.
drag.exCn: 她不得不拖着沉重的行李箱。

dragon.root: 来自希腊语drakon(龙)，联想：drag(拖)+on(继续)=龙拖着长尾巴
dragon.ex: The dragon breathed fire in the story.

drain.root: drain=排干，像水从下水道流走
drain.ex: The sink drain is clogged again.

dramatic.ex: The movie had a dramatic ending.
dramatic.exCn: 这部电影有一个戏剧性的结局。

drastic.ex: They took drastic measures to fix it.
drastic.exCn: 他们采取了严厉的措施来修复它。

draw.root: 拉丁语 trahere '拉' → draw '拉、画'
draw.ex: She can draw a horse in five minutes.
draw.exCn: 她能在五分钟内画一匹马。

drawback.root: draw + back → 向后拉 → 缺点
drawback.ex: The only drawback is the high price.
drawback.exCn: 唯一的缺点是价格太高。

drawer.root: draw + er → 用来拉的东西 → 抽屉
drawer.ex: The keys are in the top drawer.
drawer.exCn: 钥匙在最上面的抽屉里。

drawing.root: draw + ing → 画的动作或结果
drawing.ex: He is good at drawing and painting.

dread.root: 古英语 ondrædan '恐惧' → 极度害怕
dread.ex: I dread going to the dentist.

dream.root: 古英语 drēam '喜悦、声音' → 梦、梦想
dream.ex: She dreams of becoming a writer.

dress.root: 古法语 drecier '安排' → 穿衣、连衣裙
dress.ex: She wore a beautiful red dress.
dress.exCn: 她穿了一条漂亮的红裙子。

drift.root: 古英语 drīfan '驱动' → 漂流、漂移
drift.ex: The boat began to drift away.

drill.root: 中古荷兰语 drillen '旋转' → 钻头、训练
drill.ex: We had a fire drill this morning.
drill.exCn: 今天早上我们进行了消防演习。

drink.ex: Would you like something to drink?

drip.ex: The tap is dripping all night.

drive.root: 古英语 drīfan '赶、驱动' → 开车、驱赶
drive.ex: Can you drive me to the station?
drive.exCn: 你能开车送我去车站吗？

driver.ex: The bus driver waved at us.
driver.exCn: 公交车司机向我们挥手。

drop.root: 古英语 dropa '一滴' → 滴、落下
drop.ex: Please drop me a message later.

drought.root: 古英语 drūgath '干燥' → 干旱
drought.ex: The crops died because of the drought.

drown.root: 源自古英语 druncnian，与“下沉”相关
drown.ex: He nearly drowned in the river.

drug.ex: She was accused of selling drugs.

drunk.root: 来自 drink 的过去分词，指饮酒过量
drunk.ex: He got drunk at the party.

dry.root: 古英语 dryge，与“脱水”相关

dubious.root: 拉丁语 dubius（怀疑），-ous 表示“充满”

duck.ex: A duck swam across the lake.

due.root: 拉丁语 debere（欠），引申为“到期”

dull.root: 古英语 dol（愚蠢），引申为“迟钝”
dull.ex: The knife is too dull to cut.

dumb.root: 古英语 dumb（沉默），引申为“笨”

dump.root: 拟声词，模仿重物落下声

duplicate.root: 拉丁语 duplicare（加倍），du-表示“二”

durable.root: 拉丁语 durare（持续），-able 表示“能”

duration.root: 拉丁语 durare（持续），-tion 表名词
duration.ex: The storm lasted for a short duration.
duration.exCn: 暴风雨持续了很短的时间。

during.root: 拉丁语 durus（持续），-ing 表进行

dusk.root: 与dust（灰尘）形似，黄昏时阳光照出空气中灰尘
dusk.ex: The park is beautiful at dusk.

dust.root: 与dusk形似，灰尘在黄昏光线下可见

duty.root: du-（二）+ty，对自己和他人都有责任
duty.ex: It is my duty to help you.

dwarf.root: d（地）+warf（变形warf→war），矮人像地上战士
dwarf.ex: The dwarf stood beside the giant.

dwell.ex: They dwell in a small village.
dwell.exCn: 他们住在一个小村庄里。

dwelling.ex: Their dwelling is made of wood.
dwelling.exCn: 他们的住所是木头建的。

dye.root: 与die（死）形似，染色让衣服‘死’得好看
dye.ex: She used red dye for the cloth.

dynamic.exCn: 她有个充满活力的性格。

dynasty.root: dyna（力量）+sty（地方），有力量统治的家族
dynasty.ex: The Ming dynasty ruled for centuries.

eager.ex: He is eager to learn English.

eagle.root: 与eager（渴望）形似，鹰渴望捕猎
eagle.ex: An eagle flew over the mountain.

early.root: ear（耳）+ly，早起听到第一声鸟鸣
early.ex: She wakes up early every day.

earn.root: 与learn（学习）差一个l，先学习才能赚钱
earn.ex: He works hard to earn money.

earnest.root: earnest 可拆为 earn（赚取）+est（最），但联想为“最值得认真赚取的东西”→认真、诚挚
earnest.ex: She made an earnest effort to improve her grades.
earnest.exCn: 她为提升成绩做出了认真的努力。

earth.root: ear（耳朵）+th（名词后缀），想象“大地在倾听万物”→地球
earth.ex: The earth orbits the sun once a year.
earth.exCn: 地球每年绕太阳公转一次。

earthquake.ex: The earthquake shook the entire city.

ease.root: ease 与 easy 同源，联想“easy 去掉 y 加 e”→轻松
ease.ex: He solved the problem with ease.
ease.exCn: 他轻松地解决了那个问题。

east.root: east 可联想“太阳从东（E）方升起（ast）”→东方
east.ex: The sun rises in the east.

easter.root: Easter 来自古英语 ēastre（春天女神），与 east 同源→复活节
easter.ex: We celebrate Easter with chocolate eggs.
easter.exCn: 我们用巧克力蛋庆祝复活节。

eastern.root: east（东方）+ern（形容词后缀）→东方的

easy.root: easy 来自 ease（轻松）的形容词形式→容易的
easy.ex: This test is too easy for me.
easy.exCn: 这个测试对我来说太容易了。

eat.root: eat 拟声词，模仿咀嚼声→吃
eat.ex: I eat breakfast at seven every day.

ebb.root: ebb 与 ebb tide（退潮）相关，联想“E 字形像退去的波浪”→衰退
ebb.ex: His energy began to ebb after the long run.
ebb.exCn: 长跑后他的精力开始衰退。

eccentric.root: ec（向外）+centr（中心）+ic（形容词）→偏离中心→古怪的
eccentric.ex: He has an eccentric sense of humor.
eccentric.exCn: 他有一种古怪的幽默感。

echo.root: echo 拟声词，模仿声音回荡→回声
echo.ex: Her voice echoed in the empty hall.
echo.exCn: 她的声音在空荡的大厅里回荡。

eclipse.root: ec（向外）+lipse（离开）→太阳或月亮“离开”视线→日/月食
eclipse.ex: A solar eclipse occurs when the moon blocks the sun.
eclipse.exCn: 当月球挡住太阳时，就会发生日食。

ecology.root: eco（家/环境）+logy（学科）→研究“家”的学科→生态学
ecology.ex: Ecology studies how living things interact with their environment.
ecology.exCn: 生态学研究生物如何与环境相互作用。

economic.root: eco（家）+nom（管理）+ic（形容词）→管理家庭资源的→经济的
economic.ex: The country is facing an economic crisis.
economic.exCn: 这个国家正面临经济危机。

economical.root: eco-（家、环境）+nom（管理）→ 管理家庭开支 → 节约的
economical.ex: Buying in bulk is more economical.

economics.root: eco-（家）+nom（管理）+ics（学科）→ 管理家庭的学问 → 经济学
economics.ex: She is studying economics in college.

economy.root: eco-（家）+nom（管理）+y（名词）→ 管理家庭的体系 → 经济

edge.ex: She has an edge in the competition.

edit.root: e-（出）+dit（给）→ 给出成品 → 编辑
edit.ex: Please edit this article before printing.
edit.exCn: 请打印前编辑这篇文章。

edition.root: edit（编辑）+ion（名词）→ 编辑后的版本 → 版本
edition.ex: This is the latest edition of the book.

editor.ex: He works as an editor at a newspaper.

editorial.root: editor（编辑）+ial（形容词）→ 编辑的，社论的
editorial.ex: The editorial criticizes the new policy.
editorial.exCn: 这篇社论批评了新政策。

educate.root: e-（出）+duc（引导）+ate（动词）→ 引导出知识 → 教育
educate.ex: We must educate children about safety.
educate.exCn: 我们必须教育孩子注意安全。

education.ex: Education is the key to success.

effect.root: ef-（出）+fect（做）→ 做出来的结果 → 效果
effect.ex: The medicine had a good effect.

effective.root: effect（效果）+ive（形容词）→ 有效果的

efficiency.root: ef-（出）+fic（做）+iency（名词）→ 做事的产出率 → 效率
efficiency.ex: We need to improve work efficiency.
efficiency.exCn: 我们需要提高工作效率。

efficient.root: ef-（出）+fic（做）+ient（形容词）→ 能高效做事的
efficient.exCn: 她是个工作效率高的员工。

effort.root: ef-（向外）+ fort（力量）→ 使出力量
effort.ex: She made a great effort to finish the work.
effort.exCn: 她付出很大努力完成了工作。

egg.ex: I had two eggs for breakfast.

ego.ex: He has a big ego and never listens.
ego.exCn: 他自我意识很强，从不听别人意见。

eight.ex: There are eight students in the room.

eighteen.ex: She is eighteen years old this year.

eighty.ex: My grandfather is eighty years old.

eject.root: e-（向外）+ ject（投掷）→ 向外扔
eject.ex: The pilot ejected from the plane.
eject.exCn: 飞行员从飞机中弹射出来。

elaborate.root: e-（出）+ labor（劳动）+ ate（动词后缀）→ 辛苦做出来

elapse.root: e-（出）+ lapse（滑落）→ 时间滑走
elapse.ex: Three years have elapsed since then.

elbow.root: el-（弯曲）+ bow（弓形）→ 弯曲的弓形部位
elbow.ex: He rested his elbow on the table.

elder.ex: My elder brother is a teacher.

elect.root: e-（出）+ lect（选择）→ 选出来

electric.ex: An electric car uses batteries, not gasoline.
electric.exCn: 电动车使用电池，而不是汽油。

electrical.root: electr-（电）+ -ical（形容词后缀，与…相关的）
electrical.ex: He works as an electrical engineer.

electrician.ex: The electrician fixed the broken wire.
electrician.exCn: 电工修好了断掉的电线。

electricity.ex: Without electricity, the city goes dark.
electricity.exCn: 没有电，城市会陷入黑暗。

electron.ex: An electron is a tiny particle with negative charge.
electron.exCn: 电子是一种带负电荷的微小粒子。

electronic.ex: She reads books on an electronic device.
electronic.exCn: 她在电子设备上阅读书籍。

elegant.root: e-（向外）+ leg（选择）+ -ant（形容词后缀）→ 精心挑选出的 → 优雅的
elegant.ex: She wore an elegant black dress.
elegant.exCn: 她穿了一条优雅的黑色连衣裙。

element.ex: Water is made of the elements hydrogen and oxygen.
element.exCn: 水由氢元素和氧元素组成。

elementary.root: element（元素/基础）+ -ary（形容词后缀，…的）
elementary.ex: This is an elementary math problem.
elementary.exCn: 这是一个初级的数学问题。

elevate.root: e-（向上）+ lev（举起/变轻）+ -ate（动词后缀）
elevate.exCn: 运动有助于提升你的情绪。

elevator.root: e-（向上）+ lev（举起）+ -ator（名词后缀，…的器具）
elevator.ex: Take the elevator to the 10th floor.

eleven.ex: The game starts at eleven o'clock.

eligible.root: e-（向外）+ lig（选择）+ -ible（能…的）→ 能被选出来的 → 合格的
eligible.ex: Only citizens are eligible to vote.
eligible.exCn: 只有公民才有资格投票。

eliminate.root: e-（向外）+ limin（门槛/界限）+ -ate（动词后缀）→ 赶出门槛外 → 消除
eliminate.ex: We need to eliminate unnecessary costs.
eliminate.exCn: 我们需要消除不必要的开支。

elite.ex: Only the elite can attend this private club.
elite.exCn: 只有精英才能加入这个私人俱乐部。

eloquent.ex: She gave an eloquent speech at the ceremony.
eloquent.exCn: 她在典礼上发表了雄辩的演讲。

else.root: 与“其他”相关，无明确词根
else.ex: I don't want anything else right now.
else.exCn: 我现在不想要其他任何东西。

elsewhere.ex: You can find this book elsewhere in the store.
elsewhere.exCn: 你可以在商店其他地方找到这本书。

e-mail.ex: I will send you an e-mail tomorrow.
e-mail.exCn: 我明天会给你发一封电子邮件。

embark.ex: They embark on a new journey next week.
embark.exCn: 他们下周开始一段新旅程。

embarrass.ex: His question embarrassed her in front of everyone.
embarrass.exCn: 他的问题让她在众人面前尴尬。

embassy.root: em-（在）+bass（低）→大使馆地位高，但词根来自ambassador
embassy.ex: The embassy is located in the city center.

embed.ex: The journalist embedded himself with the troops.

embody.ex: Her actions embody the company's core values.
embody.exCn: 她的行为体现了公司的核心价值观。

embrace.root: em-（进入）+brace（手臂）→进入手臂→拥抱
embrace.ex: She embraced her friend warmly after years apart.
embrace.exCn: 多年分离后，她热情地拥抱了朋友。

emerge.root: e-（出）+merge（浸入）→从浸入中出来→浮现
emerge.ex: A new leader emerged from the crisis.
emerge.exCn: 一位新领袖从危机中浮现出来。

emergency.root: e-（出）+merge（浸入）+ency（名词后缀）→突然出现的情况→紧急

emigrate.ex: They plan to emigrate to Canada next year.
emigrate.exCn: 他们计划明年移民到加拿大。

eminent.ex: He is an eminent professor in his field.
eminent.exCn: 他是其领域内一位杰出的教授。

emit.root: e-（向外）+ mit（送）→ 向外送出 → 发出
emit.ex: The chimney emits smoke into the air.
emit.exCn: 烟囱向空气中排放烟雾。

emotion.root: e-（向外）+ mot（移动）+ ion → 情绪向外流露 → 情感
emotion.exCn: 她带着深厚的感情说话。

emperor.root: emper（命令，统治）+ or（人）→ 发号施令的人 → 皇帝
emperor.ex: The emperor ruled the vast empire.
emperor.exCn: 皇帝统治着辽阔的帝国。

emphasis.root: em-（在...里）+ phas（说）+ is → 在话语里强调 → 重点
emphasis.ex: He put great emphasis on discipline.

emphasize.root: emphasis（重点）+ ize（使）→ 使成为重点 → 强调
emphasize.ex: The teacher emphasized the key points.

empire.root: emper（统治）+ e → 统治的区域 → 帝国

empirical.root: em-（在...里）+ pir（试验）+ ical → 基于试验的 → 经验主义的
empirical.ex: We need empirical data to prove it.
empirical.exCn: 我们需要经验数据来证明它。

employ.root: em-（进入）+ ploy（折叠）→ 把某人纳入工作中 → 雇用
employ.exCn: 这家公司雇用了500名工人。

employee.root: employ（雇用）+ ee（被...的人）→ 被雇用的人 → 雇员
employee.exCn: 每位雇员都得到一笔奖金。

employer.root: employ（雇用）+ er（做...的人）→ 雇用别人的人 → 雇主

employment.root: employ（雇用）+ ment（名词后缀）→ 雇用状态 → 就业

enable.root: en-（使）+ able（能够）→ 使能够 → 启用

enclose.root: en-（进入）+ close（关闭）→ 关在里面 → 围住

enclosure.root: enclose（围住）+ ure（名词后缀）→ 围起来的东西 → 附件
enclosure.ex: I found the enclosure in the letter.

encounter.root: en-（进入）+ counter（对立）→ 进入对立状态 → 遭遇
encounter.ex: I encountered an old friend on the street.
encounter.exCn: 我在街上偶遇了一位老朋友。

encourage.root: en-（使）+ courage（勇气）→ 使有勇气 → 鼓励
encourage.ex: Teachers encourage students to ask questions.

encyclopedia.root: en-（在内）+ cycle（圆环）+ pedia（教育）→ 涵盖全面的教育 → 百科全书
encyclopedia.ex: He looked up the word in the encyclopedia.
encyclopedia.exCn: 他在百科全书中查了这个词。

end.ex: The movie ends with a happy scene.
end.exCn: 这部电影以幸福的场景结束。

endeavor.root: en-（使）+ deavor（义务）→ 尽义务去做 → 努力
endeavor.ex: She will endeavor to finish the project.
endeavor.exCn: 她会努力完成这个项目。

ending.root: end（结束）+ ing（名词后缀）→ 结尾
ending.ex: I love the happy ending of this story.
ending.exCn: 我喜欢这个故事幸福的结局。

endow.root: en-（使）+ dow（给予）→ 给予 → 赋予
endow.ex: Nature endowed her with a talent for music.
endow.exCn: 大自然赋予了她音乐天赋。

endurance.root: endure（忍受）+ ance（名词后缀）→ 忍耐力
endurance.ex: Running a marathon requires great endurance.
endurance.exCn: 跑马拉松需要极大的耐力。

endure.root: en-（使）+ dure（持续）→ 使持续下去 → 忍受
endure.ex: He had to endure the pain for hours.
endure.exCn: 他不得不忍受数小时的疼痛。

enemy.ex: The army fought against the enemy bravely.
enemy.exCn: 军队勇敢地与敌人作战。

energetic.root: energy（能量）+ etic（形容词后缀）→ 充满能量的
energetic.ex: The children are very energetic today.
energetic.exCn: 孩子们今天精力非常充沛。

energy.ex: We need more energy to run this machine.
energy.exCn: 我们需要更多能量来运行这台机器。

enforce.root: en-（使）+ force（力量）→ 使有力量 → 执行
enforce.ex: The police enforce traffic laws strictly.
enforce.exCn: 警察严格执行交通法规。

engage.root: en-（使）+ gage（承诺）→ 使承诺 → 参与
engage.ex: I like to engage in group discussions.

engagement.root: engage（参与）+ ment（名词后缀）→ 参与/订婚
engagement.ex: They announced their engagement last week.

engine.root: 源自拉丁语 ingenium（天赋），无常见词根拆分
engine.exCn: 这辆车的发动机需要修理。

engineer.ex: She works as a software engineer.

enhance.ex: Good sleep can enhance your memory.

enjoy.ex: I enjoy reading novels on weekends.

enlarge.ex: Click here to enlarge the image.

enlighten.ex: This book will enlighten your mind.
enlighten.exCn: 这本书会启迪你的思想。

enormous.root: e-（出）+ norm（标准）+ -ous（形容词后缀）
enormous.ex: They spent an enormous amount of money.

enough.root: 古英语 genog，无常见词根拆分
enough.ex: Do you have enough time to finish?
enough.exCn: 你有足够的时间完成吗？

enquire.ex: I need to enquire about the price.

enroll.ex: She decided to enroll in the course.

ensure.ex: Please ensure the door is locked.

entail.root: en-（使）+ tail（尾巴，引申为附带）
entail.ex: This job will entail long hours.
entail.exCn: 这份工作需要长时间工作。

enter.root: 源自拉丁语 intrare（进入），无常见词根拆分

enterprise.root: enter（进入）+prise（抓）= 进入抓住商机 → 企业/事业心
enterprise.ex: She showed great enterprise in starting her own business.
enterprise.exCn: 她在创办自己的企业时展现了极大的进取心。

entertain.root: enter（进入）+tain（拿住）= 拿住注意力 → 娱乐/招待
entertain.ex: He told jokes to entertain the guests.

entertainment.ex: Movies are a popular form of entertainment.
entertainment.exCn: 电影是一种流行的娱乐形式。

enthusiasm.root: en（进入）+thus（神）+iasm（状态）= 被神附体般的热情
enthusiasm.ex: Her enthusiasm for learning is contagious.
enthusiasm.exCn: 她对学习的热情很有感染力。

enthusiastic.ex: He is enthusiastic about the new project.

entire.root: en（进入）+tire（拉）= 全部拉进来 → 完整的
entire.ex: She spent the entire day studying.

entitle.root: en（使）+title（标题/权利）= 使有权/给标题
entitle.ex: This ticket entitles you to one free drink.
entitle.exCn: 这张票让你有权获得一杯免费饮料。

entity.root: ent（存在）+ity（名词后缀）= 存在物 → 实体
entity.ex: The company is a separate legal entity.
entity.exCn: 这家公司是一个独立的法律实体。

entrance.root: enter（进入）+ance（名词后缀）= 进入的地方/动作
entrance.ex: The main entrance is on the left.

entrepreneur.root: enter（进入）+pre（前）+neur（人）= 进入前沿的人 → 企业家
entrepreneur.ex: The entrepreneur launched a successful startup.
entrepreneur.exCn: 这位企业家创办了一家成功的初创公司。

entry.ex: She made an entry in her diary.

envelope.root: en（进入）+velop（包）= 包进去的东西 → 信封
envelope.ex: He sealed the envelope before mailing it.
envelope.exCn: 他在寄信前封好了信封。

environment.root: en（进入）+viron（转）+ment（名词）= 环绕在周围的东西 → 环境
environment.ex: We need to protect the natural environment.
environment.exCn: 我们需要保护自然环境。

envisage.root: en（使）+vis（看）+age（动作）= 使在眼前看到 → 设想
envisage.ex: I envisage a bright future for our team.
envisage.exCn: 我设想我们团队有一个光明的未来。

envy.root: en（进入）+vy（看）= 斜眼看 → 嫉妒
envy.ex: His success filled her with envy.
envy.exCn: 他的成功让她充满嫉妒。

epidemic.root: epi-（在…上）+ dem（人民）→ 在人民中间传播的 → 流行病
epidemic.ex: The city faced a serious flu epidemic last winter.
epidemic.exCn: 去年冬天这座城市面临了一场严重的流感疫情。

episode.root: epi-（在…上）+ eisodos（进入）→ 插进来的东西 → 一段情节
episode.ex: My favorite episode of this show is Season 2.
episode.exCn: 这部剧里我最喜欢的一集是第二季。

epoch.ex: We are living in a new epoch of technology.
epoch.exCn: 我们正生活在一个科技的新纪元。

equal.ex: All citizens are equal under the law.
equal.exCn: 法律面前所有公民一律平等。

equality.root: equal（相等的）+ -ity（名词后缀）→ 平等状态
equality.ex: They fought for racial equality in the 1960s.
equality.exCn: 他们在20世纪60年代为种族平等而战。

equation.root: equ-（相等）+ -ation（名词）→ 使相等的式子 → 方程
equation.ex: Solve this equation for x, please.

equator.root: equ-（相等）+ -ator（…的东西）→ 把地球等分的东西 → 赤道
equator.ex: The equator divides the Earth into two halves.

equip.root: skip-（船）→ 给船配齐装备 → 装备
equip.ex: We need to equip the team with better tools.
equip.exCn: 我们需要给团队配备更好的工具。

equipment.root: equip（装备）+ -ment（名词后缀）→ 装备的总称
equipment.ex: This gym has modern exercise equipment.
equipment.exCn: 这家健身房有现代化的锻炼器材。

equivalent.root: equi-（相等）+ val（价值）→ 价值相等的 → 等同物
equivalent.ex: One dollar is roughly equivalent to seven yuan.
equivalent.exCn: 一美元大约相当于七元人民币。

era.ex: The internet started a new era of communication.
era.exCn: 互联网开启了通信的新时代。

erase.root: e-（出）+ radere（刮）→ 刮掉 → 擦除
erase.ex: Please erase the whiteboard before the next class.
erase.exCn: 下节课前请把白板擦干净。

erect.root: e-（出）+ regere（引导）→ 使直立起来 → 竖立
erect.ex: They plan to erect a statue in the park.
erect.exCn: 他们计划在公园里竖立一座雕像。

erosion.root: e-（出）+ rodere（咬）→ 咬掉 → 侵蚀
erosion.ex: Wind and rain cause soil erosion over time.
erosion.exCn: 风和雨会随着时间造成土壤侵蚀。

erroneous.root: err（犯错）+ -oneous（形容词后缀）→ 错误的
erroneous.ex: His conclusion was based on erroneous data.
erroneous.exCn: 他的结论基于错误的数据。

error.root: err（漫游）+or（名词后缀）→ 漫游偏离正确方向 → 错误
error.ex: The report contains a serious error.
error.exCn: 这份报告包含一个严重错误。

erupt.root: e（向外）+rupt（打破）→ 向外打破 → 喷发
erupt.ex: The volcano could erupt at any time.
erupt.exCn: 这座火山随时可能喷发。

escalate.root: escal（梯子）+ate（动词后缀）→ 像上梯子一样逐步上升 → 升级
escalate.ex: The conflict began to escalate quickly.

escape.root: es（向外）+cap（抓）+e → 从抓捕中跑出去 → 逃脱
escape.ex: He managed to escape from the burning building.
escape.exCn: 他设法从燃烧的大楼中逃了出来。

escort.root: es（向外）+cort（纠正/引导）→ 引导出去 → 护送
escort.ex: The police will escort the VIP to the airport.
escort.exCn: 警察将护送这位贵宾到机场。

especially.root: e（加强）+special（特别的）+ly（副词后缀）→ 特别地 → 尤其

essay.root: es（向外）+say（说）→ 把想法说出来 → 文章
essay.ex: She wrote an essay about climate change.
essay.exCn: 她写了一篇关于气候变化的文章。

essence.root: es（向外）+sence（存在）→ 事物存在的核心 → 本质
essence.ex: The essence of her argument is simple.

essential.root: essence（本质）+ial（形容词后缀）→ 本质的 → 必要的
essential.exCn: 水对生命来说是必不可少的。

establish.root: e（加强）+st（站立）+abl（能够）+ish（动词后缀）→ 使稳固站立 → 建立
establish.ex: They plan to establish a new company.
establish.exCn: 他们计划建立一家新公司。

establishment.root: establish（建立）+ment（名词后缀）→ 建立的行为或机构 → 建立/机构
establishment.ex: The establishment of the school took two years.
establishment.exCn: 这所学校的建立花了两年时间。

estate.root: e（向外）+stat（站立）+e → 站立在外的东西 → 地产
estate.ex: He inherited a large estate from his uncle.
estate.exCn: 他从叔叔那里继承了一大笔地产。

esteem.root: e（加强）+steem（估计/价值）→ 对价值的认可 → 尊重
esteem.ex: She is held in high esteem by her colleagues.

estimate.root: e（向外）+stim（价值）+ate（动词后缀）→ 对价值进行判断 → 估计
estimate.ex: Can you estimate the cost of the project?
estimate.exCn: 你能估计一下这个项目的成本吗？

eternal.root: e（向外）+tern（时间）+al（形容词后缀）→ 超出时间限制 → 永恒的
eternal.ex: They promised eternal love to each other.
eternal.exCn: 他们向彼此承诺了永恒的爱。

ethnic.root: ethn（民族）+ic（形容词后缀）→民族的
ethnic.ex: The city has a rich ethnic diversity.
ethnic.exCn: 这座城市拥有丰富的民族多样性。

evacuate.root: e（向外）+vac（空）+uate（动词后缀）→清空出去
evacuate.ex: Residents were told to evacuate immediately.

evade.ex: He tried to evade the question.

evaluate.ex: We need to evaluate the results carefully.
evaluate.exCn: 我们需要仔细评估结果。

evaporate.root: e（出）+vapor（蒸汽）+ate（动词）→变成蒸汽出来
evaporate.ex: The water will evaporate in the sun.

eve.ex: We held a party on New Year's Eve.
eve.exCn: 我们在新年前夜举办了一场派对。

even.ex: She even offered to help me.
even.exCn: 她甚至主动提出要帮我。

evening.ex: I usually read in the evening.

event.exCn: 这个活动吸引了很多参观者。

ever.ex: Have you ever been to Beijing?

every.root: ever（总是）+y（形容词后缀）→每一个的
every.ex: Every student must finish the homework.
every.exCn: 每个学生都必须完成作业。

everybody.exCn: 每个人都喜欢被感激的感觉。

everyday.ex: This is part of my everyday routine.
everyday.exCn: 这是我日常例程的一部分。

everyone.exCn: 每个人都值得第二次机会。

everything.ex: She packed everything she owned into one suitcase.
everything.exCn: 她把自己所有的东西都装进了一个手提箱。

everywhere.ex: I looked everywhere for my keys.

evidence.root: e（出）+ vid（看）+ ence（名词后缀）→ 看得见的东西 → 证据
evidence.ex: The police found evidence of a struggle.
evidence.exCn: 警方发现了搏斗的证据。

evident.root: e（出）+ vid（看）+ ent（形容词后缀）→ 看得出来的 → 明显的
evident.ex: It was evident that she was upset.

evil.ex: The story is about the battle between good and evil.
evil.exCn: 这个故事是关于善与恶的斗争。

evoke.root: e（出）+ vok（喊）+ e → 喊出来 → 唤起
evoke.ex: The song evokes memories of childhood.
evoke.exCn: 这首歌唤起了童年的回忆。

evolution.root: e（出）+ volut（转）+ ion（名词后缀）→ 转出来 → 进化
evolution.ex: The evolution of technology has changed our lives.
evolution.exCn: 技术的进化改变了我们的生活。

evolve.root: e（出）+ volv（转）+ e → 转出来 → 进化
evolve.exCn: 企业必须进化才能生存。

exact.root: ex（出）+ act（做）→ 做出来 → 精确的
exact.ex: Please tell me the exact time.

exaggerate.root: ex（出）+ ag（加强）+ ger（带）+ ate（动词后缀）→ 带过头 → 夸张
exaggerate.ex: Don't exaggerate; it wasn't that bad.

exam.root: ex（出）+ am（拿）→ 拿出能力 → 考试
exam.ex: The final exam is next week.

examine.root: ex（出）+ am（拿）+ ine（动词后缀）→ 拿出来仔细看 → 检查
examine.ex: The doctor examined the patient carefully.

example.root: ex（出）+ am（拿）+ ple → 拿出来的东西 → 例子
example.ex: Can you give me an example?

exceed.root: ex（出）+ ceed（走）→ 走出去 → 超过
exceed.ex: Do not exceed the speed limit.

exceedingly.root: exceed（超过）+ ingly（副词后缀）→ 超过地 → 极其

excel.root: ex-（向外）+ -cel（升起）→ 向外升起 → 突出、擅长
excel.ex: She excels in math and science.
excel.exCn: 她在数学和科学方面表现突出。

excellent.root: ex-（向外）+ -cell-（升起）+ -ent（形容词后缀）→ 升出去的 → 优秀的

except.root: ex-（向外）+ -cept（拿）→ 拿出去 → 排除、除了
except.exCn: 除了汤姆，所有人都来了。

exception.root: ex-（向外）+ -cept-（拿）+ -ion（名词后缀）→ 拿出去的东西 → 例外
exception.ex: There is no exception to this rule.

exceptional.root: ex-（向外）+ -cept-（拿）+ -ional（形容词后缀）→ 被拿出去的 → 例外的、特别的

excerpt.root: ex-（向外）+ -cerpt（摘取）→ 摘取出来 → 摘录、节选
excerpt.ex: He read an excerpt from the novel.
excerpt.exCn: 他读了小说的一段摘录。

excess.root: ex-（向外）+ -cess（走）→ 走出去 → 超过、过度

excessive.root: ex-（向外）+ -cess-（走）+ -ive（形容词后缀）→ 走出去的 → 过度的

exchange.root: ex-（相互）+ -change（改变）→ 互相改变 → 交换

excite.root: ex-（向外）+ -cite（召唤）→ 召唤出来 → 激发、使兴奋
excite.exCn: 这消息让每个人都兴奋。

excitement.root: ex-（向外）+ -cite-（召唤）+ -ment（名词后缀）→ 被召唤出来的状态 → 兴奋
excitement.ex: The game was full of excitement.

exciting.root: ex-（向外）+ -cite-（召唤）+ -ing（形容词后缀）→ 能召唤出情绪的 → 令人兴奋的
exciting.exCn: 这是一部令人兴奋的电影。

exclaim.root: ex-（向外）+ -claim（喊叫）→ 向外喊 → 呼喊、惊叫

exclude.root: ex-（向外）+ -clude（关闭）→ 关在外面 → 排除、拒绝
exclude.ex: They excluded him from the team.
exclude.exCn: 他们把他排除在队伍之外。

exclusive.root: ex-（向外）+ -clus-（关闭）+ -ive（形容词后缀）→ 关闭在外面的 → 排外的、独有的

excursion.root: ex-（向外）+ curs（跑）→ 跑出去 → 短途旅行
excursion.ex: We went on an excursion to the mountains.
excursion.exCn: 我们去山里进行了一次短途旅行。

excuse.root: ex-（向外）+ cause（原因）→ 给出理由 → 原谅/借口

execute.root: ex-（向外）+ secut（跟随）→ 跟着做到底 → 执行
execute.exCn: 这个计划被完美地执行了。

executive.root: execute（执行）的形容词形式，指执行的人或物
executive.ex: She works as an executive in a big company.
executive.exCn: 她在一家大公司担任高管。

exemplify.root: ex-（向外）+ empl（取，拿）→ 拿出来做例子 → 例示
exemplify.ex: This case exemplifies the problem we face.
exemplify.exCn: 这个案例例证了我们面临的问题。

exempt.root: ex-（向外）+ empt（拿）→ 被拿出去 → 免除
exempt.ex: Students are exempt from the fee.

exercise.root: ex-（向外）+ arc（围栏）→ 把马赶出围栏练跑 → 锻炼

exert.root: ex-（向外）+ ert（连接）→ 向外施加力量 → 施加
exert.ex: He exerted all his strength to lift it.
exert.exCn: 他用尽全力把它举起来。

exhaust.root: ex-（向外）+ haust（抽）→ 抽空 → 耗尽
exhaust.ex: The long run exhausted me completely.
exhaust.exCn: 长跑让我完全筋疲力尽了。

exhibit.root: ex-（向外）+ hibit（拿）→ 拿出来给人看 → 展出
exhibit.exCn: 这家博物馆展出古代艺术品。

exhibition.root: exhibit（展出）+ -ion（名词后缀）→ 展览
exhibition.ex: There is an art exhibition downtown.
exhibition.exCn: 市中心有一个艺术展览。

exile.root: ex-（向外）+ ile（坐）→ 被赶出去坐外面 → 流放
exile.ex: The writer lived in exile for years.

exist.root: ex-（向外）+ ist（站）→ 站出来 → 存在

existence.root: exist（存在）+ -ence（名词后缀）→ 存在状态
existence.ex: This law came into existence in 2020.

exit.root: ex-（向外）+ it（走）→ 走出去 → 出口

exotic.root: ex-（向外）+ -ot-（来自希腊语，意为“外来的”）→ 外来的
exotic.ex: She loves exotic flowers from tropical countries.
exotic.exCn: 她喜欢来自热带国家的外来花卉。

expand.root: ex-（向外）+ pand（展开）→ 向外展开
expand.ex: The company plans to expand its business.
expand.exCn: 这家公司计划扩大业务。

expansion.root: 来自expand，-ion是名词后缀→ 扩大，膨胀
expansion.ex: The expansion of the city is fast.

expect.root: ex-（向外）+ spect（看）→ 向外看→ 期待
expect.ex: I expect good news from you.

expectation.root: 来自expect，-ation是名词后缀→ 期待，期望
expectation.ex: His expectation is higher than before.
expectation.exCn: 他的期望比以前更高了。

expedition.root: ex-（向外）+ ped（脚）+ -ition（名词）→ 走出去→ 远征
expedition.ex: They went on an expedition to the Arctic.

expel.root: ex-（向外）+ pel（推）→ 推出去→ 开除，驱逐
expel.ex: The school decided to expel the student.
expel.exCn: 学校决定开除这名学生。

expend.root: ex-（向外）+ pend（称重，支付）→ 花出去→ 花费
expend.ex: Do not expend all your energy at once.
expend.exCn: 不要一次性耗尽你所有的精力。

expenditure.root: 来自expend，-iture是名词后缀→ 支出，花费
expenditure.ex: The government cut its expenditure on defense.

expense.root: ex-（向外）+ pense（称重，支付）→ 花费，费用
expense.ex: The expense of living in big cities is high.
expense.exCn: 在大城市生活的费用很高。

expensive.root: 来自expense，-ive是形容词后缀→ 昂贵的
expensive.ex: This watch is too expensive for me.
expensive.exCn: 这块表对我来说太贵了。

experience.root: ex-（完全）+ peri（尝试）+ -ence（名词）→ 完全尝试过→ 经验，经历
experience.ex: She has much experience in teaching English.
experience.exCn: 她在教英语方面有很多经验。

experiment.root: ex-（完全）+ peri（尝试）+ -ment（名词）→ 尝试→ 实验
experiment.ex: They did an experiment in the lab.
experiment.exCn: 他们在实验室做了个实验。

experimental.root: 来自experiment，-al是形容词后缀→ 实验性的

expert.root: ex-（完全）+ per（尝试，经验）→ 有完全经验的人→ 专家
expert.ex: He is an expert in computer science.
expert.exCn: 他是计算机科学领域的专家。

expertise.root: expert（专家）+ -ise（名词后缀）→ 专家具备的能力
expertise.ex: Her expertise in marketing is widely recognized.
expertise.exCn: 她在市场营销方面的专业知识广受认可。

expire.root: ex（出）+ spire（呼吸）→ 呼出最后一口气 → 到期
expire.ex: Your passport will expire next month.

explain.root: ex（向外）+ plain（平坦）→ 把事情摊平 → 解释
explain.ex: Can you explain this rule to me?
explain.exCn: 你能向我解释这条规则吗？

explanation.root: 来自 explain，-ation 是名词后缀
explanation.ex: He gave a clear explanation of the plan.
explanation.exCn: 他对计划给出了清晰的解释。

explicit.root: ex（向外）+ plic（折叠）+ it → 把折叠的打开 → 明确的
explicit.ex: She gave explicit instructions for the task.
explicit.exCn: 她给出了明确的任务指示。

explode.root: ex（向外）+ plod（爆炸声拟声）→ 向外爆开
explode.ex: The bomb could explode at any moment.

exploit.root: ex（向外）+ ploit（折叠）→ 把隐藏的翻出来用 → 利用
exploit.ex: They tried to exploit the new market.
exploit.exCn: 他们试图开拓这个新市场。

explore.root: ex（向外）+ plore（喊叫）→ 为了发现而呼喊 → 探索
explore.ex: We plan to explore the ancient ruins.
explore.exCn: 我们计划探索这些古代遗址。

explosion.root: 来自 explode，-sion 是名词后缀
explosion.ex: The explosion was heard miles away.
explosion.exCn: 爆炸声在几英里外都能听到。

explosive.root: 来自 explode，-sive 是形容词后缀
explosive.exCn: 局势极其危险，一触即发。

export.root: ex（向外）+ port（搬运）→ 搬运出去 → 出口
export.ex: This country exports a lot of oil.
export.exCn: 这个国家出口大量石油。

expose.root: ex（向外）+ pose（放置）→ 放在外面 → 暴露
expose.ex: Don't expose the film to sunlight.
expose.exCn: 不要把胶卷暴露在阳光下。

exposure.root: 来自 expose，-ure 是名词后缀
exposure.ex: Too much exposure to the sun is harmful.
exposure.exCn: 过度暴露在阳光下有害健康。

express.root: ex（向外）+ press（挤压）→ 把想法挤出来 → 表达
express.ex: She can express herself clearly in English.
express.exCn: 她能清晰地用英语表达自己。

expression.root: 来自 express，-ion 是名词后缀
expression.ex: His expression showed he was surprised.
expression.exCn: 他的表情表明他很惊讶。

exquisite.root: ex-（出）+ quisit（寻求/问）→ 反复寻求出来的 → 精致的
exquisite.ex: She wore an exquisite silk dress.
exquisite.exCn: 她穿了一件精致的丝绸连衣裙。

extend.root: ex-（向外）+ tend（伸展）→ 向外伸展

extension.root: extend（伸展）+ -ion（名词后缀）→ 伸展的结果
extension.ex: We built an extension to the house.
extension.exCn: 我们给房子建了一个扩建部分。

extensive.root: extend（伸展）+ -ive（形容词后缀）→ 伸展得很开的
extensive.ex: He has extensive knowledge of history.

extent.root: ex-（出）+ tent（伸展）→ 伸展出去的范围

exterior.root: ex-（外）+ terior（比较级后缀）→ 更外面的
exterior.ex: The exterior of the building is white.
exterior.exCn: 这座建筑的外墙是白色的。

external.root: ex-（外）+ ternal（形容词后缀）→ 外部的
external.ex: This is for external use only.

extinct.root: ex-（出）+ stinct（刺/熄灭）→ 被刺灭的 → 灭绝的

extinguish.root: ex-（出）+ stinguish（熄灭）→ 把火弄出去

extra.root: ex-（出）+ tra（超出）→ 超出常规的

extraordinary.root: extra（超出）+ ordinary（普通的）→ 超出普通的

extravagant.root: extra（超出）+ vag（漫游）+ ant（形容词后缀）→ 游荡出格的 → 奢侈的
extravagant.exCn: 她买了一份奢侈的礼物。

extreme.root: ex-（出）+ treme（极端的）→ 走到极限的

eyebrow.ex: She raised one eyebrow in surprise.
eyebrow.exCn: 她惊讶地挑起一边眉毛。

fable.ex: This fable teaches us to be honest.
fable.exCn: 这则寓言教导我们要诚实。

fabric.ex: The fabric of this dress is soft.
fabric.exCn: 这条裙子的布料很柔软。

fabricate.ex: He fabricated an excuse for being late.
fabricate.exCn: 他编造了一个迟到的借口。

fabulous.ex: We had a fabulous time at the party.
fabulous.exCn: 我们在派对上玩得非常愉快。

face.ex: She faced the challenge with courage.

facilitate.ex: This app will facilitate your learning.
facilitate.exCn: 这个应用会方便你的学习。

facility.ex: The sports facility is open to everyone.
facility.exCn: 这个体育设施对所有人开放。

fact.ex: It's a fact that the earth is round.
fact.exCn: 地球是圆的，这是一个事实。

factor.ex: Cost is a major factor in our decision.
factor.exCn: 成本是我们做决定的主要因素。

factory.exCn: 这家工厂生产汽车零件。

faculty.ex: She is a member of the faculty.
faculty.exCn: 她是教职员工中的一员。

fail.ex: Don't fail to lock the door.

failure.ex: His first attempt ended in failure.
failure.exCn: 他的第一次尝试以失败告终。

faint.root: 源自拉丁语 fingere（假装），后转为“虚弱”义
faint.ex: She felt faint from the heat.
faint.exCn: 她因高温感到头晕虚弱。

fair.root: 古英语 fæger（美丽的，公正的）

fairy.root: 源自拉丁语 fata（命运女神）
fairy.ex: The fairy flew into the forest.

faith.ex: She has faith in her plan.
faith.exCn: 她对自己的计划有信心。

faithful.ex: The dog was faithful to its owner.

fake.ex: He used a fake ID card.

false.root: 源自拉丁语 falsus（欺骗的）

familiar.root: family（家庭）相关，表示“像家人一样熟悉”
familiar.ex: This street looks familiar to me.
familiar.exCn: 这条街看起来我很熟悉。

fan.ex: He is a big fan of this singer.
fan.exCn: 他是这位歌手的忠实粉丝。

fancy.ex: She fancies a cup of tea now.

fantastic.ex: We had a fantastic time at the party.
fantastic.exCn: 我们在聚会上玩得非常开心。

fantasy.ex: He lives in a fantasy world.

far.ex: How far is it to the station?

fare.ex: The bus fare is two dollars.

farewell.ex: They said farewell to their friends.

farm.ex: They live on a small farm.
farm.exCn: 他们住在一个小农场里。

farther.ex: The store is farther than I thought.
farther.exCn: 那家商店比我想的更远。

fascinate.exCn: 这个故事让孩子们着迷。

fat.root: 无常见词根，联想：胖得像一坨 fat
fat.ex: She cut the fat off the meat.
fat.exCn: 她把肉上的肥肉切掉了。

fatal.root: 来自 fat（命运）+al，致命的即命运注定

fate.root: 拉丁语 fatum（神谕），命运不可违
fate.exCn: 他平静地接受了自己的命运。

father.root: 无常见词根，联想：fam（家庭）+ther（人），家里那位
father.ex: My father taught me to read.

fault.root: 拉丁语 fallere（欺骗），错误即偏离真相

faulty.ex: The machine has a faulty switch.
faulty.exCn: 这台机器有一个有故障的开关。

favor.root: 拉丁语 favere（支持），帮忙就是给面子
favor.ex: Could you do me a favor?

favorable.ex: The weather is favorable for sailing.

favorite.exCn: 巧克力是我最喜欢的零食。

fax.root: 来自 facsimile（传真），缩写为 fax
fax.ex: Please fax the document to me.

fear.root: 古英语 fær（危险），害怕源于危险
fear.ex: She has a fear of heights.

feasible.root: 来自拉丁语 facere（做），能做成的就是可行的
feasible.ex: Is it feasible to finish by Friday?

feast.root: 来自拉丁语 festa（节日），大吃一顿庆祝
feast.ex: We had a feast on New Year's Eve.
feast.exCn: 我们除夕夜吃了一顿大餐。

feat.root: 来自拉丁语facere“做”，与fact同源，指“做出的成就”
feat.ex: Climbing that mountain was a remarkable feat.
feat.exCn: 攀登那座山是一项了不起的壮举。

feather.root: 与古英语fether同源，像羽毛一样轻的东西
feather.ex: Birds use feathers to fly and stay warm.
feather.exCn: 鸟类用羽毛飞行和保暖。

feature.root: 来自拉丁语factura“制作”，指事物被制作出的特点
feature.ex: The new phone has a cool camera feature.
feature.exCn: 这款新手机有一个很酷的相机功能。

february.ex: My birthday is in February, the shortest month.
february.exCn: 我的生日在二月，最短的月份。

federal.root: 来自拉丁语foedus“盟约”，指联盟或中央政府
federal.ex: The federal government sets national laws.
federal.exCn: 联邦政府制定国家法律。

federation.root: feder（联盟）+ation（名词后缀），指联合体
federation.ex: The trade federation represents many small businesses.
federation.exCn: 该贸易联合会代表许多小企业。

fee.ex: You must pay a fee to enter the museum.
fee.exCn: 你必须付费才能进入博物馆。

feeble.root: 来自拉丁语flebilis“可哭泣的”，引申为虚弱的
feeble.ex: After the illness, he felt weak and feeble.

feed.ex: Please feed the cat twice a day.

feedback.root: feed（喂给）+back（回），字面“往回喂”，即反馈信息
feedback.ex: The teacher gave us helpful feedback on our essays.
feedback.exCn: 老师对我们的作文给出了有用的反馈。

feel.ex: I feel happy when I see my friends.
feel.exCn: 当我看到朋友时，我感到快乐。

feeling.ex: She had a strange feeling that someone was watching.
feeling.exCn: 她有一种奇怪的感觉，有人正在看着她。

fell.ex: He fell down and scraped his knee.

fellow.root: 来自古英语feolaga，feo（钱）+laga（伙伴），原指一起合伙出钱的人
fellow.ex: He is a kind fellow who always helps others.
fellow.exCn: 他是个善良的人，总是帮助别人。

fellowship.root: fellow（伙伴）+ship（状态），伙伴关系或奖学金
fellowship.ex: She won a fellowship to study abroad for a year.
fellowship.exCn: 她获得了一笔奖学金，可以出国学习一年。

female.ex: She was the first female pilot in her country.
female.exCn: 她是该国首位女飞行员。

feminine.root: femin（女性）+ine（形容词后缀）→女性的
feminine.ex: Her voice was soft and feminine.
feminine.exCn: 她的声音温柔而女性化。

fence.ex: The dog jumped over the wooden fence.

ferry.ex: We took the ferry across the river.

fertile.root: fer（带来）+tile（形容词后缀）→能带来果实的→肥沃的
fertile.ex: The soil here is very fertile.

fertilizer.ex: Farmers use fertilizer to help crops grow.
fertilizer.exCn: 农民使用肥料帮助庄稼生长。

festival.ex: We celebrate the Spring Festival every year.

fetch.root: 无常见词根，可记“f+etch（拿）”→去拿来
fetch.ex: The dog can fetch the ball.

feudal.root: feud（封地）+al（形容词后缀）→封建的
feudal.ex: Feudal society had kings and lords.
feudal.exCn: 封建社会有国王和领主。

fever.root: 无常见词根，联想“发（f）热（ever）”→发烧
fever.ex: He has a high fever and needs rest.

few.root: 无常见词根，直接记忆“少”
few.ex: Few people came to the meeting today.

fiber.ex: Eating more fiber is good for health.

fiction.ex: I enjoy reading science fiction novels.

field.root: 无常见词根，直接记忆“田地、领域”
field.ex: He works in the field of education.

fierce.root: 无常见词根，联想“fier（火）+ce”→像火一样猛烈
fierce.ex: The lion gave a fierce roar.
fierce.exCn: 狮子发出了凶猛的吼叫。

fifteen.root: five(五) + teen(十的变体) = 十五
fifteen.ex: There are fifteen students in the class.

fifty.root: five(五) + ty(十的变体) = 五十
fifty.ex: He is fifty years old now.

fight.ex: They fight for freedom every day.
fight.exCn: 他们每天都在为自由而战。

figure.root: 词根fig-塑造，-ure名词后缀→外形/数字
figure.ex: Can you figure out this problem?

file.root: 把文件“归档”就像把东西“排成一行”，file也有排队的意思
file.ex: Please file the report by Friday.
file.exCn: 请在周五前把报告归档。

fill.root: fill像“装满”的拟声，f开头的词常表流动/填充
fill.ex: Fill the glass with water, please.

film.root: film原指“薄膜”，胶片就是一层薄薄的感光膜
film.ex: We watched a great film last night.
film.exCn: 昨晚我们看了一部很棒的电影。

filter.root: filter来自拉丁语felt-“毡子”，古人用毡子过滤液体
filter.exCn: 这个滤水器需要更换了。

final.root: fin-词根=结束，-al形容词后缀→最终的

finance.root: fin-结束 + -ance名词后缀→结账→金融
finance.exCn: 他现在在金融行业工作。

find.root: find来自古英语findan，和“发现”的“发”发音相似

finding.root: find + -ing动名词→发现的结果/调查结论
finding.ex: The findings show a clear trend.
finding.exCn: 这些发现显示了一个明显的趋势。

fine.root: fine原义“完成得好”，引申为“好的、罚款(结案)”，双重含义

finger.root: fin-（结束、界限）+ -ger（名词后缀）→ 手指是肢体末端
finger.ex: She pointed her finger at the suspect.

finish.root: fin-（结束）+ -ish（动词后缀）→ 完成
finish.ex: I need to finish my homework tonight.

finite.root: fin-（界限）+ -ite（形容词后缀）→ 有限的

fire.ex: The fire spread quickly through the dry forest.
fire.exCn: 大火迅速蔓延过干燥的森林。

fireman.root: fire（火）+ man（人）→ 救火的人
fireman.ex: The fireman rescued the cat from the tree.
fireman.exCn: 消防员从树上救下了猫。

fireplace.root: fire（火）+ place（地方）→ 生火的地方
fireplace.ex: We sat by the fireplace to keep warm.

firm.ex: She held a firm grip on the rope.

first.ex: He was the first to arrive at the party.
first.exCn: 他是第一个到达派对的人。

fish.ex: I like to fish in the lake on weekends.
fish.exCn: 我喜欢周末在湖里钓鱼。

fisherman.root: fish（鱼）+ -er（人）+ man（人）→ 捕鱼的人
fisherman.ex: The fisherman caught a large salmon.
fisherman.exCn: 渔夫捕到了一条大鲑鱼。

fist.ex: He clenched his fist in anger.

fit.ex: This jacket doesn't fit me anymore.
fit.exCn: 这件夹克不再合我的身了。

fitting.root: fit（适合）+ -ing（形容词后缀）→ 适合的
fitting.ex: It was a fitting end to a great story.
fitting.exCn: 这是一个伟大故事的恰当结局。

five.ex: There are five apples on the table.

fix.ex: Can you fix my broken phone?
fix.exCn: 你能修好我坏掉的手机吗？

fixture.root: fix（固定）+ ture（名词后缀）→ 固定在某处的东西
fixture.ex: The lamp is a permanent fixture in the room.
fixture.exCn: 这盏灯是房间里的固定装置。

flag.ex: The flag waved in the wind.

flame.root: flam（火焰）→ 直接联想“火焰”

flare.root: fl（像火焰）+ are（动词后缀）→ 火焰突然变大

flash.ex: A flash of lightning lit up the sky.

flat.ex: The road is flat and straight.

flatter.root: flat（平坦）+ ter（动词后缀）→ 把话说平（让人舒服）→ 奉承

flavor.root: flav（味道）+ or（名词后缀）→ 风味
flavor.ex: This soup has a rich flavor.

flaw.ex: There is a flaw in the plan.

flee.ex: They had to flee the burning building.
flee.exCn: 他们不得不逃离着火的大楼。

fleet.ex: A fleet of ships sailed into the harbor.

flesh.ex: The wound cut deep into the flesh.

flexible.root: flex（弯曲）+ ible（能…的）→ 能弯曲的→ 灵活的
flexible.ex: She has a flexible work schedule.
flexible.exCn: 她有灵活的工作时间安排。

flight.ex: The flight was delayed by two hours.

fling.ex: She flung her bag onto the sofa.

float.ex: A leaf floated on the water.
float.exCn: 一片叶子漂浮在水面上。

flock.ex: A flock of birds flew overhead.

flood.ex: Heavy rain caused a flood in the city.

floor.ex: The book fell to the floor.

flour.ex: She used flour to make bread.

flourish.root: flour-（花）+ -ish（使）→ 像花一样盛开

flow.ex: The river flows slowly through the valley.

flu.root: flu- 表示“流动”，引申为“流感”
flu.ex: She caught the flu last week.

fluent.root: flu-（流动）+ -ent（形容词）→ 流畅的

fluid.root: flu-（流动）+ -id（名词/形容词）→ 流体

flush.ex: She flushed when she saw him.

foam.ex: The beer had a thick foam on top.
foam.exCn: 啤酒上面有一层厚厚的泡沫。

focus.root: 词根 foc（中心）→ focus 聚焦于中心
focus.ex: Please focus on your homework now.
focus.exCn: 请现在专注于你的作业。

fold.root: 词根 fold（折叠）→ 像折纸一样叠起来
fold.ex: She folded the letter and put it in an envelope.
fold.exCn: 她把信折好放进信封里。

folk.ex: Folk music is popular in this area.
folk.exCn: 民间音乐在这个地区很受欢迎。

follow.root: 词根 fol（跟随）→ follow 跟上
follow.ex: Please follow me to the meeting room.

following.root: follow（跟随）+ ing（形容词后缀）→ 接下来的
following.ex: He called me the following day.
following.exCn: 他在第二天给我打了电话。

fond.ex: She is fond of reading novels.

food.exCn: 这里的食物尝起来很棒。

fool.ex: Don't be a fool; think before you act.
fool.exCn: 别犯傻了，行动前先思考。

foolish.root: fool（傻瓜）+ ish（形容词后缀）→ 愚蠢的
foolish.ex: It was foolish to spend all the money.
foolish.exCn: 花光所有的钱是愚蠢的。

foot.ex: He hurt his foot while running.

forbid.root: for-（禁止）+ bid（命令）→ 禁止命令
forbid.ex: The school forbids students from using phones in class.
forbid.exCn: 学校禁止学生在课堂上使用手机。

force.ex: The wind was strong enough to force the door open.
force.exCn: 风大到足以把门强行吹开。

fore.ex: The ship's fore part was damaged in the storm.
fore.exCn: 船的船首部分在风暴中受损。

forecast.root: fore-（前面）+ cast（投掷）→ 提前投出（预测）
forecast.ex: The weather forecast says it will rain tomorrow.
forecast.exCn: 天气预报说明天会下雨。

forehead.ex: He wiped sweat from his forehead after running.
forehead.exCn: 他跑完后擦掉了额头上的汗。

foreign.ex: She studied foreign languages in college.

foreigner.root: foreign（外国的）+ er（人）→ 外国人
foreigner.ex: The foreigner asked for directions to the museum.
foreigner.exCn: 那个外国人问去博物馆的路。

foremost.root: fore-（前面）+ most（最）→ 最前面的
foremost.ex: Safety is the foremost concern in this project.
foremost.exCn: 安全是这个项目最首要的考虑。

foresee.root: fore-（前面）+ see（看见）→ 预见
foresee.ex: No one could foresee the sudden change in weather.
foresee.exCn: 没有人能预见到天气的突然变化。

forest.root: for-（外面）+ est → 外面的树林 → 森林
forest.ex: They went for a walk in the forest.

forever.root: for-（为了）+ ever（永远）→ 永远
forever.ex: This memory will stay with me forever.
forever.exCn: 这段记忆将永远留在我心中。

forge.ex: The blacksmith can forge a strong sword.
forge.exCn: 铁匠能锻造一把坚固的剑。

forget.root: for-（离开）+ get（得到）→ 从记忆中离开 → 忘记
forget.ex: Don't forget to lock the door before leaving.

forgive.root: for-（完全）+ give（给予）→ 完全给予（原谅）
forgive.ex: She decided to forgive him for the mistake.

fork.ex: Please use a fork to eat the salad.

form.root: 来自拉丁语 forma（形状、外观）

formal.root: form（形状）+ al（形容词后缀）= 形式的、正式的
formal.exCn: 我们需要一份正式协议。

format.root: form（形状）+ at（动词化）= 格式化、版式

formation.root: form（形状）+ ation（名词后缀）= 形成、构造
formation.ex: The formation of ice takes time.

former.root: form（形状）+ er（比较级）= 更早的形状 → 以前的

formidable.root: 来自拉丁语 formido（恐惧），令人害怕的 → 强大的

formula.root: form（形状）+ ula（小词后缀）= 小公式、配方

formulate.root: formula（公式）+ ate（动词后缀）= 制定、系统表达
