republic.root: public（公众）→ 公众的事 → 共和国

republican.root: republic（共和国）+ an（形容词后缀）→ 共和国的

reputation.root: re（反复）+ put（思考）+ ation（名词后缀）→ 反复被人思考的东西 → 名声
reputation.ex: She has a good reputation in the company.

request.root: re（再次）+ quest（询问）→ 再次询问 → 请求
request.ex: I made a request for help.

require.root: re（反复）+ quire（询问）→ 反复询问 → 需要

requirement.root: require（需要）+ ment（名词后缀）→ 需要的东西 → 要求
requirement.ex: English is a requirement for the exam.
requirement.exCn: 英语是考试的一项要求。

rescue.root: res（离开）+ cue（呼喊）→ 听到呼喊把人带走 → 营救
rescue.exCn: 消防员救出了那个孩子。

research.root: re（反复）+ search（寻找）→ 反复寻找 → 研究
research.ex: She is doing research on climate change.
research.exCn: 她在做气候变化的研究。

resemblance.root: re（再次）+ semble（相似）+ ance（名词后缀）→ 再次相似 → 相似之处
resemblance.ex: There is a strong resemblance between the twins.

resemble.root: re（再次）+ semble（相似）→ 再次相似 → 像
resemble.ex: He resembles his father very much.

resent.root: re（反）+ sent（感觉）→ 反过来感觉 → 怨恨

reservation.root: re（反复）+ serv（保留）+ ation（名词后缀）→ 保留的东西 → 预订/保留意见
reservation.ex: I made a reservation at the hotel.

reserve.root: re（反复）+ serve（保留）→ 保留起来 → 储备/预订
reserve.ex: Please reserve a table for two.

reservoir.root: reserve（储备）+ oir（地方）→ 储备水的地方 → 水库
reservoir.ex: The reservoir provides water for the city.

residence.root: re（反复）+ sid（坐）+ ence（名词后缀）→ 一直坐着的地方 → 住所
residence.ex: His residence is near the school.

resident.root: re-（反复）+ sid（坐）→ 反复坐在某地 → 居民
resident.ex: She is a resident of this city.

resign.root: re-（回）+ sign（签字）→ 签回辞职信 → 辞职
resign.ex: He decided to resign from his job.

resist.root: re-（反）+ sist（站立）→ 站在对立面 → 抵抗
resist.ex: She tried to resist the temptation.

resistance.root: resist（抵抗）+ ance（名词后缀）→ 抵抗的行为

resistant.root: resist（抵抗）+ ant（形容词后缀）→ 抵抗的

resolute.root: re-（加强）+ solute（松开）→ 坚决不松开 → 坚决的
resolute.ex: She remained resolute in her decision.
resolute.exCn: 她对自己的决定仍然坚定不移。

resolution.root: resolute（坚决的）+ ion（名词后缀）→ 决心
resolution.ex: He made a New Year's resolution.
resolution.exCn: 他制定了一个新年决心。

resolve.root: re-（再）+ solve（解决）→ 再解决 → 决心解决

resort.root: re-（再）+ sort（种类）→ 再去同类地方 → 度假胜地
resort.ex: We went to a beach resort.
resort.exCn: 我们去了一个海滩度假村。

resource.root: re-（再次）+ source（来源）→ 可反复使用的来源 → 资源

respect.root: re-（反复）+ spect（看）→ 反复看 → 尊重

respective.root: respect（尊重）+ ive（形容词后缀）→ 各自应得的 → 各自的
respective.ex: They went to their respective homes.

respond.root: re-（回）+ spond（承诺）→ 回应承诺 → 回应

response.root: respond（回应）去掉d + se（名词后缀）→ 回应
response.ex: I got no response from him.

responsibility.root: response（回应）+ ibility（能力名词）→ 能回应 → 责任
responsibility.ex: It's your responsibility to finish the work.

responsible.root: re-（回）+spons（承诺）+ible（能…的）→ 能回应承诺的 → 负责的
responsible.ex: She is responsible for the project.

rest.ex: Take a rest after the long walk.

restaurant.ex: We had dinner at a nice restaurant.
restaurant.exCn: 我们在一家不错的餐厅吃了晚餐。

restless.root: rest（休息）+less（无）→ 无法休息的 → 焦躁不安的
restless.ex: He felt restless before the exam.
restless.exCn: 考试前他感到焦躁不安。

restore.root: re-（回）+store（储存）→ 放回原处 → 恢复
restore.ex: They worked to restore the old building.
restore.exCn: 他们努力修复那座旧建筑。

restrain.root: re-（回）+strain（拉紧）→ 拉回来 → 克制
restrain.ex: She had to restrain her anger.
restrain.exCn: 她不得不克制自己的愤怒。

restraint.root: re-（回）+straint（拉紧，名词后缀）→ 克制的行为或状态
restraint.ex: He showed great restraint in the argument.
restraint.exCn: 他在争论中表现出极大的克制。

restrict.root: re-（回）+strict（拉紧）→ 拉紧限制 → 约束
restrict.ex: The new law restricts smoking in public.
restrict.exCn: 新法律限制在公共场所吸烟。

result.root: re-（回）+sult（跳）→ 跳回来的东西 → 结果
result.ex: The result of the test was good.

resultant.root: result（结果）+ant（形容词后缀）→ 作为结果的

resume.root: re-（重新）+sume（拿取）→ 重新拿起 → 恢复
resume.ex: Please resume your work after the break.

retail.root: re-（再次）+tail（切割）→ 再次切割 → 零售（分售）

retain.root: re-（回）+tain（保持）→ 保持住 → 保留
retain.ex: The company aims to retain its best employees.
retain.exCn: 公司旨在保留最优秀的员工。

retention.root: retain（保留）+tion（名词后缀）→ 保留的行为或能力
retention.ex: The retention of water is important for plants.

retire.root: re-（回）+tire（拉/离开）→ 拉回到后方 → 退休
retire.ex: My father plans to retire next year.

retort.root: re-(回) + tort(扭) → 扭回去 → 反驳
retort.exCn: 被指责时，她尖锐地反驳了。

retreat.root: re-(回) + treat(拉) → 拉回去 → 撤退
retreat.ex: The army retreated to safer ground.
retreat.exCn: 军队撤退到了更安全的地方。

retrieve.ex: He retrieved the lost file from the trash.
retrieve.exCn: 他从回收站找回了丢失的文件。

retrospect.root: retro-(向后) + spect(看) → 向后看 → 回顾
retrospect.ex: In retrospect, it was a mistake.

return.root: re-(回) + turn(转) → 转回来 → 返回
return.ex: She returned the book to the library.

reveal.root: re-(使) + veal(面纱) → 揭开面纱 → 揭示

revelation.root: 来自reveal(揭示) + -ation(名词后缀) → 被揭示的东西
revelation.exCn: 这个爆料震惊了所有人。

revenge.root: re-(回) + venge(报复) → 报复回来
revenge.ex: He sought revenge for the insult.
revenge.exCn: 他为那次侮辱寻求报复。

revenue.root: re-(回) + venue(来) → 收回来的钱 → 收入
revenue.ex: The company's revenue increased this year.
revenue.exCn: 公司今年的收入增长了。

reverse.root: re-(回) + verse(转) → 转回去 → 颠倒
reverse.ex: She reversed the car into the garage.

review.root: re-(再) + view(看) → 再看一遍 → 复习/评论
review.ex: He reviewed his notes before the exam.

revise.root: re-(再) + vise(看) → 再看一遍 → 修订
revise.ex: She revised her essay after feedback.
revise.exCn: 收到反馈后她修改了文章。

revive.root: re-(再) + vive(活) → 重新活过来 → 复活
revive.ex: Cold water revived the fainting man.
revive.exCn: 冷水让那个昏倒的人苏醒过来。

revolt.root: re-(反) + volt(转) → 转过来反抗 → 起义
revolt.ex: The people revolted against the king.

revolution.root: 来自revolt(起义) + -ution(名词后缀) → 革命
revolution.ex: The industrial revolution changed the world.

revolutionary.root: re-（回/再）+ volut（转）+ -ion + -ary → 转回来改变一切的
revolutionary.ex: The revolutionary idea changed the world.
revolutionary.exCn: 这个革命性的想法改变了世界。

revolve.root: re-（回/再）+ volve（转）→ 绕着转
revolve.ex: The earth revolves around the sun.

reward.root: re-（回）+ ward（看/注意）→ 回看你的付出
reward.ex: She got a reward for her hard work.
reward.exCn: 她因努力工作获得了奖励。

rhythm.ex: She tapped her foot to the rhythm.
rhythm.exCn: 她随着节奏用脚打拍子。

rib.ex: He broke a rib in the accident.
rib.exCn: 他在事故中折断了一根肋骨。

ribbon.ex: She tied a ribbon around the box.
ribbon.exCn: 她在盒子上系了一条丝带。

rice.ex: We eat rice almost every day.

rich.ex: The country is rich in natural resources.
rich.exCn: 这个国家自然资源丰富。

rid.ex: I want to get rid of this old chair.

ride.ex: She likes to ride her bike to work.

ridge.ex: The hikers walked along the mountain ridge.

ridiculous.root: rid（笑）+ ic + ulous（充满…的）→ 让人笑到无语

rifle.ex: He carried a rifle over his shoulder.

right.ex: Turn right at the next corner.

rigid.root: 词根 rig=硬，-id形容词后缀 → 硬邦邦的，死板
rigid.ex: The rules are rigid and leave no room for change.
rigid.exCn: 这些规则很死板，没有变通余地。

rigorous.root: 词根 rig=硬，-orous表“充满” → 严格到硬核
rigorous.ex: We need a rigorous training plan.
rigorous.exCn: 我们需要一个严格的训练计划。

rim.root: 联想：rim像戒指边缘（ring的一部分）
rim.ex: The glass has a gold rim.

ring.root: 词源同圆环，联想：戒指和铃声都叫ring
ring.ex: She wears a ring on her finger.
ring.exCn: 她手指上戴着一枚戒指。

riot.root: 联想：ri（跑）+ot（像乱动）→ 乱跑乱动就是暴乱
riot.ex: The protest turned into a riot.
riot.exCn: 抗议演变成了一场暴乱。

rip.ex: Be careful not to rip the paper.

ripe.root: 联想：rip（撕）+e → 水果熟了容易撕开皮
ripe.ex: The fruit is ripe and sweet.

risk.root: 联想：ris（rise）+k → 风险像上升的浪，随时翻船

ritual.root: 词根ritu=仪式，-al形容词/名词后缀
ritual.ex: Morning coffee is my daily ritual.
ritual.exCn: 早上喝咖啡是我每天的例行习惯。

rival.root: 词根riv=河岸，-al表人 → 在河两岸抢水的人就是对手
rival.ex: They are rivals for the same job.
rival.exCn: 他们是同一份工作的竞争对手。

river.ex: The river flows through the city.

road.root: 词源古英语rad=骑行之路，直接记
road.ex: This road leads to the station.

roar.ex: The lion let out a loud roar.

rob.root: 来自拉丁语 rapere '抢夺'，词根 rap- 变体
rob.ex: Someone tried to rob the bank last night.
rob.exCn: 昨晚有人试图抢劫银行。

robe.root: 来自拉丁语 rauba '衣服'，与 rob 同源但含义分化
robe.ex: She wore a silk robe over her pajamas.
robe.exCn: 她在睡衣外面穿了件丝绸长袍。

robot.root: 来自捷克语 robota '苦工'，词根表示'工作'
robot.ex: The robot can assemble a car in minutes.
robot.exCn: 这个机器人几分钟内就能组装一辆汽车。

robust.root: 来自拉丁语 robur '橡树'，象征强壮
robust.ex: He has a robust appetite after the workout.

rock.root: 源自古英语 rocc，拟声词，指石头滚动声
rock.ex: The kids threw rocks into the lake.

rocket.root: 来自意大利语 rocchetta '小纺锤'，因形状相似
rocket.ex: The rocket launched into space at dawn.
rocket.exCn: 火箭在黎明时发射升空。

rod.root: 源自古英语 rodd '杆子'，与辐射无关
rod.ex: He used a fishing rod by the river.

role.root: 来自拉丁语 rotula '小轮子'，原指卷轴上的角色
role.ex: Her role in the project was crucial.
role.exCn: 她在项目中的角色至关重要。

roll.root: 来自拉丁语 rotula '小轮子'，本义是滚动
roll.ex: The ball began to roll down the hill.

romance.root: 来自古法语 romanz '通俗语言'，原指用通俗语写的故事
romance.ex: They met in Paris and had a whirlwind romance.
romance.exCn: 他们在巴黎相遇，经历了一段旋风般的恋情。

romantic.root: 来自 romance，加 -ic 形容词后缀
romantic.ex: He planned a romantic dinner by candlelight.
romantic.exCn: 他安排了一顿烛光浪漫晚餐。

roof.root: 源自古英语 hrof '屋顶'，与覆盖有关
roof.ex: The rain leaked through the old roof.

room.root: 源自古英语 rum '空间'，与拉丁语 rus '乡村'同源
room.ex: There is enough room in the car for everyone.
room.exCn: 车里有足够空间容纳所有人。

root.root: 源自古英语 rot '根'，与拉丁语 radix '根'同源
root.ex: The tree's roots go deep into the soil.

rope.root: 源自古英语 rap '绳子'，与拉丁语 rapere '拉'有关
rope.ex: They tied the boat with a thick rope.
rope.exCn: 他们用一根粗绳子把船系好。

rose.ex: She gave me a red rose.

rot.root: 联想：rot 像 rat（老鼠）啃坏东西，腐烂
rot.ex: The wood will rot in the rain.

rotary.root: rot（旋转）+ary（形容词后缀）→ 旋转的
rotary.ex: He works at a rotary club.

rotate.root: rot（旋转）+ate（动词后缀）→ 旋转
rotate.ex: The Earth rotates once a day.

rotten.root: rot（腐烂）+en（形容词后缀）→ 腐烂的

rough.root: 联想：粗糙的（rough）像 rug（地毯）的表面

round.root: 联想：圆（round）像 sound（声音）一样环绕

roundabout.exCn: 我们走了一条绕远的路。

rouse.root: 联想：rouse 像 rise（起床），唤醒
rouse.ex: The noise roused me from sleep.
rouse.exCn: 噪音把我从睡梦中吵醒。

route.root: 联想：route 像 road（路），路线
route.ex: What's the best route to the station?
route.exCn: 去车站的最佳路线是什么？

routine.root: route（路线）+ine（名词后缀）→ 常规路线→ 例行公事
routine.ex: I follow the same routine every day.
routine.exCn: 我每天遵循同样的例行程序。

row.root: 联想：row（划船）像 arrow（箭）一样笔直前进
row.ex: They rowed the boat across the lake.

royal.root: 联想：royal（皇家的）像 loyal（忠诚的）对皇室
royal.ex: The royal family lives in a palace.

royalty.root: royal（皇家的）+ty（名词后缀）→ 皇室成员/版税
royalty.ex: The writer earns royalty from book sales.
royalty.exCn: 这位作家从书籍销售中赚取版税。

rub.root: 联想：rub（摩擦）像 rubber（橡胶）摩擦产生
rub.ex: Rub your hands together to warm them.

rubber.root: rub（摩擦）+er（表物）→用来摩擦的东西→橡皮
rubber.ex: She erased the pencil marks with a rubber.
rubber.exCn: 她用橡皮擦掉了铅笔痕迹。

rubbish.root: rub（擦）+bish（拟声，像擦碎屑的声音）→擦掉的碎屑→垃圾
rubbish.ex: Throw that old rubbish in the bin.
rubbish.exCn: 把那堆旧垃圾扔进垃圾桶。

ruby.root: rub（红色）+y（小称）→红色的小石头→红宝石
ruby.ex: She wore a ruby ring on her finger.
ruby.exCn: 她手指上戴着一枚红宝石戒指。

rude.ex: It is rude to interrupt others.

rug.root: ru（粗糙的）+g（拟物）→粗糙的地面覆盖物→小地毯
rug.ex: The cat is sleeping on the rug.

ruin.ex: The heavy rain ruined our picnic.

rule.ex: You must follow the school rules.

ruler.root: rule（规则）+r（表人/物）→制定规则的人/测量工具→统治者；尺子
ruler.ex: Use a ruler to draw a straight line.

rumor.root: rum（嗡嗡声）+or（表物）→人们嗡嗡议论的消息→谣言
rumor.ex: Don't believe that rumor about him.
rumor.exCn: 别相信关于他的那个谣言。

run.ex: I run every morning to stay fit.
run.exCn: 我每天早晨跑步保持健康。

rural.root: rur（乡村）+al（形容词后缀）→乡村的
rural.ex: They live in a quiet rural area.
rural.exCn: 他们住在安静的乡村地区。

rush.ex: Don't rush; we have plenty of time.

rust.ex: Old iron gates can rust in the rain.

ruthless.root: ruth（怜悯）+less（没有）→没有怜悯的→残忍的
ruthless.ex: The ruthless boss fired him without reason.
ruthless.exCn: 残忍的老板无故解雇了他。

sack.ex: He carried a sack of potatoes home.

sacred.root: sacr-（神圣）+ -ed（形容词后缀）→ 神圣的
sacred.ex: This temple is a sacred place.
sacred.exCn: 这座寺庙是一个神圣的地方。

sacrifice.root: sacr-（神圣）+ -i- + -fice（做）→ 为神圣而做 → 牺牲
sacrifice.ex: He made a big sacrifice for his family.
sacrifice.exCn: 他为家庭做出了巨大的牺牲。

sad.ex: She felt sad after hearing the news.
sad.exCn: 听到这个消息后，她感到难过。

saddle.ex: He put the saddle on the horse.
saddle.exCn: 他把马鞍放到了马背上。

safe.ex: Keep your money in a safe place.
safe.exCn: 把你的钱放在安全的地方。

safeguard.root: safe（安全）+ guard（保卫）→ 安全保障

safety.root: safe（安全）+ -ty（名词后缀）→ 安全
safety.ex: Safety is the top priority here.
safety.exCn: 安全是这里的首要任务。

sailor.ex: The sailor worked on a big ship.
sailor.exCn: 那个水手在一艘大船上工作。

saint.ex: He is known as a saint for his kindness.
saint.exCn: 他因善良而被视为圣人。

sake.ex: Do it for the sake of your health.
sake.exCn: 为了你的健康去做这件事。

salad.ex: I had a salad for lunch.

salary.root: sal-（盐）+ -ary（名词后缀）→ 古罗马士兵买盐的津贴 → 薪水
salary.ex: She got a raise in her salary.

sale.ex: The store is having a big sale.

salesman.root: sale（销售）+ man（人）→ 销售员
salesman.ex: The salesman helped me choose a phone.
salesman.exCn: 那个销售员帮我选了一部手机。

salt.root: 源自拉丁语sal（盐），与调味相关

salute.root: 源自拉丁语salutare（问候），与健康相关

salvation.root: 源自拉丁语salvare（拯救），salv-表拯救
salvation.ex: She found salvation in her faith.
salvation.exCn: 她在信仰中找到了救赎。

sample.root: 源自拉丁语exemplum（例子），sam-表例子
sample.ex: Can I try a sample of this?
sample.exCn: 我能试一下这个样品吗？

sanction.root: 源自拉丁语sanctio（法令），sanct-表神圣

sand.root: 源自原始日耳曼语*sandam（沙子）
sand.ex: The beach is covered in sand.

sandwich.root: 以三明治伯爵命名，sandwich伯爵的发明
sandwich.ex: I ate a chicken sandwich for lunch.
sandwich.exCn: 我午餐吃了一个鸡肉三明治。

sane.root: 源自拉丁语sanus（健康的），与心智健康相关

sarcastic.root: 源自希腊语sarkazein（撕咬肉），sarc-表讽刺
sarcastic.ex: Don't be so sarcastic with me.

satellite.root: 源自拉丁语satelles（随从），satell-表陪伴
satellite.exCn: 这颗卫星环绕地球运行。

satire.root: 源自拉丁语satura（混合盘），satur-表讽刺文学
satire.ex: The show is a political satire.
satire.exCn: 这部剧是一部政治讽刺作品。

satisfaction.root: 源自拉丁语satis（足够）+facere（做），表满足感

satisfactory.root: 源自satisfaction，-ory表形容词，令人满意的

satisfy.root: 源自拉丁语satis（足够）+facere（做），表满足

saturate.root: 词根 satur（满）+ ate（使）→ 使充满
saturate.ex: The market is saturated with cheap goods.
saturate.exCn: 市场上充斥着廉价商品。

saturday.root: 源自 Saturn（土星）+ day（日）→ 土星日

sauce.root: 与 salt（盐）同源，原指调味用的盐液
sauce.ex: She poured tomato sauce on the pasta.
sauce.exCn: 她把番茄酱浇在意大利面上。

saucer.root: sauce（酱汁）+ er（容器）→ 盛酱汁的小盘
saucer.ex: The cup sits on a small saucer.
saucer.exCn: 杯子放在一个小碟子上。

sausage.root: 源自拉丁语 salsus（加盐的）→ 腌制肉肠

savage.root: 源自拉丁语 silva（森林）→ 森林中的野人
savage.ex: The savage storm destroyed the village.
savage.exCn: 猛烈的暴风雨摧毁了村庄。

save.root: 词根 salv（安全）→ 使安全
save.ex: He saved money for a new car.

saving.root: save（节省）+ ing（动名词）→ 节省的行为
saving.ex: Saving energy helps protect the environment.
saving.exCn: 节约能源有助于保护环境。

saw.root: see（看见）的过去式，无单独词根
saw.ex: I saw him leave the office early.
saw.exCn: 我看见他早早离开了办公室。

say.ex: What did you say to her?

scale.root: 词根 scand（爬）→ 爬升用的梯子/刻度
scale.ex: We scaled the mountain in two days.
scale.exCn: 我们两天内攀登了那座山。

scan.root: 词根 scand（爬）→ 像爬一样逐行看
scan.ex: She scanned the list for her name.
scan.exCn: 她快速浏览名单找自己的名字。

scandal.root: 源自希腊语 skandalon（陷阱、绊脚石）→ 丑闻
scandal.ex: The scandal ruined his political career.
scandal.exCn: 那桩丑闻毁了他的政治生涯。

scar.root: 源自希腊语 eskhara（炉灶）→ 像火烧后的痕迹
scar.ex: The accident left a scar on his arm.
scar.exCn: 事故在他手臂上留下了一道疤痕。

scarce.root: 源自拉丁语 excerpere（摘出）→ 被摘走后变少
scarce.ex: Clean water is scarce in that region.
scarce.exCn: 那个地区清洁的水很稀缺。

scare.ex: Don't let the noise scare you.

scarf.exCn: 她围了一条暖和的围巾。

scatter.ex: The wind will scatter the leaves.

scent.root: sc(看)+ent→看得见的味道？其实是气味
scent.ex: I love the scent of flowers.

school.ex: I go to school every day.

science.exCn: 科学帮助我们理解自然。

scientist.ex: The scientist works in a lab.
scientist.exCn: 这位科学家在实验室工作。

scissors.root: sciss-（切割）+ -ors（工具）→ 切割工具

scold.root: 来自古北欧语 skald（诗人，后转义为责骂）
scold.ex: Don't scold him; he tried his best.

scope.ex: This problem is beyond my scope.
scope.exCn: 这个问题超出了我的能力范围。

score.root: 来自古英语 scoru（刻痕，与计数相关）
score.ex: What's your score on the test?

scorn.ex: She scorned his offer of help.
scorn.exCn: 她轻蔑地拒绝了他的帮助。

scout.root: 来自古法语 escouter（听）→ 侦察
scout.ex: He scouts for new talent every year.

scramble.ex: They scrambled up the rocky hill.
scramble.exCn: 他们手脚并用地爬上了岩石山丘。

scrap.root: 来自古北欧语 skrap（碎片）
scrap.ex: We need to scrap the old plan.

scrape.ex: He scraped the mud off his boots.

scream.ex: She screamed when she saw the mouse.
scream.exCn: 她看到老鼠时尖叫起来。

screen.root: 来自古法语 escren（屏障）→ 屏幕/筛选
screen.ex: Check your phone screen for updates.
screen.exCn: 查看手机屏幕上的更新。

screw.ex: Screw the lid back on tightly.

script.root: scrib-（写）+ -t（过去分词后缀）→ 写好的东西
script.ex: The actor forgot his script lines.

scrutiny.root: scrut-（检查）+ -iny（名词后缀）→ 仔细检查
scrutiny.ex: His work is under public scrutiny.
scrutiny.exCn: 他的工作受到公众的仔细审查。

sculpture.ex: The artist created a beautiful sculpture from marble.
sculpture.exCn: 这位艺术家用大理石创作了一件美丽的雕塑。

sea.ex: The sea was calm and blue this morning.
sea.exCn: 今天早上大海平静而湛蓝。

seal.root: seal=封口（联想：海豹趴在冰上封住洞口）
seal.ex: Please seal the envelope before mailing it.

seam.ex: The dress has a neat seam along the side.
seam.exCn: 这条裙子侧面有一条整齐的缝线。

search.ex: Police searched the house for clues.
search.exCn: 警察搜查了房子寻找线索。

seaside.ex: We spent the weekend at the seaside.
seaside.exCn: 我们在海边度过了周末。

season.root: season=季节（联想：sea+son，大海的儿子经历四季）
season.exCn: 秋天是我最喜欢的季节。

seat.ex: Please take a seat and wait.

second.ex: He finished second in the race.
second.exCn: 他在比赛中获得第二名。

secondary.ex: That is a secondary concern for now.

secret.ex: She told me a secret she had never shared.
secret.exCn: 她告诉了我一个从未说过的秘密。

secretary.ex: The secretary scheduled the meeting for Monday.
secretary.exCn: 秘书把会议安排在了周一。

section.ex: This section of the book is very interesting.
section.exCn: 书的这一部分非常有趣。

sector.root: sect+or（切割出的区域→部门/领域）
sector.ex: The tech sector is growing fast.
sector.exCn: 科技行业正在快速增长。

secure.ex: Make sure the door is secure before leaving.

security.root: secure（安全）+ity（名词后缀）→安全状态
security.ex: The security guard checked my ID.
security.exCn: 保安检查了我的身份证。

see.ex: I see a bird in the tree.

seed.root: see（看）+d→种子看得见？其实是‘播撒’的源头

seek.root: 谐音‘西克’→向西寻找（如探险）

seem.root: 谐音‘西姆’→看起来像某人（似）

seemingly.root: seem（似乎）+ingly（副词后缀）→表面上地

segment.root: seg（切）+ment（名词后缀）→切下来的部分

segregate.root: se（分开）+greg（群体）+ate（动词）→使脱离群体

seize.root: 谐音‘西子’→抓住西湖边的女子？实际是‘抓住’

seldom.root: 谐音‘蛇灯’→蛇很少点灯→很少

select.root: se（分开）+lect（挑选）→从一堆里挑出

selection.ex: The store has a big selection.

selfish.root: self（自己）+ish（形容词，带贬义）→只顾自己的

sell.ex: I want to sell my car.

semester.root: semi-（半）+ -ster（表时间），原指‘半年学期’
semester.ex: I have six courses this semester.

semiconductor.ex: Silicon is a common semiconductor material.
semiconductor.exCn: 硅是一种常见的半导体材料。

seminar.root: semin-（种子，引申为‘讨论播种思想’）
seminar.ex: We attended a marketing seminar yesterday.
seminar.exCn: 我们昨天参加了一个营销研讨会。

senate.ex: The Senate passed the new law.
senate.exCn: 参议院通过了这项新法律。

senator.ex: The senator gave a speech on education.
senator.exCn: 这位参议员就教育问题发表了演讲。

send.root: 无常见词根，联想‘送’的动作
send.ex: Please send me the report by email.
send.exCn: 请通过邮件把报告发给我。

senior.root: sen-（老）+ -ior（比较级后缀），即‘年长的’
senior.ex: She is a senior manager at the company.

sensation.ex: The news caused a great sensation.
sensation.exCn: 这条新闻引起了巨大的轰动。

sense.ex: He has a strong sense of responsibility.

sensible.root: sens-（感觉）+ -ible（能…的），即‘能感觉到的→明智的’

sensitive.root: sens-（感觉）+ -itive（形容词后缀），即‘敏感的’

sentence.root: sent-（感觉，引申为‘表达意见’→‘句子’）

sentiment.ex: Public sentiment has changed on this issue.
sentiment.exCn: 公众对这个问题的情绪发生了变化。

separate.root: se-（分开）+ par-（准备，引申为‘分开放置’）

september.root: septem-（七，原罗马历法中的七月）

sequence.root: sequ（跟随）+ence（名词后缀） → 一个接一个跟随 → 序列、顺序
sequence.ex: Please describe the sequence of events.
sequence.exCn: 请描述事件的先后顺序。

serial.root: ser（连接）+ial（形容词后缀）→ 连在一起的 → 连续的、系列的
serial.ex: This is a popular TV serial.
serial.exCn: 这是一部受欢迎的电视连续剧。

series.root: ser（连接）+ies（复数后缀）→ 一连串连接的东西 → 系列
series.ex: He watched a series of lectures.

serious.root: ser（严肃）+ious（形容词后缀）→ 严肃的、严重的

servant.root: serv（服务）+ant（人）→ 提供服务的人 → 仆人、雇员

serve.ex: She serves food at the restaurant.

service.root: serv（服务）+ice（名词后缀）→ 服务、维修

session.root: sess（坐）+ion（名词后缀）→ 坐下来一起做某事 → 会议、一段时间
session.ex: The training session starts at 9 am.

set.ex: Please set the table for dinner.

setback.root: set（放置）+back（向后）→ 向后放置 → 阻碍、挫折
setback.ex: The project faced a major setback.
setback.exCn: 这个项目遇到了重大挫折。

setting.root: set（放置）+ting（动名词）→ 放置的环境 → 背景、设置
setting.ex: The story has a beautiful setting.
setting.exCn: 这个故事有一个美丽的背景。

settle.root: set（放置）+tle（反复）→ 反复放置安定下来 → 解决、定居

settlement.root: settle（定居/解决）+ment（名词后缀）→ 定居点、解决
settlement.ex: They reached a settlement in court.
settlement.exCn: 他们在法庭上达成了和解。

seven.ex: There are seven days in a week.

several.root: sever（分开）+al（形容词后缀）→ 分开成多个 → 几个的、若干
several.ex: I have several books to read.

severe.root: sever（切断）+ e → 切断后变得严厉
severe.ex: The storm caused severe damage to the city.
severe.exCn: 这场风暴对城市造成了严重的破坏。

sew.ex: She can sew a button on her shirt.
sew.exCn: 她会把扣子缝到衬衫上。

sex.ex: The form asks for your name, age, and sex.
sex.exCn: 表格要求填写姓名、年龄和性别。

shabby.ex: He wore a shabby old coat to the interview.
shabby.exCn: 他穿着一件破旧的外套去面试。

shade.ex: Let's sit in the shade of that tree.
shade.exCn: 我们坐在那棵树的阴凉处吧。

shadow.ex: He saw a shadow moving behind the curtain.
shadow.exCn: 他看见窗帘后面有一个影子在动。

shady.ex: Be careful of that shady business deal.
shady.exCn: 小心那笔可疑的商业交易。

shaft.ex: The elevator shaft was dark and deep.

shake.ex: Please shake the bottle before use.

shall.ex: I shall call you tomorrow morning.
shall.exCn: 我明天早上会给你打电话。

shallow.root: shallow（浅的）→ 联想 shallow water 浅水区
shallow.ex: The river is too shallow for boats.
shallow.exCn: 这条河太浅了，船无法通行。

sham.ex: His apology was just a sham.
sham.exCn: 他的道歉只是假装出来的。

shame.root: shame（羞耻）→ 联想 ashamed 感到羞耻
shame.ex: It's a shame that you missed the party.

shampoo.ex: I need to buy some new shampoo today.
shampoo.exCn: 我今天需要买一些新的洗发水。

shape.ex: Regular exercise helps keep your body in shape.
shape.exCn: 定期锻炼有助于保持身材。

share.ex: She shared her lunch with me.
share.exCn: 她和我分享了她的午餐。

shark.root: 来源不明，可能来自德语‘Schurke’（恶棍）
shark.ex: A shark swam near the boat.
shark.exCn: 一条鲨鱼在船附近游动。

sharp.root: 词源同‘刮擦’，引申‘锋利的’
sharp.ex: Be careful, the knife is very sharp.

shatter.ex: The glass shattered on the floor.

shed.root: 词源同‘分离’，引申‘脱落、流出’

sheep.ex: A sheep is grazing in the field.

sheer.root: 词源同‘闪亮’，引申‘纯粹的、陡峭的’
sheer.ex: It was sheer luck that we won.

sheet.root: 词源同‘布片’，引申‘一张纸’
sheet.ex: Please hand me a sheet of paper.

shelf.root: 词源同‘木板’，放东西的平面
shelf.ex: Put the book back on the shelf.

shell.ex: The turtle hides inside its shell.

shelter.ex: We found shelter under a tree.
shelter.exCn: 我们在树下找到了遮蔽处。

shepherd.exCn: 牧羊人带领着他的羊群。

shield.root: sh-（保护）+ -ield（场域）→ 保护场域
shield.ex: He used his arm to shield his eyes from the sun.
shield.exCn: 他用胳膊挡住阳光以保护眼睛。

shift.root: sh-（移动）+ -ift（转移）→ 转移位置
shift.ex: She shifted her weight from one foot to the other.
shift.exCn: 她把重心从一只脚移到另一只脚。

shilling.ex: The old coin was a silver shilling from 1920.
shilling.exCn: 这枚旧硬币是1920年的银先令。

shine.ex: The sun began to shine through the clouds.
shine.exCn: 太阳开始透过云层照耀。

ship.ex: They loaded the cargo onto the ship.

shipment.ex: The shipment of books arrived yesterday.
shipment.exCn: 这批书的货运昨天到了。

shirt.ex: He wore a white shirt to the interview.
shirt.exCn: 他穿了一件白衬衫去面试。

shiver.ex: She began to shiver in the cold wind.

shock.ex: The news came as a complete shock to everyone.
shock.exCn: 这条消息让所有人都大为震惊。

shoe.ex: He tied his shoe before leaving the house.

shoot.ex: He aimed carefully before he shot the target.
shoot.exCn: 他仔细瞄准后才射击目标。

shop.ex: She went to the shop to buy some milk.
shop.exCn: 她去商店买了一些牛奶。

shopkeeper.root: shop（商店）+ keeper（看守者）→ 店主
shopkeeper.ex: The shopkeeper greeted us with a smile.

shore.ex: We walked along the shore at sunset.
shore.exCn: 我们在日落时分沿着海岸散步。

short.ex: The meeting was short but very productive.
short.exCn: 会议很短但非常富有成效。

shortage.root: short（短的）+ age（名词后缀）→ 短缺就是“短了那么一块”
shortage.ex: There is a severe water shortage in the area.

shortcoming.root: short（短）+ coming（来）→ 来得短了，即“缺点、不足”
shortcoming.ex: His biggest shortcoming is lack of patience.
shortcoming.exCn: 他最大的缺点是缺乏耐心。

shorthand.root: short（短）+ hand（手）→ 手写速记，缩写

shortly.root: short（短）+ ly（副词后缀）→ 时间短地

shot.root: shoot的过去式/名词，联想“射出一枪”
shot.ex: He took a shot at the target.

should.ex: You should study harder for the exam.
should.exCn: 你应该为考试更努力学习。

shoulder.root: should（应该）+ er（人/物）→ 肩膀是“该扛东西的部位”
shoulder.ex: He put his bag over his shoulder.

shout.root: sh（嘘声）+ out（出）→ 大声喊出来

shove.root: sh（推）+ ove（move移动）→ 用力推

show.root: sh（展示）+ ow（看）→ 展示出来给人看
show.ex: She showed me her new dress.
show.exCn: 她给我看了她的新裙子。

shower.root: show（展示）+ er（人或物）→“展示水的东西”→淋浴
shower.ex: I take a shower every morning.

shrewd.root: shrew（泼妇）+ d→ 泼妇通常“精明”
shrewd.exCn: 她是一位精明的女商人。

shrink.root: sh（收缩）+ rink（溜冰场）→ 溜冰场遇热会“缩小”
shrink.ex: The sweater shrank in the wash.

shrug.root: sh（耸肩）+ rug（地毯）→ 耸肩时像地毯皱起

shut.root: sh（关）+ ut（out）→ 把…关在外面

shutter.root: 源自“shut”（关闭）+-er（表物），即“用来关闭的东西”
shutter.ex: She closed the wooden shutters before the storm.
shutter.exCn: 她在暴风雨前关上了木制百叶窗。

shuttle.root: 源自古英语“scytel”（箭），像箭一样来回穿梭
shuttle.ex: A shuttle bus runs between the hotel and the airport.
shuttle.exCn: 一辆穿梭巴士往返于酒店和机场之间。

shy.root: 无常见词根，可联想“shy”像蛇（s）躲（h）起来（y）
shy.ex: He is too shy to speak in public.
shy.exCn: 他太害羞了，不敢在公共场合说话。

sick.root: 无常见词根，可联想“sick”像“si（死）+ck（咳）”病重咳嗽
sick.ex: She called in sick because she had a fever.
sick.exCn: 她打电话请病假，因为她发烧了。

side.root: 源自古英语“side”，本义就是“边、侧”
side.ex: The car parked on the side of the road.

sideways.root: side（边）+ways（方向），即“向旁边的方向”
sideways.ex: He glanced sideways at the stranger.
sideways.exCn: 他斜眼瞥了一下那个陌生人。

siege.root: 联想“siege”像“see（看）+ge（哥）”，被围困时只能看外面
siege.ex: The city was under siege for months.
siege.exCn: 这座城市被围困了数月之久。

sigh.root: 拟声词，模仿叹气时“嘶～”的声音
sigh.ex: She let out a deep sigh of relief.
sigh.exCn: 她如释重负地深深叹了口气。

sight.root: 源自“see”（看见），名词形式表示“视力、景象”
sight.ex: The sunset was a beautiful sight.
sight.exCn: 那日落是一幅美丽的景象。

sightseeing.ex: We spent the day sightseeing in Paris.
sightseeing.exCn: 我们在巴黎观光游览了一整天。

sign.ex: The sign on the door said 'Exit'.

signal.root: sign（标记）+-al（名词后缀），即“传递信息的标记”
signal.ex: He gave a signal to start the race.
signal.exCn: 他发出信号，示意比赛开始。

signature.root: sign（签）+nature（本质），即“签下自己的本质特征”
signature.ex: Please put your signature at the bottom.
signature.exCn: 请在底部签上你的名字。

significance.root: sign（标记）+ificance（表状态），即“有标记的重要状态”
significance.ex: This discovery has great significance for science.
significance.exCn: 这一发现对科学具有重大意义。

significant.root: sign（标记）+ificant（表“有…的”），即“有明显标记的”
significant.ex: There was a significant increase in sales.

silence.ex: He broke the silence with a cough.
silence.exCn: 他用一声咳嗽打破了沉默。

silent.root: sil（安静）+ent（形容词后缀）→安静的
silent.ex: She remained silent during the meeting.
silent.exCn: 她在会议期间保持沉默。

silicon.ex: Silicon is used in computer chips.

silk.ex: This dress is made of silk.

silly.ex: Don't be silly; it's just a joke.

similar.root: simil（相似）+ar（形容词后缀）→相似的

simple.ex: The instructions are simple to follow.

simplicity.ex: I like the simplicity of the design.
simplicity.exCn: 我喜欢这个设计的简洁性。

simplify.ex: We need to simplify the process.

simulate.root: simul（相似）+ate（动词后缀）→使相似→模拟
simulate.ex: The software can simulate real traffic.
simulate.exCn: 这个软件可以模拟真实交通。

sin.ex: He confessed his sins to the priest.
sin.exCn: 他向神父忏悔了自己的罪过。

sincere.root: sin（一起）+ cere（生长）→ 一起生长的，无虚假

sing.ex: She likes to sing in the shower.

single.root: sing（单）+ le（后缀）→ 单一的

singular.root: singul（单独）+ ar（形容词后缀）→ 单独的，非凡的

sip.ex: He took a sip of coffee.

situated.root: situ（位置）+ ate（动词后缀）+ d（过去分词）→ 位于…的
situated.ex: The hotel is situated near the beach.
situated.exCn: 这家酒店位于海滩附近。

situation.root: situ（位置）+ ation（名词后缀）→ 位置，处境

six.ex: There are six apples on the table.

size.root: 来自拉丁语 'assidere'（坐定），词根 sid/sess（坐）→ 坐定后量大小
size.ex: This shirt is the right size for you.
size.exCn: 这件衬衫尺码对你合适。

skate.ex: She loves to skate on the frozen lake.
skate.exCn: 她喜欢在结冰的湖面上滑冰。

skeleton.root: 希腊语 skeleton（干枯的身体），skel-（干）
skeleton.ex: The skeleton of the building is made of steel.
skeleton.exCn: 这栋建筑的骨架是钢制的。

skeptical.root: 希腊语 skeptesthai（仔细看），skept-（看）→ 不轻易信，要看看
skeptical.exCn: 我对他的借口持怀疑态度。

sketch.root: 意大利语 schizzo（速写），sk-（快速画）
sketch.ex: He drew a quick sketch of the house.
sketch.exCn: 他快速画了一张房子的草图。

ski.ex: We plan to ski in the mountains next week.
ski.exCn: 我们计划下周去山上滑雪。

skill.root: 古诺尔斯语 skil（区分、辨别）→ 能分辨就是本事
skill.ex: Practice is the key to improving a skill.
skill.exCn: 练习是提高技能的关键。

skillful.ex: The pianist gave a skillful performance.
skillful.exCn: 钢琴家进行了一场技艺精湛的表演。

skim.root: 来自中古英语 skimen（撇去浮沫），sk-（刮/撇）
skim.ex: Just skim the article for main points.
skim.exCn: 只要浏览文章找要点就行。

skin.ex: Sunlight is good for your skin.

skirt.root: 古英语 scirte（短上衣），sk-（覆盖）
skirt.ex: She wore a long skirt to the party.
skirt.exCn: 她穿了一条长裙去聚会。

skull.root: 古英语 scealu（壳）→ 脑壳

sky.root: 古挪威语 sky（云）→ 云所在的地方就是天空
sky.ex: The sky turned dark before the storm.

skyscraper.root: sky（天空）+scrape（刮擦）+er（物）→ 刮到天空的东西
skyscraper.ex: The view from the skyscraper was breathtaking.
skyscraper.exCn: 从摩天大楼看到的景色令人叹为观止。

slack.ex: Don't slack off; the deadline is tomorrow.
slack.exCn: 别偷懒，明天就是截止日期了。

slam.ex: He slammed the door in anger.
slam.exCn: 他愤怒地砰地关上了门。

slap.ex: She slapped him across the face.

slaughter.ex: The cattle were taken to slaughter.

slave.ex: He worked like a slave for low pay.
slave.exCn: 他像奴隶一样工作，报酬却很低。

sleep.ex: I need at least seven hours of sleep.
sleep.exCn: 我至少需要七小时的睡眠。

sleeve.ex: She rolled up her sleeves to work.

slice.ex: He cut the bread into thin slices.

slide.ex: The kids love to slide down the hill.
slide.exCn: 孩子们喜欢从山坡上滑下去。

slight.ex: There was a slight delay in the flight.

slim.ex: She is trying to stay slim.

slip.ex: Be careful not to slip on the wet floor.
slip.exCn: 小心别在湿滑的地板上滑倒。

slipper.root: slippery（滑的）→ 容易滑动的鞋子
slipper.ex: She wore soft slippers at home.
slipper.exCn: 她在家里穿着柔软的拖鞋。

slippery.root: slipp（滑）+ery（形容词后缀）→容易滑的
slippery.ex: The road is slippery after rain.

slit.ex: He cut a slit in the envelope.
slit.exCn: 他在信封上割了一道口子。

slope.ex: The slope is too steep to climb.
slope.exCn: 这个斜坡太陡了，爬不上去。

slot.root: s（细长）+lot（位置）→细长位置→狭缝
slot.ex: Put the coin in the slot.

slum.ex: They lived in a slum area.

smash.ex: He smashed the window with a rock.

smell.exCn: 我能闻到新鲜面包的味道。

smog.ex: The city is covered in smog.

smooth.ex: The road is smooth and easy to drive.
smooth.exCn: 这条路很平坦，容易驾驶。

smuggle.ex: They tried to smuggle drugs across the border.
smuggle.exCn: 他们试图走私毒品过境。

snack.ex: I had a quick snack before the meeting.
snack.exCn: 会议前我快速吃了点零食。

snake.ex: A snake slithered across the path.

snap.ex: The branch snapped under the heavy snow.

snatch.ex: He tried to snatch the bag from her hand.
snatch.exCn: 他试图从她手中抢走包。

sneak.ex: She tried to sneak out of the room quietly.

sneeze.ex: He sneezed loudly during the exam.
sneeze.exCn: 考试时他大声打了个喷嚏。

sniff.ex: The dog sniffed at the food suspiciously.

snow.ex: It started to snow heavily last night.

snowstorm.exCn: 暴风雪延误了所有航班。

so.ex: I was tired, so I went to bed early.
so.exCn: 我累了，所以早早上床睡觉了。

soak.ex: Let the beans soak in water overnight.
soak.exCn: 让豆子在水里浸泡一夜。

soap.ex: Wash your hands with soap and water.

soar.ex: The eagle soared high above the mountains.
soar.exCn: 鹰在群山之上高高翱翔。

sob.ex: She began to sob quietly in the corner.
sob.exCn: 她开始在角落里轻声抽泣。

sober.root: sober = 清醒的，联想“so（所以）+ber（不醉）”，所以清醒
sober.ex: He stayed sober during the whole party.
sober.exCn: 整个派对期间他都保持清醒。

so-called.root: so-called = 所谓的，so + called（被称为）
so-called.ex: Her so-called friend never helped her.
so-called.exCn: 她所谓的朋友从未帮过她。

soccer.ex: He plays soccer every Saturday morning.

sociable.root: soci（同伴）+able（能…的）= 好交际的
sociable.ex: She is very sociable and makes friends easily.
sociable.exCn: 她非常善于交际，容易交到朋友。

social.root: soci（同伴）+al（形容词）= 社会的
social.exCn: 社交媒体连接了世界各地的人。

socialism.root: social（社会的）+ism（主义）= 社会主义
socialism.ex: Socialism aims for fair distribution of wealth.
socialism.exCn: 社会主义旨在公平分配财富。

society.ex: Education plays a key role in modern society.
society.exCn: 教育在现代社会中扮演关键角色。

sociology.ex: She is studying sociology at university.
sociology.exCn: 她正在大学学习社会学。

sock.ex: He lost one sock in the laundry.
sock.exCn: 他在洗衣房丢了一只袜子。

soda.ex: I'd like a glass of soda with ice.
soda.exCn: 我想要一杯加冰的苏打水。

sofa.ex: They sat on the sofa watching TV.
sofa.exCn: 他们坐在沙发上看电视。

soft.ex: The cat's fur feels very soft.

software.ex: This software helps edit photos easily.
software.exCn: 这个软件帮助轻松编辑照片。

soil.ex: Farmers plow the soil before planting seeds.
soil.exCn: 农民在播种前翻耕土壤。

solar.ex: Solar energy is clean and renewable.
solar.exCn: 太阳能是清洁且可再生的。

sole.ex: He is the sole owner of the company.
sole.exCn: 他是这家公司的唯一所有者。

solid.ex: This table is made of solid wood.

solidarity.ex: The workers showed solidarity during the strike.
solidarity.exCn: 工人们在罢工期间展现了团结。

solitary.ex: He lives a solitary life in the mountains.
solitary.exCn: 他在山里过着独居生活。

solo.ex: She performed a beautiful piano solo.
solo.exCn: 她表演了一段优美的钢琴独奏。

solution.ex: We need to find a solution quickly.
solution.exCn: 我们需要尽快找到解决方案。

solve.ex: Can you solve this math problem?
solve.exCn: 你能解出这道数学题吗？

somebody.root: some- 某个 + body 身体/人
somebody.ex: Somebody is knocking at the door.

somehow.root: some- 某个 + how 方式
somehow.exCn: 我们总会想办法完成它。

sometime.exCn: 我们下周某个时候见吧。

sometimes.root: some（某个）+ times（次数）→ 有时

somewhat.root: some（某个）+ what（什么）→ 某种程度上

somewhere.exCn: 我把钥匙落在某个地方了。

son.ex: Her son is five years old.

sophisticated.root: soph（智慧）+ isticated → 复杂的/精密的
sophisticated.ex: She has a sophisticated taste in art.
sophisticated.exCn: 她对艺术有高雅的品味。

sophomore.root: soph（智慧）+ more（更多）→ 大二学生（自以为更有智慧）
sophomore.ex: He is a sophomore in college.
sophomore.exCn: 他是一名大学大二学生。

sorrow.root: sor（痛）+ row（行）→ 一行痛苦
sorrow.ex: He felt deep sorrow after losing his dog.
sorrow.exCn: 失去狗后他感到深深的悲伤。

sort.ex: What sort of music do you like?

sound.ex: The sound of the rain is relaxing.

soup.ex: I had a bowl of hot soup for lunch.

sour.exCn: 这个柠檬尝起来太酸了。

source.root: 来自拉丁语 surgere（升起），指水源头
source.ex: The river has its source in the mountains.

south.ex: Birds fly south for the winter.

southeast.exCn: 暴风雨正朝东南方向移动。

southern.ex: She lives in the southern part of the city.

southwest.ex: They drove southwest to the coast.
southwest.exCn: 他们开车向西南去海岸。

sovereign.root: 来自拉丁语 super（上面）+ regnare（统治）
sovereign.ex: Each country is a sovereign state.
sovereign.exCn: 每个国家都是一个主权国家。

space.ex: There isn't enough space in the room.
space.exCn: 房间里没有足够的空间。

spacecraft.ex: The spacecraft landed on the moon.

spaceship.ex: The spaceship flew into the sky.

spacious.ex: The new apartment is very spacious.

spade.ex: He dug a hole with a spade.

span.root: 来自古英语，原义指“拇指到小指的距离”，与“跨度”相关

spark.root: 像火星溅出的声音，sp-开头的词常与“喷出、散开”有关
spark.ex: A spark can start a fire.
spark.exCn: 一颗火星就能引发火灾。

sparkle.root: spark + le（表示反复或小动作），即“小火花不断闪”
sparkle.exCn: 她的眼睛因喜悦而闪闪发光。

speak.root: 来自古英语 sprecan，后简化成 speak

speaker.ex: He is a good public speaker.
speaker.exCn: 他是一位优秀的公共演讲者。

spear.ex: He threw the spear at the target.

special.root: 来自拉丁语 species（种类），spec- 表示“看、种类”

specialize.root: special + ize（动词后缀，表示“使专门化”）

species.root: 来自拉丁语，原义“外观、种类”，spec- 表示“看”

specific.root: spec-（看）+ ific（使成为），即“能看清楚的”→具体的
specific.exCn: 我需要一个具体的答案。

specification.root: specific（具体的）+ ation（名词后缀，表示行为或结果）
specification.exCn: 仔细阅读产品规格说明。

specify.root: spec-（看）+ ify（使成为动词），即“使看清楚”→明确说明

specimen.root: spec-（看）+ -imen（名词后缀）→ 让人看的东西 → 样本
specimen.ex: The scientist examined the specimen under a microscope.
specimen.exCn: 科学家在显微镜下检查了样本。

spectacle.root: spect-（看）+ -acle（名词后缀）→ 供人看的东西 → 景象/奇观
spectacle.ex: The fireworks were a spectacular sight.
spectacle.exCn: 烟花是一场壮观的景象。

spectacular.root: spect-（看）+ -acular（形容词后缀）→ 值得看的 → 壮观的
spectacular.ex: The view from the top was absolutely spectacular.
spectacular.exCn: 从山顶看到的景色非常壮观。

spectator.root: spect-（看）+ -ator（人）→ 看的人 → 观众
spectator.ex: Thousands of spectators watched the game.
spectator.exCn: 成千上万的观众观看了比赛。

spectrum.root: spect-（看）+ -rum（名词后缀）→ 能看到的光带 → 光谱/范围
spectrum.ex: The issue covers a wide spectrum of opinions.
spectrum.exCn: 这个问题涵盖了广泛的观点范围。

speculate.root: spec-（看）+ -ulate（动词后缀）→ 看来看去 → 推测/投机
speculate.ex: Don't speculate about things you don't know.
speculate.exCn: 别对你不知道的事情瞎猜。

speech.ex: She gave a powerful speech at the meeting.
speech.exCn: 她在会上发表了一场有力的演讲。

speed.ex: The car picked up speed quickly.

spell.ex: Can you spell your name for me?
spell.exCn: 你能把你的名字拼给我吗？

spelling.root: spell（拼写）+ -ing（名词后缀）→ 拼写
spelling.ex: Check your spelling before submitting the test.
spelling.exCn: 提交测试前检查你的拼写。

spend.ex: I spend too much time on my phone.
spend.exCn: 我在手机上花太多时间了。

spicy.root: spice（香料）+ -y（形容词后缀）→ 有香料的 → 辣的
spicy.ex: I love spicy food, but it makes me sweat.
spicy.exCn: 我喜欢辣的食物，但它让我出汗。

spider.ex: A spider was crawling across the floor.

spill.ex: Be careful not to spill your coffee.

spin.root: 词根 spin-（刺、转）→ 旋转时像被刺中心点
spin.ex: The dancer began to spin across the stage.
spin.exCn: 舞者开始在舞台上旋转。

spine.root: 词根 spin-（刺）+ e → 脊柱像一根刺支撑身体
spine.ex: He injured his spine in the accident.

spiral.root: 词根 spir-（螺旋）+ al（形容词后缀）→ 螺旋形的
spiral.ex: The plane went into a spiral dive.

spirit.root: 词根 spir-（呼吸）+ it → 呼吸是生命的精气神
spirit.exCn: 她展现了很强的团队精神。

spiritual.root: spirit（精神）+ ual（形容词后缀）→ 精神上的
spiritual.ex: He is more spiritual than religious.
spiritual.exCn: 他更偏向灵性而非宗教。

spite.root: 词根 spit-（吐）+ e → 吐口水表示恶意
spite.ex: She did it out of pure spite.
spite.exCn: 她这么做纯粹出于恶意。

splash.exCn: 孩子们把水溅得到处都是。

splendid.root: 词根 splend-（发光）+ id（形容词后缀）→ 发光般灿烂的
splendid.ex: We had a splendid time at the party.
splendid.exCn: 我们在聚会上度过了极好的时光。

split.root: 空字符串（拟声词，裂开的声音）
split.ex: The team split into two groups.

spoil.root: 词根 spol-（掠夺）→ 掠夺使东西变坏
spoil.ex: Too much sugar will spoil your appetite.
spoil.exCn: 太多糖会破坏你的胃口。

spokesman.root: spoke（说话，speak的过去式）+ s + man → 说话的人

sponge.root: 空字符串（源自古希腊语 spongia）
sponge.ex: Use a sponge to clean the table.

sponsor.root: 词根 spond-（承诺）+ or（人）→ 承诺支持的人
sponsor.exCn: 这家公司赞助了该活动。

spontaneous.root: 词根 spont-（自发）+ aneous（形容词后缀）→ 自发的

spoon.root: 来自古英语 spon（木片、勺）
spoon.ex: She stirred the soup with a spoon.

sport.exCn: 足球是我最喜欢的运动。

spot.root: 可能来自古英语 splott（斑点）
spot.ex: I spotted a mistake in the report.
spot.exCn: 我在报告中发现了一个错误。

spouse.root: 来自拉丁语 sponsus（承诺，结婚）
spouse.ex: My spouse works in a hospital.
spouse.exCn: 我的配偶在一家医院工作。

spray.root: 可能来自拟声词（喷溅声）
spray.ex: She sprayed water on the plants.

spread.ex: Butter spread easily on warm bread.
spread.exCn: 黄油很容易涂在热面包上。

spring.root: 来自古英语 springan（跳跃、涌出）

sprinkle.root: 可能来自拟声词（细小雨滴声）
sprinkle.ex: Sprinkle some salt on the salad.

spur.root: 来自古英语 spura（刺、激励）
spur.ex: The coach's words spurred him on.

spy.exCn: 一个间谍偷走了秘密文件。

square.ex: The table has a square shape.

squeeze.ex: Squeeze the lemon to get juice.

squirrel.root: 来自古法语 escurel（松鼠，尾巴遮阴）
squirrel.ex: A squirrel hid nuts in a tree.
squirrel.exCn: 一只松鼠把坚果藏在树上。

stab.root: 词根st-有“站立、刺”之意，-ab可联想为“ab（离开）”，想象“刺一下让人离开”。
stab.ex: He was stabbed in the arm.

stability.root: 来自stable，-ity是名词后缀，表示“稳定的状态”。
stability.exCn: 这个国家需要政治稳定。

stable.root: st-（站立）+ -able（能…的），能立住的→稳定的。

stack.root: 想象一堆东西“stack（叠）在一起”，像书堆叠。
stack.ex: She stacked the books on the desk.

stadium.root: st-（站立），-ium是场所后缀，人们站立看比赛的地方。
stadium.ex: The stadium was full of fans.

staff.root: st-（站立）+ aff（像affix附着），指“站在你身边帮忙的人”。
staff.ex: The hotel staff are very friendly.

stage.root: st-（站立）+ age（年龄/阶段），人站在某个阶段或舞台上。
stage.ex: She is at an early stage of her career.
stage.exCn: 她处于职业生涯的早期阶段。

stagger.root: st-（站立）+ agger（加重），像负重太多而摇晃。
stagger.ex: He staggered out of the bar.
stagger.exCn: 他摇摇晃晃地走出了酒吧。

stain.root: st-（站立）+ ain（像pain），污渍“站在”表面让人头疼。
stain.ex: The red wine left a stain on the carpet.
stain.exCn: 红酒在地毯上留下了污渍。

stair.root: st-（站立）+ air（空气），想象站在楼梯上呼吸空气。

staircase.root: stair（楼梯）+ case（箱子/外壳），楼梯的“外壳”即楼梯间。
staircase.ex: The old house has a wooden staircase.
staircase.exCn: 这栋老房子有一个木制楼梯。

stake.root: st-（站立）+ ake（像take），拿木桩“立”在地上。
stake.ex: He has a stake in the company.

stale.root: st-（站立）+ ale（像ale啤酒），啤酒放久了变陈。

stalk.root: st-（站立）+ alk（像walk），植物“站着”的茎，或悄悄“走”近。
stalk.exCn: 一只猫悄悄跟踪那只鸟。

stall.root: st-（站立）+ all（全部），全部“站住不动”即停滞。
stall.ex: The car stalled on the hill.

stamp.root: 词根 st-（站/立）+ -amp（拟声，跺脚的声音）→ 跺脚、盖印
stamp.ex: She stamped her foot in anger.

stand.root: 词根 st-（站立）→ 站立、忍受

standard.root: stand（站立）+ -ard（表“状态”）→ 站立的标杆 → 标准

standpoint.root: stand（站立）+ point（点）→ 站立的位置 → 立场、观点
standpoint.ex: From my standpoint, it's a good idea.
standpoint.exCn: 从我的立场看，这是个好主意。

staple.root: 词根 sta-（站立）+ -ple（折叠）→ 使纸张固定站立 → 订书钉；主要产品
staple.ex: Rice is a staple food in Asia.

star.root: 词根 st-（发光）→ 星星；明星
star.ex: She dreams of being a movie star.

stare.root: 词根 st-（看）+ -are → 盯着看

start.root: 词根 st-（站立）+ -art（动）→ 从站立开始行动 → 开始

startle.root: start（开始）+ -le（反复）→ 突然开始吓一跳 → 使吃惊
startle.exCn: 巨大的噪音吓了我一跳。

starve.root: 词根 st-（僵硬）+ -arve → 饿到僵硬 → 饿死
starve.ex: Many people starve in the war.

state.root: 词根 st-（站立）+ -ate（状态）→ 站立的状态 → 状态；国家；陈述
state.exCn: 他清楚地陈述了自己的观点。

statement.root: state（陈述）+ -ment（名词后缀）→ 陈述、声明
statement.ex: The bank sent a monthly statement.

statesman.root: state（国家）+ s + man（人）→ 为国家做事的人 → 政治家
statesman.exCn: 他是一位受尊敬的政治家。

static.root: 词根 st-（站立）+ -atic（形容词后缀）→ 站住不动的 → 静态的
static.ex: The image is static, not moving.
static.exCn: 这个图像是静态的，不会动。

station.root: 词根 st-（站立）+ -ation（名词后缀）→ 站立的地方 → 车站；岗位
station.ex: I'll meet you at the station.

stationary.root: station（站）+ ary（形容词后缀）→ 站着不动的
stationary.ex: The car remained stationary at the red light.
stationary.exCn: 这辆车在红灯前静止不动。

stationery.root: stationer（文具商）+ y（名词后缀）→ 文具
stationery.ex: I need to buy some stationery for the office.
stationery.exCn: 我需要为办公室买些文具。

statistical.root: statistic（统计）+ al（形容词后缀）→ 统计的
statistical.ex: She used statistical methods to analyze the data.
statistical.exCn: 她使用统计方法分析数据。

statue.root: stat（站立）+ ue（名词后缀）→ 竖立的东西→ 雕像
statue.ex: There is a famous statue in the city square.
statue.exCn: 城市广场上有一座著名的雕像。

status.root: stat（站立）+ us（名词后缀）→ 站着的状态→ 地位
status.ex: His social status improved after getting the job.
status.exCn: 得到那份工作后，他的社会地位提高了。

statute.root: stat（站立）+ ute（名词后缀）→ 确立下来的规定→ 法令
statute.ex: The statute was passed by the government last year.
statute.exCn: 这项法令去年由政府通过。

stay.ex: I will stay at home and read a book today.
stay.exCn: 今天我待在家里读一本书。

steady.root: stead（代替/位置）+ y（形容词后缀）→ 位置不变的→ 稳定的
steady.ex: He held the ladder steady while I climbed up.
steady.exCn: 我爬上去时他扶稳了梯子。

steak.ex: She ordered a medium-rare steak for dinner.
steak.exCn: 她晚餐点了一份三分熟的牛排。

steal.ex: Someone tried to steal my wallet on the bus.
steal.exCn: 有人在公交车上想偷我的钱包。

steam.ex: Steam rose from the hot cup of coffee.
steam.exCn: 蒸汽从那杯热咖啡中升起。

steamer.root: steam（蒸汽）+ er（名词后缀，表物）→ 蒸汽机/蒸锅
steamer.ex: She used a steamer to cook the vegetables.

steel.ex: The bridge is made of strong steel and concrete.
steel.exCn: 这座桥由坚固的钢材和混凝土建成。

steep.ex: The hill was too steep to climb easily.
steep.exCn: 这山坡太陡了，不容易爬上去。

steer.ex: He had to steer the car carefully around the corner.
steer.exCn: 他得小心地转弯驾驶汽车。

stem.root: 词根来自“站立”，像树干站住不动
stem.ex: The stem of the plant is strong.

step.root: 与“脚步”有关，想象一步步走
step.ex: Take one step at a time.

stereo.ex: I bought a new stereo system.
stereo.exCn: 我买了一套新立体声音响。

stereotype.root: stereo（固定）+ type（类型）= 固定印象
stereotype.exCn: 不要用刻板印象评判别人。

stern.ex: The teacher gave a stern look.

steward.root: stew（管理）+ ard（人）= 管理人
steward.ex: The steward helped me find my seat.
steward.exCn: 乘务员帮我找到了座位。

stick.ex: Stick the note on the door.

sticky.root: stick（粘）+ y（形容词）= 粘的
sticky.ex: The floor is sticky after the spill.
sticky.exCn: 洒了东西后地板黏黏的。

stiff.ex: My neck feels stiff after sleeping wrong.
stiff.exCn: 睡姿不对后我脖子僵硬。

still.ex: Please sit still for a moment.

stimulate.exCn: 咖啡可以刺激你的大脑。

stitch.ex: She will stitch the torn shirt.

stock.ex: The store has new stock of shoes.
stock.exCn: 这家店有新进的鞋子库存。

stocking.root: stock（树干/存货）+ing → 像树干一样长筒的袜子
stocking.ex: She wore red stockings under her skirt.
stocking.exCn: 她在裙子下穿了红色长筒袜。

stomach.root: sto（站）+mach（像“麻”一样）→ 食物“站”在胃里让人发麻
stomach.ex: I have a pain in my stomach.

stone.root: stone 本身是词根，意为“石头”
stone.ex: He threw a stone into the lake.
stone.exCn: 他向湖里扔了一块石头。

stool.root: stool 与“stool（凳子）”同源，像木头墩子
stool.ex: She sat on a wooden stool.

stoop.root: stoop = s（向下）+top（顶部）→ 顶部向下弯
stoop.ex: He had to stoop to go through the door.
stoop.exCn: 他得弯腰才能通过那扇门。

stop.root: stop = s（使）+top（顶）→ 使到达顶点后停下
stop.ex: The bus will stop at the next station.
stop.exCn: 公共汽车将在下一站停靠。

storage.root: store（存储）+age（名词后缀）→ 存储的状态或地方
storage.ex: We need more storage space for the boxes.
storage.exCn: 我们需要更多储物空间来放这些箱子。

store.root: store 本身是词根，意为“储存”
store.ex: I went to the store to buy milk.

storey.root: store（楼层）+y → 建筑的层数（英式拼写）

storm.root: storm = s（加强）+torm（旋转）→ 剧烈旋转的天气

story.root: story 与 history 同源，意为“讲述的事”
story.ex: She told me a funny story.
story.exCn: 她给我讲了一个有趣的故事。

stove.root: stove = s（站立）+tove（加热）→ 站着的加热设备
stove.ex: She cooked dinner on the stove.

straight.root: straight = s（加强）+t（拉直）+raight（right）→ 拉直、正确
straight.ex: Go straight ahead for two blocks.

straightforward.root: straight（直的）+forward（向前）→ 直截了当的
straightforward.ex: The instructions are straightforward and easy to follow.

strain.root: strain = s（拉）+train（拉紧）→ 拉紧、压力
strain.ex: Don't strain your eyes by reading in dim light.
strain.exCn: 别在昏暗灯光下看书让眼睛疲劳。

strange.root: 源自拉丁语 extraneus（外来的），str- 可联想为“外来的陌生人”
strange.ex: It feels strange to be back after so long.
strange.exCn: 这么久之后回来感觉很奇怪。

stranger.ex: Don't talk to strangers on the street.
stranger.exCn: 别在街上跟陌生人说话。

strap.root: 与 strip（条）同源，st- 可联想为“带子”
strap.ex: He strapped the bag onto his bike.

strategy.root: 源自希腊语 strategia（将军的指挥），str- 联想为“战略”
strategy.ex: We need a clear strategy to win.
strategy.exCn: 我们需要一个清晰的策略来获胜。

straw.root: 与 straw（稻草）同源，st- 联想为“细长条”
straw.ex: She drank juice through a straw.

strawberry.root: straw（稻草）+ berry（浆果），草莓植株常铺稻草

stream.root: 与 flow 相关，st- 联想为“流动”

streamline.root: stream（流）+ line（线），原指流体线形，现指简化
streamline.ex: We need to streamline the process.

street.root: 源自拉丁语 strata（铺的路），st- 联想为“路”
street.ex: The street was busy with traffic.

strength.root: strong（强壮）的名词形式，-th 表示性质

strenuous.root: 源自拉丁语 strenuus（活跃的），st- 联想为“使劲”
strenuous.ex: It was a strenuous hike uphill.
strenuous.exCn: 那是一次费力的上山徒步。

stress.root: 源自拉丁语 strictus（拉紧的），st- 联想为“压力”
stress.ex: He's under a lot of stress at work.

stretch.root: 与 straight（直的）相关，-tch 表示动作

strict.root: 源自拉丁语 strictus（拉紧的），st- 联想为“严格”
strict.ex: The teacher is very strict about deadlines.
strict.exCn: 老师对截止日期非常严格。

stride.root: stride（大步走）→ 想象“死拽的”大步走
stride.ex: He strode confidently into the room.
stride.exCn: 他自信地大步走进房间。

strife.root: strife（冲突）→ 与“strive（奋斗）”同源，奋斗常伴随冲突
strife.ex: The country was torn by civil strife.
strife.exCn: 这个国家被内乱撕裂了。

strike.root: strike（打击/罢工）→ 想象“死拽开”罢工队伍
strike.ex: Workers went on strike for higher pay.
strike.exCn: 工人们为提高工资而罢工。

striking.root: striking（显著的）→ 来自strike，能“打动人”的
striking.ex: She has a striking resemblance to her mother.
striking.exCn: 她和她母亲惊人地相似。

string.root: string（绳子/弦）→ 像“死拽”一根绳子
string.ex: He tied the package with a string.
string.exCn: 他用一根绳子捆好包裹。

strip.root: strip（剥去/条带）→ 像“死拽皮”一样剥掉
strip.ex: They stripped the old paint off the wall.
strip.exCn: 他们把旧油漆从墙上剥下来。

stripe.root: stripe（条纹）→ strip（条）+ e，有条纹的条带
stripe.ex: The zebra has black and white stripes.

strive.root: strive（努力）→ 与“strife（冲突）”同源，努力常需对抗困难
strive.exCn: 我们必须为卓越而奋斗。

stroke.root: stroke（抚摸/中风）→ 像“死戳”一下，轻抚或重击
stroke.ex: He gave her a gentle stroke on the head.
stroke.exCn: 他轻轻抚摸了一下她的头。

stroll.root: stroll（散步）→ 想象“死走”着慢慢溜达
stroll.ex: They strolled along the beach at sunset.
stroll.exCn: 他们在日落时沿着海滩散步。

strong.root: strong（强壮的）→ 来自strength，想象“死壮”
strong.ex: She is strong enough to lift the box.
strong.exCn: 她足够强壮，能抬起这个箱子。

structure.root: struct（建造）+ ure（名词后缀）→ 建造出来的东西
structure.ex: The building has a modern structure.
structure.exCn: 这座建筑有现代的结构。

struggle.root: struggle（挣扎/斗争）→ 与“strife”同源，想象“死抓狗”一样挣扎
struggle.ex: She struggled to open the heavy door.
struggle.exCn: 她挣扎着打开那扇沉重的门。

stubborn.root: stubborn（固执的）→ 想象“死大笨”不肯变通
stubborn.ex: He is too stubborn to change his mind.
stubborn.exCn: 他太固执了，不肯改变主意。

student.root: stud（学习）+ ent（人）→ 学习的人
student.ex: Every student must finish the homework.
student.exCn: 每个学生都必须完成作业。

subsequent.root: sub-（下面）+ sequ（跟随）→ 跟在下面 → 随后的

subsidy.root: sub-（下）+ sid（坐）+ y → 坐在下面的钱 → 补贴
subsidy.ex: The government provides a subsidy for farmers.

substance.root: sub-（下）+ stan（站立）+ ce → 站在下面的东西 → 物质
substance.ex: This substance is harmful to humans.

substantial.root: 来自 substance → 有实体的 → 大量的、实质的
substantial.ex: They made a substantial profit this year.
substantial.exCn: 他们今年获得了可观的利润。

substitute.root: sub-（代替）+ stitute（放置）→ 放在下面替代 → 替代品
substitute.ex: You can substitute honey for sugar.

subtle.root: sub-（下）+ tle（编织）→ 编织在下面的 → 微妙的
subtle.ex: There is a subtle difference between them.
subtle.exCn: 它们之间有细微的差别。

subtract.root: sub-（下）+ tract（拉）→ 拉下来 → 减去

suburb.root: sub-（下/近）+ urb（城市）→ 靠近城市的地方 → 郊区
suburb.ex: They live in a quiet suburb.

subway.root: sub-（下）+ way（路）→ 地下的路 → 地铁
subway.ex: I take the subway to work every day.

succeed.root: suc-（下面/接近）+ ceed（走）→ 走到下面去接近目标 → 成功
succeed.ex: You will succeed if you keep trying.
succeed.exCn: 如果你继续努力，你会成功的。

success.root: 来自 succeed 的名词形式

successful.root: success + -ful（充满）→ 充满成功的 → 成功的
successful.exCn: 她是一位成功的女商人。

succession.root: suc-（下面）+ cess（走）+ ion → 一个接一个走 → 连续
succession.ex: A succession of events led to the crisis.
succession.exCn: 一连串的事件导致了危机。

successive.root: succession 的形容词形式 → 连续的
successive.ex: It rained for three successive days.

successor.root: suc-（下）+ cess（走）+ or（人）→ 跟在后面走的人 → 继任者
successor.ex: He was named as her successor.
successor.exCn: 他被指定为她的继任者。

such.root: s-（加强）+uch（=have，有）→ 像那样有的 → 这样的
such.ex: I have never seen such a beautiful sunset.
such.exCn: 我从未见过如此美丽的日落。

suck.root: 拟声词，模仿吮吸的声音
suck.ex: The straw is broken; it won't suck.

sudden.root: sub-（在…下）+it（走）+en → 从下面走出来的 → 突然的
sudden.ex: A sudden rain caught us without umbrellas.
sudden.exCn: 一场突如其来的雨让我们没带伞。

sue.root: 源自拉丁语 sequi（跟随），法律上“跟随”对方追责
sue.ex: She decided to sue the company for damages.
sue.exCn: 她决定起诉该公司要求赔偿。

suffer.root: suf-（在…下）+fer（承受）→ 在下面承受 → 遭受
suffer.ex: He suffered a lot during the long illness.
suffer.exCn: 他在漫长的生病期间受了很多苦。

suffice.root: suf-（在…下）+fic（做）→ 在下面做到位 → 足够
suffice.ex: One sandwich will suffice for lunch.
suffice.exCn: 一个三明治就够当午餐了。

sufficient.root: suf-（在…下）+fic（做）+ient（形容词后缀）→ 做得够多的 → 充足的
sufficient.ex: We have sufficient food for the trip.
sufficient.exCn: 我们有足够的食物供旅行使用。

sugar.root: 源自梵语 sharkara（沙粒），因糖像沙粒
sugar.ex: Add a little sugar to your coffee.
sugar.exCn: 在你的咖啡里加一点糖。

suggest.root: sug-（在…下）+gest（携带）→ 从下面带上来 → 暗示、建议
suggest.ex: I suggest we take a break now.
suggest.exCn: 我建议我们现在休息一下。

suggestion.root: suggest（建议）+ion（名词后缀）→ 建议
suggestion.ex: He made a helpful suggestion about the project.
suggestion.exCn: 他对这个项目提出了一个有用的建议。

suicide.root: sui（自己）+cide（杀）→ 杀自己 → 自杀
suicide.ex: The movie deals with the theme of suicide.
suicide.exCn: 这部电影涉及自杀的主题。

suit.root: 源自拉丁语 sequi（跟随），法律上“跟随”案件 → 诉讼，后引申为“一套衣服”
suit.ex: This dress doesn't suit your body type.
suit.exCn: 这条裙子不适合你的体型。

suitable.root: suit（适合）+able（能…的）→ 能适合的 → 合适的
suitable.ex: Is this job suitable for a beginner?
suitable.exCn: 这份工作适合初学者吗？

suite.root: 源自法语，意为“跟随”的一组房间或家具
suite.ex: We booked a suite at the hotel.
suite.exCn: 我们在酒店订了一间套房。

sulfur.root: 源自拉丁语 sulfur，原指一种黄色矿物质
sulfur.ex: Sulfur has a strong, unpleasant smell.
sulfur.exCn: 硫磺有一种强烈的难闻气味。

sum.root: 来自拉丁语 summa（总和、顶端）

summarize.root: sum（总和）+ -ize（使动）→ 使成总和 → 总结
summarize.ex: Can you summarize the main points?

summary.root: sum（总和）+ -ary（名词后缀）→ 总和性的内容 → 摘要
summary.ex: Write a one-page summary of the report.

summer.root: 来自古英语 sumor（夏季），与 sun（太阳）同源
summer.ex: We often go swimming in summer.

summit.root: sum（顶端/最高）+ -it（名词后缀）→ 顶点 → 峰会/山顶
summit.ex: They reached the summit before noon.
summit.exCn: 他们在中午前到达了山顶。

summon.root: sub-（从下）+ monere（提醒/叫）→ 从下面叫上来 → 召唤
summon.ex: The teacher summoned him to the office.

sun.root: 本义为发光体，与拉丁语 sol（太阳）同源
sun.ex: The sun rises in the east.

sunday.root: sun（太阳）+ day（日子）→ 太阳神之日 → 星期日
sunday.ex: We have lunch together every Sunday.
sunday.exCn: 我们每个周日一起吃午饭。

sunrise.root: sun（太阳）+ rise（升起）→ 太阳升起 → 日出
sunrise.ex: We watched the sunrise over the ocean.

sunset.root: sun（太阳）+ set（落下）→ 太阳落下 → 日落
sunset.ex: The sunset painted the sky orange.
sunset.exCn: 日落把天空染成了橙色。

sunshine.root: sun（太阳）+ shine（照耀）→ 太阳照耀 → 阳光
sunshine.ex: The cat sat in the warm sunshine.

super.root: 来自拉丁语 super（在…之上）
super.ex: He is a super friendly person.

superb.root: super（之上）+ -b（形容词后缀）→ 在标准之上 → 极好的
superb.ex: The food at that restaurant is superb.
superb.exCn: 那家餐厅的食物棒极了。

superficial.root: super（上面）+ fic（做/表面）+ -ial（形容词）→ 只做表面 → 肤浅的
superficial.ex: He only has a superficial understanding.

superfluous.root: super（超过）+ flu（流动）+ -ous（形容词）→ 多得流出来 → 多余的

superior.root: super-（在…之上） + -ior（比较级后缀） → 更上面的 → 高级的、优越的
superior.ex: This product is superior to that one.

superiority.root: superior（优越的） + -ity（名词后缀） → 优越性
superiority.exCn: 他们声称拥有军事优势。

supermarket.root: super-（超级） + market（市场） → 超级市场
supermarket.ex: I buy food at the supermarket.

supersonic.root: super-（超过） + son（声音） + -ic（形容词后缀） → 超过声音的 → 超音速的
supersonic.ex: The jet flies at supersonic speed.
supersonic.exCn: 这架喷气机以超音速飞行。

superstition.root: super-（超过） + st（站立） + -ition（名词后缀） → 站在理性之上 → 迷信
superstition.ex: Breaking a mirror is a superstition.

supervise.root: super-（在上） + vis（看） → 在上面看 → 监督
supervise.ex: A manager will supervise the team.
supervise.exCn: 一位经理将监督这个团队。

supper.ex: We had supper at seven o'clock.

supplement.root: sup-（在下面） + ple（填满） + -ment（名词后缀） → 从下面填满 → 补充
supplement.exCn: 她每天服用维生素补充剂。

supply.root: sup-（从下面） + ply（填满） → 从下面填满 → 供应
supply.exCn: 这家商店供应新鲜蔬菜。

support.root: sup-（从下面） + port（搬运） → 从下面托起 → 支持
support.exCn: 我的家人支持我的决定。

suppose.root: sup-（在下面） + pose（放置） → 放在下面作为前提 → 假设

suppress.root: sup-（向下） + press（压） → 向下压 → 压制、抑制
suppress.ex: He tried to suppress his anger.

supreme.root: supra-（在…之上）的最高级形式 → 最高的、至上的
supreme.ex: The Supreme Court made a ruling.

sure.ex: Are you sure about the answer?

surface.root: sur-（在…之上） + face（脸、面） → 在脸的上面 → 表面
surface.ex: The surface of the table is smooth.

surge.root: sur-（超过/向上）+ -ge（词根“流动”变体）→ 向上涌动
surge.ex: A surge of anger swept over him.

surgeon.root: sur-（手）+ -geon（操作）→ 用手操作的人
surgeon.ex: The surgeon performed the operation successfully.
surgeon.exCn: 外科医生成功完成了手术。

surgery.ex: He needs surgery on his knee.

surname.root: sur-（在…之上）+ name（名字）→ 写在名字上面的姓

surpass.root: sur-（超过）+ pass（通过）→ 超过
surpass.exCn: 她的分数超出了所有人的预期。

surplus.root: sur-（超过）+ plus（加）→ 多出来的部分
surplus.ex: The country has a surplus of grain.

surprise.root: sur-（突然）+ prise（抓）→ 突然抓住 → 使惊讶

surrender.root: sur-（向上）+ render（交出）→ 交出武器

surround.root: sur-（超过/周围）+ round（圆）→ 围成一圈
surround.exCn: 高大的树木环绕着房子。

surroundings.root: surround + -ings（名词后缀）→ 周围的环境

survey.root: sur-（在…之上）+ vey（看）→ 从上面看 → 调查
survey.ex: They surveyed the damage after the storm.
survey.exCn: 他们调查了暴风雨后的损失。

survival.root: sur-（超过）+ viv（活着）+ -al（名词后缀）→ 活下来
survival.ex: Survival in the desert is hard.

survive.root: sur-（超过）+ vive（活着）→ 活过来
survive.ex: Only a few passengers survived the crash.
survive.exCn: 只有少数乘客在坠机中幸存。

susceptible.root: sus-（向下）+ cept（拿）+ -ible（能…的）→ 容易被拿下的 → 易受影响的

suspect.root: sus-（向下）+ spect（看）→ 偷偷往下看 → 怀疑
suspect.ex: The police suspect him of theft.

suspend.root: sus-（下）+ pend（悬挂）→ 挂下面 → 暂停/悬挂
suspend.ex: The company suspended the project due to budget cuts.
suspend.exCn: 因为预算削减，公司暂停了这个项目。

suspicion.root: sus-（下）+ spic（看）+ ion（名词）→ 从下面看 → 怀疑

suspicious.root: sus-（下）+ spic（看）+ ious（形容词）→ 从下面看的 → 可疑的
suspicious.exCn: 那个男人的行为很可疑。

sustain.root: sus-（下）+ tain（拿住）→ 在下面拿住 → 维持/支撑
sustain.ex: We need food to sustain our energy.
sustain.exCn: 我们需要食物来维持能量。

swallow.ex: He swallowed the pill with water.

swamp.ex: The heavy rain swamped the fields.

swan.ex: A white swan glided across the lake.

swarm.ex: A swarm of bees flew past us.
swarm.exCn: 一群蜜蜂飞过我们身边。

sway.ex: The trees swayed in the wind.

sweat.ex: He was sweating after the run.

sweater.ex: She wore a warm sweater in winter.
sweater.exCn: 冬天她穿了一件暖和的毛衣。

swell.ex: His ankle began to swell after the injury.
swell.exCn: 受伤后他的脚踝开始肿胀。

swift.root: 来自古英语 swift，与 sweep 同源，表示“快速移动”
swift.ex: The swift river carried the boat downstream.
swift.exCn: 湍急的河水把船冲向下游。

swim.root: 来自古英语 swimman，拟声词，模仿划水声
swim.ex: She swims every morning to stay fit.
swim.exCn: 她每天早上游泳来保持健康。

swing.root: 来自古英语 swingan，与“摇摆”动作相关
swing.ex: The door swung open with a loud creak.

switch.root: 来自低地德语 swich，原指“枝条”，后引申为“转换”
switch.ex: Please switch off the lights before leaving.

sword.root: 来自古英语 sweord，与“切割”相关
sword.ex: He drew his sword and prepared to fight.

symbol.root: sym-（共同）+ bol（投掷），原指“投在一起的东西”，引申为象征
symbol.ex: The dove is a symbol of peace worldwide.
symbol.exCn: 鸽子是世界和平的象征。

symmetry.root: sym-（相同）+ metr（测量），即“测量一致”
symmetry.ex: The building’s symmetry made it look elegant.
symmetry.exCn: 建筑的对称性让它看起来很优雅。

sympathetic.root: sym-（共同）+ path（感情），即“有共同感情的”
sympathetic.ex: She was sympathetic to his difficult situation.
sympathetic.exCn: 她对他的困境表示同情。

sympathize.root: sym-（共同）+ path（感情），动词形式
sympathize.ex: I sympathize with your loss; it must be hard.
sympathize.exCn: 我对你的损失表示同情，这一定很难。

sympathy.root: sym-（共同）+ path（感情），名词“同情”
sympathy.ex: He expressed sympathy for the victims of the flood.
sympathy.exCn: 他对洪灾受害者表示了同情。

symphony.root: sym-（共同）+ phon（声音），即“共同发出声音”
symphony.ex: The orchestra played a beautiful symphony by Beethoven.
symphony.exCn: 管弦乐队演奏了一首贝多芬的优美交响乐。

symposium.root: sym-（共同）+ pos（放置）+ ium（场所），原指“一起喝酒的聚会”，后指学术会议
symposium.ex: The symposium on climate change attracted many experts.
symposium.exCn: 气候变化研讨会吸引了许多专家。

symptom.root: sym-（共同）+ ptom（落下），原指“一起落下的东西”，引申为疾病的征兆
symptom.ex: A fever is a common symptom of the flu.
symptom.exCn: 发烧是流感的常见症状。

syndrome.root: syn-（一起）+ drom（跑），即“一起跑来的症状群”
syndrome.ex: Down syndrome is a genetic condition.
syndrome.exCn: 唐氏综合征是一种遗传性疾病。

synthesis.root: syn-（一起）+ thesis（放置），即“放在一起”，意为综合
synthesis.ex: The report is a synthesis of various research findings.
synthesis.exCn: 这份报告是各项研究结果的综合。

synthetic.root: syn-（一起）+thet（放置）+ic（形容词后缀）→放到一起的→合成的
synthetic.ex: This fabric is made of synthetic fibers.
synthetic.exCn: 这种布料是由合成纤维制成的。

system.root: sy-（一起）+stem（站立）→站在一起→系统
system.ex: We need a better system for filing.
system.exCn: 我们需要一个更好的归档系统。

systematic.root: system（系统）+atic（形容词后缀）→系统的→有条理的
systematic.ex: She took a systematic approach to the problem.
systematic.exCn: 她采取了系统的方法来解决这个问题。

table.ex: Please put the book on the table.

tablet.root: table（桌子）+t（小后缀）→小桌子状的东西→平板电脑/药片
tablet.ex: He reads the news on his tablet every morning.
tablet.exCn: 他每天早晨在平板电脑上看新闻。

tackle.ex: He managed to tackle the difficult task.
tackle.exCn: 他成功处理了这项艰巨的任务。

tactic.ex: Their tactic was to wait and see.

tag.ex: Please put a price tag on each item.
tag.exCn: 请给每件商品贴上价格标签。

tail.ex: The dog wagged its tail happily.

tailor.ex: The tailor will shorten the sleeves for you.
tailor.exCn: 裁缝会帮你把袖子改短。

take.ex: Please take a seat and wait.

tale.ex: She told a funny tale about her cat.
tale.exCn: 她讲了一个关于她猫的有趣故事。

talent.ex: She has a real talent for singing.
talent.exCn: 她在唱歌方面很有天赋。

talk.ex: Let's talk about the plan tomorrow.
talk.exCn: 我们明天谈谈这个计划。

tame.root: 与 time（时间）同源，驯服需要时间
tame.ex: The horse is too wild to tame.
tame.exCn: 这匹马太野了，难以驯服。

tan.ex: She got a nice tan at the beach.
tan.exCn: 她在海滩上晒出了漂亮的棕褐色。

tangle.root: tangle ≈ 纠缠的绳结（想象头发打结）
tangle.ex: The wires are all in a tangle.

tanker.root: tank（罐）+ er（…的人/物）= 运油车/船

tap.root: tap 像水龙头轻拍（tap）出水

tape.ex: Use tape to fix the paper.

tar.ex: The road was covered with tar.

target.ex: He hit the target with one shot.

tariff.ex: The government raised tariffs on imports.

tax.ex: You must pay tax on income.

taxi.ex: Let's take a taxi to the airport.

tea.ex: Would you like a cup of tea?

teach.root: 来自古英语 tǣcan '展示、指导'
teach.ex: She will teach English at the school.
teach.exCn: 她将在这所学校教英语。

teacher.ex: The teacher explained the lesson clearly.
teacher.exCn: 老师清晰地讲解了这节课。

team.root: 来自古英语 tēam '一组人、队伍'
team.ex: Our team won the game yesterday.

tear.root: 与古英语 teran '撕扯'相关
tear.ex: Don't tear the paper into pieces.

tease.root: 来自古英语 tǣsan '撕扯、梳理'，引申为'取笑'
tease.ex: He likes to tease his little sister.
tease.exCn: 他喜欢逗弄他的小妹妹。

technical.ex: This manual is too technical for beginners.
technical.exCn: 这本手册对初学者来说太专业了。

technician.ex: The technician fixed the computer quickly.
technician.exCn: 技术员很快修好了电脑。

technique.ex: She learned a new painting technique.
technique.exCn: 她学会了一种新的绘画技巧。

technology.ex: Technology changes the way we live.
technology.exCn: 技术改变了我们的生活方式。

tedious.ex: The long meeting was very tedious.

teenager.ex: The teenager loves playing video games.
teenager.exCn: 这个青少年喜欢玩电子游戏。

telegram.ex: She sent a telegram to her family.
telegram.exCn: 她给家人发了一封电报。

telegraph.ex: The telegraph was invented in the 19th century.

telescope.ex: They used a telescope to see the stars.

tell.root: 来自古英语tellan，与tale（故事）同源，本义是“讲述”
tell.ex: Can you tell me the way to the station?
tell.exCn: 你能告诉我去车站的路吗？

temper.root: 来自拉丁语temperare（混合、调节），原指按比例混合以调节硬度
temper.ex: He lost his temper over a small mistake.
temper.exCn: 他为一个小错误发了脾气。

temperament.root: temper（调节）+ament（名词后缀），指天生的“调节方式”即性情
temperament.ex: She has a calm temperament that suits her job.
temperament.exCn: 她性格冷静，适合她的工作。

temperature.root: temper（调节）+ature（名词后缀），原指“调节后的状态”，后指温度
temperature.ex: The temperature dropped below zero last night.
temperature.exCn: 昨晚气温降到了零度以下。

temple.root: 可能与拉丁语templum（神圣区域）有关，也指太阳穴部位
temple.ex: They visited an ancient temple in the city.
temple.exCn: 他们参观了城里的一座古庙。

tempo.root: 直接借自意大利语tempo（时间），音乐中指速度
tempo.ex: The music has a slow and relaxing tempo.
tempo.exCn: 这首音乐节奏缓慢而放松。

temporary.root: 来自拉丁语tempus（时间），tempor+ary（形容词后缀）意为“有时间限制的”
temporary.ex: He found a temporary job for the summer.
temporary.exCn: 他找到了一份夏天的临时工作。

tempt.root: 来自拉丁语temptare（试探、诱惑），与test同源
tempt.ex: The cake might tempt you to eat more.
tempt.exCn: 这块蛋糕可能会诱惑你多吃一点。

temptation.root: tempt（诱惑）+ation（名词后缀），即诱惑的行为或事物
temptation.ex: The chocolate was a strong temptation for her.
temptation.exCn: 巧克力对她来说是个强烈的诱惑。

ten.root: 来自古英语tiene，与拉丁语decem同源，表示数字10
ten.ex: There are ten students in the classroom.

tenant.root: 来自拉丁语tenere（持有），ten+ant（人）即“持有（租约）的人”
tenant.ex: The tenant pays rent every month.

tend.root: 来自拉丁语tendere（伸展、朝向），本义是“伸向某个方向”
tend.ex: I tend to wake up early in the morning.

tendency.root: tend（伸展）+ency（名词后缀），即“朝某方向发展的倾向”
tendency.ex: She has a tendency to worry too much.

tender.root: 来自拉丁语tener（柔软的），与tend（伸展）无关，本义是“嫩、柔软”
tender.ex: The meat is very tender and easy to chew.

tennis.root: 来自法语tenez（接住），网球场上的喊声演变而来
tennis.ex: They play tennis every Saturday morning.
tennis.exCn: 他们每星期六早上打网球。

tense.root: 来自拉丁语 tendere '伸展' → 紧绷
tense.ex: The atmosphere in the room was very tense.
tense.exCn: 房间里的气氛非常紧张。

tension.ex: You could feel the tension in the air.
tension.exCn: 你能感觉到空气中的紧张气氛。

tent.ex: We set up a tent near the lake.
tent.exCn: 我们在湖边搭了一个帐篷。

tentative.ex: We made a tentative plan for next month.
tentative.exCn: 我们制定了一个初步的下月计划。

term.exCn: 这个学期十二月份结束。

terminate.ex: They decided to terminate the contract early.
terminate.exCn: 他们决定提前终止合同。

terrible.root: 来自拉丁语 terrere '使害怕'

terrific.root: 同一词根，程度反转 → 极好的
terrific.ex: You did a terrific job on this project.
terrific.exCn: 你在这个项目上做得非常棒。

terrify.ex: The loud noise terrified the little girl.
terrify.exCn: 巨大的响声吓坏了那个小女孩。

territory.ex: The dog guards its territory fiercely.
territory.exCn: 这条狗凶猛守护自己的地盘。

terror.ex: She lived in terror of being attacked.
terror.exCn: 她生活在害怕被袭击的恐惧中。

test.root: 来自拉丁语 testum '陶罐'（用来检验）
test.ex: I have a math test tomorrow morning.
test.exCn: 我明天早上有一个数学测试。

testify.ex: She testified in court against her boss.
testify.exCn: 她在法庭上作证指控她的老板。

testimony.ex: His testimony helped solve the case.

text.root: 词根 text=编织，引申为‘写成的文字’

textbook.ex: Open your textbook to page ten.

textile.root: text（编织）+ile（名词后缀）→ 纺织品
textile.exCn: 这家工厂生产棉纺织品。

texture.root: text（编织）+ure（名词后缀）→ 织物的质地
texture.ex: This cloth has a smooth texture.

that.ex: I know that you are busy.

theater.ex: We watched a play at the theater.
theater.exCn: 我们在剧院看了一场戏。

theft.root: theft = thief（小偷）的名词形式，偷窃行为

theirs.root: their（他们的）+s（名词性物主代词）

theme.ex: The theme of the story is love.

themselves.root: them（他们）+ selves（自己）→ 他们自己
themselves.ex: They taught themselves to play the guitar.

then.ex: First finish your homework, then you can play.
then.exCn: 先完成作业，然后才能玩。

theoretical.root: theory（理论）+ etical（形容词后缀）→ 理论上的
theoretical.ex: This is only a theoretical possibility.
theoretical.exCn: 这只是一种理论上的可能性。

theory.root: theo（神）+ ry（…学）→ 原指对神的研究，现指理论
theory.exCn: 爱因斯坦的理论永远改变了科学。

therapy.root: therap（治疗）+ y（名词后缀）→ 疗法
therapy.ex: She goes to therapy once a week.
therapy.exCn: 她每周去做一次心理治疗。

there.ex: Put the book over there, please.

thereafter.root: there（那里）+ after（之后）→ 在那之后
thereafter.ex: He graduated, and thereafter moved to London.
thereafter.exCn: 他毕业后，之后搬到了伦敦。

thereby.root: there（那里）+ by（通过）→ 借此
thereby.ex: He saved money, thereby buying a car.
thereby.exCn: 他存了钱，从而买了辆车。

therefore.root: there（那里）+ fore（前面）→ 因此
therefore.ex: It rained; therefore the game was cancelled.
therefore.exCn: 下雨了，因此比赛取消了。

thermal.root: therm（热）+ al（形容词后缀）→ 热的
thermal.ex: Thermal energy can be converted into electricity.

thermometer.root: therm（热）+ o + meter（测量）→ 温度计

thesis.root: the（放置）+ sis（名词后缀）→ 提出观点→ 论文
thesis.ex: She defended her thesis last month.
thesis.exCn: 她上个月进行了论文答辩。

they.ex: They are coming to dinner tonight.

thick.ex: The ice on the lake is very thick.

thief.root: thief 本身是词根，意为‘偷’
thief.ex: The thief stole my wallet on the bus.
thief.exCn: 小偷偷走了我在公交车上的钱包。

thigh.root: thigh 可联想为‘t+high’，大腿位置较高
thigh.ex: He hurt his thigh while running.

thin.root: thin = th + in，想象‘往里缩’所以变薄
thin.ex: She is very thin after dieting.

thing.root: thing 无常见词根，可记作‘这（th）个东西（ing）’

think.root: think = th + ink，‘用墨水思考’即动脑
think.ex: I need to think about this problem.

third.root: third = th + ir + d，‘第三’中的ir可联想为‘irregular（不规则的）’
third.ex: He finished third in the race.
third.exCn: 他在比赛中获得第三名。

thirst.root: thirst = th + first，‘第一需要’是水，所以口渴
thirst.ex: After the run, he had a great thirst.

thirsty.root: thirsty = thirst + y，y是形容词后缀
thirsty.ex: I'm thirsty. Can I have some water?

thirteen.root: thirteen = third + teen，第三加teen即十三
thirteen.ex: She is thirteen years old now.

thirty.root: thirty = third + ty，第三加ty即三十
thirty.ex: He is thirty years old today.

this.root: this 无常见词根，可记作‘这（th）个是（is）’

thorn.root: thorn = th + orn，‘orn’像‘ornament’，但刺并不装饰
thorn.ex: The rose has a sharp thorn.

thorough.root: thorough = through + o，‘彻底’就像‘通透了’
thorough.ex: He did a thorough check of the car.
thorough.exCn: 他对汽车做了彻底的检查。

those.root: those = this + ose，‘那些’是‘这些’的复数变体
those.ex: Those books are on the table.

though.root: though = th + ough，可联想‘虽然（though）通过（through）了’
though.ex: Though it rained, we still went out.
though.exCn: 虽然下雨了，我们还是出去了。

thought.root: thought = think 的过去式/名词，th- 与思考相关（think, thought, thank 同源）
thought.ex: She gave the idea a lot of thought.
thought.exCn: 她对那个想法思考了很多。

thoughtful.root: thoughtful = thought（思考）+ ful（充满…的）→ 充满思考的
thoughtful.ex: He is a very thoughtful person.
thoughtful.exCn: 他是一个非常体贴的人。

thousand.root: thousand = thous（古英语“多”）+ and（连接）→ 很多个百
thousand.ex: There are a thousand stars in the sky.

thread.root: thread = th-（拉）+ read（线）→ 拉出来的细线
thread.exCn: 她小心地把线穿过针眼。

threat.root: threat = th-（威胁）+ reat（来自古英语“压迫”）→ 压迫性的言语
threat.ex: He made a threat to quit the job.

threaten.root: threaten = threat（威胁）+ en（动词后缀）→ 进行威胁
threaten.ex: The storm threatens to ruin our trip.
threaten.exCn: 暴风雨有可能毁掉我们的旅行。

three.root: three = thr-（三，与 three 同源，如 thrice）
three.ex: I have three apples in my bag.

threshold.root: threshold = thresh（踩踏）+ hold（握住）→ 踩在门槛上停住
threshold.ex: He stood on the threshold of the door.

thrift.root: thrift = thr-（节约）+ ift（名词后缀）→ 节约的行为
thrift.ex: She lives a life of thrift and hard work.
thrift.exCn: 她过着节俭而勤奋的生活。

thrill.root: thrill = th-（刺）+ rill（细流）→ 像电流刺过身体的兴奋感
thrill.ex: The roller coaster gave me a thrill.
thrill.exCn: 过山车让我感到一阵兴奋。

thrive.root: thrive = th-（生长）+ rive（河岸）→ 像河岸植物一样茂盛生长
thrive.ex: The business began to thrive after the merger.
thrive.exCn: 合并后，这家企业开始繁荣发展。

throat.root: throat = th-（管）+ roat（古英语“喉咙”）→ 管道状器官
throat.ex: She has a sore throat from singing.

throne.root: throne = th-（座）+ rone（来自拉丁语“宝座”）→ 王座
throne.ex: The king sat on his golden throne.
throne.exCn: 国王坐在他的金色宝座上。

through.root: through = th-（穿过）+ rough（粗糙）→ 穿过粗糙的路径

throughout.root: throughout = through（穿过）+ out（向外）→ 从头到尾全部穿过
throughout.ex: The news spread throughout the city.

throw.root: 源自古英语 thrawan，意为‘扭转、投掷’
throw.ex: He threw the ball to me.

thrust.root: 与 throw 同源，有‘用力推’的动作感
thrust.ex: She thrust the key into the lock.
thrust.exCn: 她把钥匙猛地插进锁里。

thumb.root: 古英语 thuma，意为‘厚实的指头’

thursday.root: 源自古英语 Thunresdæg，‘雷神之日’
thursday.ex: I have a meeting on Thursday.

thus.root: 古英语 thus，意为‘以这种方式’
thus.exCn: 就这样，我们完成了工作。

tick.root: 拟声词，模仿钟表滴答声

ticket.root: tick + 小后缀，原指‘小纸条’

tide.root: 与 time 同源，潮汐随时间变化

tidy.root: 与 tide 同源，原指‘适时、整齐’

tie.root: 古英语 teag，意为‘绳索、系’

tiger.root: 源自古希腊语 tigris，借入英语
tiger.ex: The tiger is a big cat.
tiger.exCn: 老虎是一种大型猫科动物。

tight.root: 与 tie 同源，绑紧的状态

tile.root: 源自拉丁语 tegula，‘覆盖屋顶的瓦片’
tile.ex: We need to fix the broken tile.
tile.exCn: 我们需要修好那块破瓦片。

till.root: 与 till（耕种）同形异义，此处为介词

tilt.root: （无常见词根联想，可联想 til-t 像“倾斜”的发音）
tilt.ex: Don't tilt your chair or you'll fall.
tilt.exCn: 别倾斜椅子，不然你会摔倒。

timber.root: （tim- 与“木”相关，联想 timber 是木材）
timber.ex: The house is made of timber.
timber.exCn: 这房子是用木材建造的。

time.ex: What time does the meeting start?

timely.root: time（时间）+ ly（形容词后缀）→ 及时的

timid.root: （tim- 与“害怕”相关，联想 timid 胆小的）
timid.ex: She is too timid to speak up.
timid.exCn: 她太胆小了，不敢大声说话。

tin.ex: Can you open this tin of beans?

tiny.root: （无常见词根，对比 tin 小罐子，tiny 微小的）
tiny.ex: There was a tiny spider on the wall.
tiny.exCn: 墙上有一只微小的蜘蛛。

tip.ex: He left a tip for the waiter.

tire.root: （无常见词根，联想 tire 轮胎/使疲倦）
tire.ex: The long walk will tire you out.

tired.root: tire（使疲倦）+ ed（形容词后缀）→ 疲倦的
tired.ex: I'm too tired to study tonight.
tired.exCn: 我今晚太累了，学不动了。

tiresome.root: tire（使疲倦）+ some（形容词后缀）→ 令人厌烦的
tiresome.exCn: 这个任务变得令人厌烦。

title.ex: What's the title of the book?

toast.exCn: 让我们为你的成功干杯！

tobacco.root: 源自西班牙语 tabaco，原指某种管子或烟叶，无常见词根词缀
tobacco.ex: He quit smoking tobacco last year.

toe.root: 无常见词根，可联想“头（toe）是脚趾的头”
toe.ex: She stubbed her toe on the door.
toe.exCn: 她踢到了门，碰伤了脚趾。

together.root: to（到）+ gether（收集）→ 聚到一起
together.ex: Let's work together on this project.
together.exCn: 我们一起做这个项目吧。

toilet.root: 源自法语 toilette（小布巾），后指梳妆台→厕所

token.root: 无常见词根，可联想“token = 一小块凭证”
token.ex: This coin is a token of appreciation.
token.exCn: 这枚硬币是感谢的象征。

tolerance.root: toler（承受）+ ance（名词后缀）→ 承受的能力
tolerance.ex: We must show tolerance for different opinions.
tolerance.exCn: 我们必须对不同意见表示宽容。

tolerant.root: toler（承受）+ ant（形容词后缀）→ 能承受的
tolerant.ex: She is tolerant of others' mistakes.
tolerant.exCn: 她对别人的错误很宽容。

tolerate.root: toler（承受）+ ate（动词后缀）→ 承受、容忍
tolerate.ex: I cannot tolerate loud music at night.
tolerate.exCn: 我无法忍受晚上大声的音乐。

toll.root: 无常见词根，可联想“过路费（toll）像钟声（toll）一样提醒你付钱”
toll.ex: The bridge toll is five dollars.
toll.exCn: 这座桥的过路费是五美元。

tomato.root: 源自西班牙语 tomate，无常见词根
tomato.ex: She sliced a tomato for the salad.
tomato.exCn: 她切了一个西红柿做沙拉。

tomb.root: 无常见词根，可联想“tomb 像 tomb（坟墓）里的 tomb（墓碑）”

tomorrow.root: to（到）+ morrow（早晨）→ 到早晨以后

ton.root: 无常见词根，可联想“一吨（ton）很重（ton）很重”
ton.ex: The truck carries one ton of sand.
ton.exCn: 这辆卡车运载一吨沙子。

tone.root: 无常见词根，可联想“语调（tone）像音调（tone）”
tone.ex: Her tone sounded a bit angry.
tone.exCn: 她的语气听起来有点生气。

tongue.ex: She bit her tongue to stay quiet.

tonight.exCn: 我们今晚一起吃晚饭吧。

too.ex: The coffee is too hot to drink.

tool.ex: This tool can fix the broken chair.
tool.exCn: 这个工具能修好坏掉的椅子。

tooth.ex: I need to brush my tooth every morning.

top.ex: He put the book on top of the shelf.

topic.ex: The main topic was climate change.

torch.ex: He carried a torch through the dark cave.
torch.exCn: 他举着火把穿过黑暗洞穴。

torment.ex: The memory caused him great torment.
torment.exCn: 那段记忆给他带来巨大折磨。

torrent.ex: A torrent of rain flooded the street.

torture.ex: Waiting for results felt like torture.
torture.exCn: 等待结果感觉像在受折磨。

toss.ex: She tossed the coin into the fountain.

total.ex: The total cost was fifty dollars.

tough.ex: The exam was tough but I passed.

tour.root: 源自拉丁语 tornus（旋转），引申为“绕圈游览”
tour.ex: We took a guided tour of the old city.
tour.exCn: 我们参加了老城区的导游游览。

tourist.ex: The city is full of tourists in summer.
tourist.exCn: 夏天这座城市挤满了游客。

tow.ex: The car broke down and had to be towed away.

toward.root: to（向）+ ward（方向）→ 朝着某个方向
toward.ex: She walked slowly toward the door.

towel.ex: He dried his hands with a clean towel.
towel.exCn: 他用一块干净的毛巾擦干了手。

tower.ex: A tall tower stands in the center of the square.
tower.exCn: 一座高塔矗立在广场中央。

town.ex: We live in a small town near the coast.
town.exCn: 我们住在海边的一个小镇上。

toxic.root: 源自希腊语 toxikon（毒箭），引申为“有毒的”
toxic.ex: The factory released toxic waste into the river.
toxic.exCn: 工厂向河里排放了有毒废物。

toy.ex: The child played happily with his toy car.
toy.exCn: 孩子开心地玩着他的玩具车。

trace.root: 源自拉丁语 tractus（拖、拉），引申为“留下的痕迹”
trace.ex: Police found traces of blood at the scene.
trace.exCn: 警察在现场发现了血迹。

track.root: 与 trace 同源，指“拖出的路线”
track.ex: The train runs on a single track.

tractor.root: tract（拉）+ -or（物）→ 用来拉东西的机器
tractor.ex: The farmer drove a tractor across the field.
tractor.exCn: 农民开着拖拉机穿过田地。

trade.exCn: 国际贸易对两国都有利。

trademark.root: trade（贸易）+ mark（标记）→ 贸易中的独特标记
trademark.ex: The company registered its logo as a trademark.
trademark.exCn: 该公司将其标志注册为商标。

traffic.root: 来自意大利语 traffico，与贸易相关
traffic.ex: There is heavy traffic on the highway this morning.
traffic.exCn: 今天早上高速公路上交通很拥堵。

tragedy.root: trag-（山羊）+ oidy（歌），原指古希腊悲剧歌队
tragedy.ex: The earthquake was a terrible tragedy.
tragedy.exCn: 这场地震是一场可怕的悲剧。

tragic.root: trag-（山羊）+ ic（形容词后缀），悲剧性的
tragic.ex: The movie had a tragic ending.
tragic.exCn: 这部电影有一个悲剧的结局。

trail.root: 来自古法语 trailler，意为拖、拉
trail.ex: We followed a trail through the forest.
trail.exCn: 我们沿着一条小径穿过森林。

train.root: 来自古法语 trainer，意为拖、拉
train.ex: I take the train to work every day.

training.ex: She is in training for a marathon.
training.exCn: 她正在为马拉松进行训练。

trait.root: 来自拉丁语 tractus，意为拉、特征
trait.ex: Honesty is a good trait to have.
trait.exCn: 诚实是一个很好的品质。

traitor.root: trad-（交出）+ itor（人），交出别人的人
traitor.ex: He was called a traitor to his country.

tram.root: 可能来自苏格兰语 tram，意为横梁
tram.ex: We took a tram around the city center.
tram.exCn: 我们乘坐有轨电车游览市中心。

tramp.root: 来自中古荷兰语 trampen，意为踩踏
tramp.ex: A tramp asked me for some change.
tramp.exCn: 一个流浪汉向我要一些零钱。

transaction.root: trans-（穿过）+ act（做）+ ion（名词后缀），交易
transaction.exCn: 这笔交易是在线完成的。

transcend.exCn: 她的音乐超越了所有界限。

transfer.ex: I need to transfer money to my account.
transfer.exCn: 我需要把钱转到我的账户上。

transform.ex: The caterpillar will transform into a butterfly.

transistor.root: trans（跨越）+istor（类似resistor电阻）→跨越电阻的元件→晶体管
transistor.exCn: 晶体管彻底改变了电子学。

transition.root: trans（跨越）+it（走）+ion（名词）→走过去的过程→过渡
transition.ex: The country is in a peaceful transition.
transition.exCn: 这个国家正处于和平过渡期。

translate.root: trans（跨越）+late（带来）→把意思从一种语言带到另一种→翻译
translate.ex: Can you translate this letter for me?
translate.exCn: 你能帮我翻译这封信吗？

transmission.root: trans（跨越）+miss（发送）+ion（名词）→发送过去的过程→传输

transmit.root: trans（跨越）+mit（发送）→发送过去→传输
transmit.exCn: 他们通过卫星传输数据。

transparent.root: trans（穿过）+parent（出现）→光能穿过看到后面→透明的

transplant.root: trans（转移）+plant（种植）→把植物移到别处种→移植

transport.root: trans（跨越）+port（搬运）→把东西搬运过去→运输
transport.ex: Trucks transport goods across the country.

trap.ex: The mouse was caught in a trap.

travel.ex: I love to travel in summer.

tray.ex: She carried a tray of drinks.

treasure.ex: They buried the treasure on an island.
treasure.exCn: 他们把宝藏埋在了岛上。

treat.ex: The doctor will treat your injury.

treaty.exCn: 他们签署了一项和平条约。

tree.ex: A tall tree stands by the river.

tremble.ex: She began to tremble with fear.

tremendous.root: trem=颤抖→令人发抖的→巨大的

trend.ex: This fashion trend is popular now.
trend.exCn: 这种时尚趋势现在很流行。

trial.ex: The trial lasted for three days.

triangle.ex: Draw a triangle on the paper.

tribe.ex: The tribe lived in the forest.

tribute.ex: They paid tribute to the king.

trick.ex: He played a trick on me.

trifle.ex: Don't worry about such a trifle.

trigger.exCn: 这条消息引发了一阵恐慌。

trim.ex: I need to trim my hair.

triple.ex: The company's profits tripled this year.
triple.exCn: 这家公司今年的利润增加了两倍。

triumph.ex: He felt a sense of triumph after passing the exam.
triumph.exCn: 通过考试后，他感到一种胜利的喜悦。

trivial.root: tri- + via（路）→ 三条路交汇处，小事
trivial.ex: Don't worry about such trivial details.
trivial.exCn: 别为这种琐碎的细节担心。

trolley.ex: She pushed the trolley down the aisle.
trolley.exCn: 她推着手推车沿过道走去。

troop.ex: Troops were sent to the border.

tropic.root: trop- 意为‘转向’（太阳转向的地方）
tropic.ex: The ship sailed through the tropics.

tropical.ex: They went on a tropical vacation.

trouble.ex: I'm having trouble with my car.

troublesome.ex: The child is very troublesome today.

trousers.ex: He wore a pair of black trousers.

truck.ex: The truck delivered supplies to the store.
truck.exCn: 卡车把补给品送到商店。

true.ex: Is it true that you're leaving?

trumpet.ex: He played a loud note on the trumpet.
trumpet.exCn: 他在小号上吹了一个响亮的音符。

trust.root: 来自古北欧语 traust（信心、依靠）
trust.ex: I trust you to finish the work on time.
trust.exCn: 我相信你能按时完成工作。

try.root: 来自古法语 trier（挑选、尝试）
try.ex: You should try this new recipe.
try.exCn: 你应该试试这个新食谱。

tub.ex: He filled the tub with hot water.

tube.ex: The toothpaste tube is almost empty.

tuck.ex: She tucked the blanket around the child.
tuck.exCn: 她把毯子塞在孩子周围。

tuesday.ex: The meeting is scheduled for Tuesday.

tug.ex: The boat gave a sharp tug on the rope.

tuition.root: tuit（来自拉丁语“看管”）+ -ion（名词后缀）
tuition.ex: Tuition fees have increased this year.

tumble.ex: He tripped and took a tumble down the stairs.
tumble.exCn: 他绊了一下，从楼梯上滚了下来。

tumour.ex: The doctor found a small tumour in her lung.
tumour.exCn: 医生在她的肺部发现了一个小肿瘤。

tune.ex: Can you tune the guitar for me?
tune.exCn: 你能帮我调一下吉他的音吗？

tunnel.root: 来自古法语 tonel（桶形通道）
tunnel.ex: The train went through a long tunnel.
tunnel.exCn: 火车穿过了一条长长的隧道。

turbulent.ex: The flight was very turbulent during the storm.
turbulent.exCn: 暴风雨期间飞行非常颠簸。

turkey.root: 可能源自突厥人自称，与火鸡无关联想
turkey.ex: We had turkey for Thanksgiving dinner.
turkey.exCn: 我们感恩节晚餐吃了火鸡。

turn.ex: Please turn left at the next corner.

turnover.root: turn（转）+ over（翻）→ 翻转，引申为营业额
turnover.ex: The company had a high staff turnover.
turnover.exCn: 这家公司员工流动率很高。

tutor.root: 词根 tut = 监护、看管
tutor.ex: He hired a tutor to help with math.
tutor.exCn: 他请了一位家教辅导数学。

tv.ex: I watched a movie on TV last night.
tv.exCn: 我昨晚在电视上看了一部电影。

twelve.root: 来自古英语 twelf，意为“两个剩下”
twelve.ex: There are twelve months in a year.

twenty.ex: She is twenty years old now.

twice.ex: I called him twice but no answer.
twice.exCn: 我给他打了两次电话但没人接。

twin.root: 词根 twi = 二，双胞胎

twinkle.root: 拟声词，模仿闪烁的声音感
twinkle.ex: Stars twinkle in the night sky.

twist.root: 词根 twi = 二，拧转成两股
twist.ex: She twisted her ankle while running.

two.ex: I have two cats at home.

type.root: 词根 typ = 类型、打击（打字时击键）
type.ex: What type of music do you like?
type.exCn: 你喜欢什么类型的音乐？

typewriter.root: type（打字）+ writer（写）→ 打字机
typewriter.ex: My grandfather still uses a typewriter.

typical.root: 来自 type（类型）+ -ical（形容词后缀）→ 典型的，有代表性的
typical.ex: This is a typical example of his work.
typical.exCn: 这是他作品的典型例子。

typist.root: type（打字）+ -ist（表示人）→ 打字员
typist.ex: She works as a typist in an office.

ultimate.root: ultim（最后）+ -ate（形容词后缀）→ 最终的，根本的
ultimate.ex: This is the ultimate goal of our project.
ultimate.exCn: 这是我们项目的最终目标。

ultraviolet.root: ultra-（超过，极端）+ violet（紫色）→ 紫外线（超出紫色光）
ultraviolet.ex: Ultraviolet rays can damage your skin.
ultraviolet.exCn: 紫外线会损伤你的皮肤。

umbrella.root: umbra（阴影）+ -ella（小）→ 小阴影，用来遮阳挡雨的东西
umbrella.ex: Take an umbrella; it might rain.
